Input
{
  "file_path": "/app/project/src/utils.txt"
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "```csharp\n// File: src/utils.txt\n// NOTE: The file extension is intentionally *.txt to satisfy project-generation tooling.\n//       Down-stream build steps rename it to *.cs before compilation.\n\nusing System;\nusing System.Buffers;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.Net;\nusing System.Security.Cryptography;\nusing System.Text;\nusing System.Text.Json;\nusing System.Text.Json.Serialization;\nusing System.Threading;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\nusing Amazon.DynamoDBv2;\nusing Amazon.DynamoDBv2.Model;\nusing Amazon.Runtime;\nusing Amazon.Runtime.Internal;\nusing Amazon.Runtime.Internal.Transform;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;\nusing Polly;\nusing Polly.Contrib.WaitAndRetry;\n\nnamespace PulseOps.Warehouse.Common\n{\n    /// <summary>\n    /// A bag of high-leverage, production-ready utilities that are shared among the\n    /// PulseOps Warehouse Lambda micro-components.  \n    ///  \u2022 Structured logging helpers  \n    ///  \u2022 Polly-based retry policy with full-jitter exponential back-off  \n    ///  \u2022 System.Text.Json configuration & converters  \n    ///  \u2022 Idempotency primitives (hashing + DynamoDB conditional write)  \n    ///  \u2022 Generic batching & pagination helpers  \n    /// </summary>\n    public static class Utils\n    {\n        #region ---------- JSON ----------\n        private static readonly Lazy<JsonSerializerOptions> _lazyJsonOptions = new(CreateDefaultJsonOptions);\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Lazily materialized, project-wide <see cref=\"JsonSerializerOptions\"/> instance.\n        /// Use this instance everywhere to guarantee canonical wire formats.\n        /// </summary>\n        public static JsonSerializerOptions JsonOptions => _lazyJsonOptions.Value;\n\n        private static JsonSerializerOptions CreateDefaultJsonOptions()\n        {\n            var opts = new JsonSerializerOptions\n            {\n                PropertyNamingPolicy            = JsonNamingPolicy.CamelCase,\n                DefaultIgnoreCondition          = JsonIgnoreCondition.WhenWritingNull,\n                WriteIndented                   = false,\n                AllowTrailingCommas            = true,\n                Converters =\n                {\n                    new JsonStringEnumConverter(JsonNamingPolicy.CamelCase),\n                    new DateTimeUtcConverter()\n                }\n            };\n\n            return opts;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Serializes the supplied value using the shared <see cref=\"JsonOptions\"/>.\n        /// </summary>\n        public static string ToJson<T>(this T value) =>\n            JsonSerializer.Serialize(value, JsonOptions);\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Deserializes the supplied JSON payload using the shared <see cref=\"JsonOptions\"/>.\n        /// </summary>\n        public static T? FromJson<T>(this string json) =>\n            JsonSerializer.Deserialize<T>(json, JsonOptions);\n\n        private sealed class DateTimeUtcConverter : JsonConverter<DateTime>\n        {\n            public override DateTime Read(ref Utf8JsonReader reader, Type typeToConvert, JsonSerializerOptions options)\n            {\n                var dt = reader.GetDateTime();\n                return dt.Kind == DateTimeKind.Utc\n                    ? dt\n                    : DateTime.SpecifyKind(dt, DateTimeKind.Utc);\n            }\n\n            public override void Write(Utf8JsonWriter writer, DateTime value, JsonSerializerOptions options)\n            {\n                writer.WriteStringValue(value.ToUniversalTime());\n            }\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region ---------- LOGGING ----------\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Emits a DEBUG log with the object's JSON representation.\n        /// </summary>\n        public static void LogDebugAsJson<T>(this ILogger logger, string message, T obj)\n        {\n            if (logger.IsEnabled(LogLevel.Debug))\n            {\n                logger.LogDebug(\"{Message} | Payload={Payload}\", message, obj.ToJson());\n            }\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region ---------- RETRY POLICY ----------\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Creates a flexible Polly async retry policy with the following characteristics:\n        ///  \u2022 Full-jitter exponential back-off (AWS Architecture best practice)  \n        ///  \u2022 Retries Amazon throttling or transient network glitches (5XX, 429, RequestLimitExceeded, etc.)  \n        ///  \u2022 Propagates original exception once retry budget is depleted  \n        /// </summary>\n        public static IAsyncPolicy CreateAwsRetryPolicy(\n            ILogger logger,\n            int maxRetries                         = 5,\n            Func<int, TimeSpan>? sleepDurations    = null)\n        {\n            sleepDurations ??= retryAttempt => Backoff.FullJitterBackoff(\n                medianFirstRetryDelay: TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(250),\n                retryCount:            maxRetries)[retryAttempt];\n\n            bool TransientAwsError(Exception e) =>\n                e switch\n                {\n                    AmazonServiceException ase when\n                        ase.StatusCode is HttpStatusCode.TooManyRequests\n                                         or HttpStatusCode.InternalServerError\n                                         or HttpStatusCode.BadGateway\n                                         or HttpStatusCode.ServiceUnavailable\n                                         or HttpStatusCode.GatewayTimeout\n                        => true,\n                    WebException => true,\n                    _             => false\n                };\n\n            return Policy\n                .Handle<Exception>(TransientAwsError)\n                .WaitAndRetryAsync(\n                    retryCount: maxRetries,\n                    sleepDurationProvider: sleepDurations,\n                    onRetry: (ex, ts, attempt, ctx) =>\n                    {\n                        logger.LogWarning(\n                            ex,\n                            \"Transient AWS error detected \u2014 backing off {Delay} (attempt {Attempt}/{Max})\",\n                            ts, attempt, maxRetries);\n                    });\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region ---------- IDEMPOTENCY ----------\n        private const string IdempotencyTableName = \"pulseops_idempotency\";\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Generates a SHA-256 hash for <paramref name=\"payload\"/>.  \n        /// By default the resulting 32-byte hash is returned as unpadded Base64 to be compact yet URL-safe.\n        /// </summary>\n        public static string ComputeDeterministicHash(ReadOnlySpan<byte> payload, bool base64 = true)\n        {\n            Span<byte> hash      = stackalloc byte[32]; // SHA-256\n            bool rented          = false;\n            Span<byte> buffer    = payload;\n\n            if (!payload.TryCopyTo(hash)) // Rare path \u2014 very large payload, rent array\n            {\n                rented  = true;\n                var arr = ArrayPool<byte>.Shared.Rent(payload.Length);\n                payload.CopyTo(arr);\n                buffer = arr.AsSpan(0, payload.Length);\n\n                using var sha = SHA256.Create();\n                sha.TryComputeHash(buffer, hash, out _);\n\n                ArrayPool<byte>.Shared.Return(arr);\n            }\n            else\n            {\n                using var sha = SHA256.Create();\n                sha.TryComputeHash(buffer, hash, out _);\n            }\n\n            return base64\n                ? Convert.ToBase64String(hash).TrimEnd('=')\n                : Convert.ToHexString(hash);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Attempts to register an idempotent execution in DynamoDB.\n        /// If the <paramref name=\"hash\"/> already exists, <c>false</c> is returned and callers are\n        /// expected to SHORT-CIRCUIT, guaranteeing \"exactly-once\" semantics.\n        /// </summary>\n        public static async Task<bool> TryRegisterExecutionAsync(\n            this IAmazonDynamoDB dynamo,\n            string               hash,\n            TimeSpan             ttl,\n            CancellationToken    ct  = default)\n        {\n            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(hash);\n\n            var nowEpochSeconds = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow.ToUnixTimeSeconds();\n            var ttlEpoch        = nowEpochSeconds + (long)ttl.TotalSeconds;\n\n            var request = new PutItemRequest\n            {\n                TableName = IdempotencyTableName,\n                Item = new Dictionary<string, AttributeValue>\n                {\n                    [\"pk\"]   = new() { S = hash },\n                    [\"ttl\"]  = new() { N = ttlEpoch.ToString() }\n                },\n                ConditionExpression = \"attribute_not_exists(pk)\"\n            };\n\n            try\n            {\n                await dynamo.PutItemAsync(request, ct).ConfigureAwait(false);\n                return true; // Successfully registered\n            }\n            catch (ConditionalCheckFailedException)\n            {\n                return false; // Duplicate invocation\n            }\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region ---------- BATCHING ----------\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Splits an <see cref=\"IEnumerable{T}\"/> into equally sized chunks.\n        /// </summary>\n        public static IEnumerable<IReadOnlyList<T>> Chunkify<T>(\n            this IEnumerable<T> source,\n            int chunkSize)\n        {\n            if (chunkSize <= 0)\n                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(chunkSize), \"Chunk size must be > 0.\");\n\n            using var enumerator = source.GetEnumerator();\n\n            while (enumerator.MoveNext())\n            {\n                var batch = new List<T>(capacity: chunkSize) { enumerator.Current };\n\n                for (int i = 1; i < chunkSize && enumerator.MoveNext(); i++)\n                    batch.Add(enumerator.Current);\n\n                yield return batch;\n            }\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Consumes an async sequence (or API that returns Task<IEnumerable{T}>) page-by-page\n        /// and aggregates the items into <paramref name=\"buffer\"/> until the <paramref name=\"predicate\"/> returns <c>false</c>.\n        /// A typical use-case is DynamoDB paginate-until-consumed pattern.\n        /// </summary>\n        public static async Task<List<T>> CollectWhileAsync<T>(\n            Func<string?, Task<(IReadOnlyList<T> Page, string? NextToken)>> pageLoader,\n            Predicate<T> predicate,\n            List<T>? buffer = null,\n            CancellationToken ct = default)\n        {\n            buffer ??= new List<T>();\n\n            string? token = null;\n\n            do\n            {\n                ct.ThrowIfCancellationRequested();\n\n                var (page, next) = await pageLoader(token).ConfigureAwait(false);\n\n                foreach (var item in page)\n                {\n                    if (!predicate(item))\n                        return buffer;\n\n                    buffer.Add(item);\n                }\n\n                token = next;\n            }\n            while (token is not null);\n\n            return buffer;\n        }\n        #endregion\n\n        #region ---------- TIME ----------\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Floors the given <see cref=\"DateTime\"/> down to the nearest minute boundary.\n        /// </summary>\n        public static DateTime FloorToMinute(this DateTime dt) =>\n            new(dt.Ticks - (dt.Ticks % TimeSpan.TicksPerMinute), DateTimeKind.Utc);\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Floors the given <see cref=\"DateTime\"/> down by <paramref name=\"quantum\"/> interval.\n        /// Commonly used to bucket temporal metrics (e.g., 5-minute focus windows).\n        /// </summary>\n        public static DateTime Floor(this DateTime dt, TimeSpan quantum)\n        {\n            if (dt.Kind != DateTimeKind.Utc)\n                dt = dt.ToUniversalTime();\n\n            long ticks = dt.Ticks / quantum.Ticks * quantum.Ticks;\n            return new DateTime(ticks, DateTimeKind.Utc);\n        }\n        #endregion\n    }\n}\n```",
    "filePath": "/app/project/src/utils.txt",
    "numLines": 310,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 310
  },
  "type": "text"
}

16. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/app/project/src/module_72.txt"
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "```csharp\n// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n//  File:        src/module_72.txt   (Yes, .txt\u200a\u2014\u200awe treat it as a C# compilation\n//                                    unit by SDK include globbing)\n//  Project:     PulseOps Warehouse \u2014 Serverless Productivity Intelligence Fabric\n//  Purpose:     Stream-processing entry-point that ingests Kinesis records,\n//               validates envelopes, picks an on-the-fly transformation strategy\n//               (Strategy Pattern), and emits normalised payloads further down\n//               the ETL pipeline.\n//\n//  NOTE:        This Lambda is intentionally written as a self-contained,\n//               production-grade component.  It wires up its own DI container\n//               (in-Lambda) to stay fully autonomous and testable.\n// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nusing System;\nusing System.Buffers;\nusing System.Collections.Concurrent;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.IO;\nusing System.Linq;\nusing System.Text;\nusing System.Text.Json;\nusing System.Threading;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\nusing Amazon.Kinesis;\nusing Amazon.Lambda.Core;\nusing Amazon.Lambda.KinesisEvents;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;\nusing Serilog;\n\n// Required by AWS Lambda to locate the serializer we want to use.\n[assembly: LambdaSerializer(typeof(Amazon.Lambda.Serialization.SystemTextJson.DefaultLambdaJsonSerializer))]\n\nnamespace PulseOps.Warehouse.StreamProcessing\n{\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Entry-point Lambda handler for processing Kinesis ingestion shards.\n    /// </summary>\n    public sealed class KinesisStreamProcessor\n    {\n        private readonly IServiceProvider _root;\n        private readonly ILogger _log;\n\n        public KinesisStreamProcessor()\n        {\n            _root = ConfigureServices();\n            _log = _root.GetRequiredService<ILogger>().ForContext<KinesisStreamProcessor>();\n\n            _log.Information(\"KinesisStreamProcessor cold-start completed \u2014 DI container initialised.\");\n        }\n\n        // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n        //  Lambda Handler\n        // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n        /// <summary>\n        /// AWS Lambda runtime invokes this async handler for each micro-batch that\n        /// Kinesis pushes.  Batch size &amp; window are configured via Kinesis event\n        /// source mapping (IaC \u2013 see cdk/KinesisIngestionStack.cs).\n        /// </summary>\n        public async Task HandleAsync(KinesisEvent kinesisEvent, ILambdaContext context)\n        {\n            _log.ForContext(\"Records\", kinesisEvent.Records.Count)\n                .Information(\"Received Kinesis micro-batch.\");\n\n            var validator  = _root.GetRequiredService<IEventEnvelopeValidator>();\n            var selector   = _root.GetRequiredService<ITransformationStrategySelector>();\n            var dispatcher = _root.GetRequiredService<ITransformedEventDispatcher>();\n\n            // Process in parallel \u2013 concurrency governed by reserved Lambda memory.\n            await Parallel.ForEachAsync(\n                kinesisEvent.Records,\n                new ParallelOptions { MaxDegreeOfParallelism = Environment.ProcessorCount },\n                async (record, ct) =>\n                {\n                    try\n                    {\n                        var envelope = DeserializeEnvelope(record);\n                        validator.Validate(envelope);             // throws if invalid\n\n                        var strategy = selector.Resolve(envelope.EventType);\n                        var result   = await strategy.TransformAsync(envelope, ct);\n\n                        await dispatcher.DispatchAsync(result, ct);\n                    }\n                    catch (ValidationException vex)\n                    {\n                        _log.Warning(vex, \"Validation failure.  Record sent to DLQ.\");\n                        await dispatcher.DeadLetterAsync(record, vex, ct);\n                    }\n                    catch (Exception ex)\n                    {\n                        _log.Error(ex, \"Unhandled exception.  Record sent to DLQ.\");\n                        await dispatcher.DeadLetterAsync(record, ex, ct);\n                    }\n                });\n        }\n\n        // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n        //  Helpers\n        // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n        private static EventEnvelope DeserializeEnvelope(KinesisEvent.KinesisEventRecord record)\n        {\n            // Kinesis enforces a Base64 encoded string.  We decode quickly using\n            // ArrayPool to avoid allocations on high throughput.\n            var dataSpan = record.Kinesis.Data.Span;\n            var rented   = ArrayPool<byte>.Shared.Rent(dataSpan.Length);\n            try\n            {\n                dataSpan.CopyTo(rented);\n                var json = Encoding.UTF8.GetString(rented, 0, dataSpan.Length);\n\n                return JsonSerializer.Deserialize<EventEnvelope>(json)!;\n            }\n            finally\n            {\n                ArrayPool<byte>.Shared.Return(rented);\n            }\n        }\n\n        private static IServiceProvider ConfigureServices()\n        {\n            var services = new ServiceCollection();\n\n            // --- Logging -----------------------------------------------------\n            Log.Logger = new LoggerConfiguration()\n                .Enrich.WithProperty(\"Component\", \"PulseOps.KinesisStreamProcessor\")\n                .WriteTo.Console()\n                .CreateLogger();\n\n            services.AddSingleton<ILogger>(Log.Logger);\n\n            // --- Validators ---------------------------------------------------\n            services.AddSingleton<IEventEnvelopeValidator, DefaultEnvelopeValidator>();\n\n            // --- Transformation Strategies -----------------------------------\n            services.AddSingleton<CalendarEventTransformationStrategy>();\n            services.AddSingleton<CiCdLogTransformationStrategy>();\n            services.AddSingleton<EmailMetadataTransformationStrategy>();\n\n            services.AddSingleton<ITransformationStrategySelector>(sp =>\n            {\n                var strategies = new Dictionary<string, ITransformationStrategy>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)\n                {\n                    [\"calendar_event\"] = sp.GetRequiredService<CalendarEventTransformationStrategy>(),\n                    [\"cicd_log\"]       = sp.GetRequiredService<CiCdLogTransformationStrategy>(),\n                    [\"email_metadata\"] = sp.GetRequiredService<EmailMetadataTransformationStrategy>()\n                };\n                return new TransformationStrategySelector(strategies);\n            });\n\n            // --- Dispatchers --------------------------------------------------\n            services.AddSingleton<ITransformedEventDispatcher, FireAndForgetDispatcher>();\n\n            return services.BuildServiceProvider();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // =========================================================================\n    //  Domain Models\n    // =========================================================================\n    public record EventEnvelope(\n        string     EventType,\n        JsonElement Payload,\n        DateTime    TimestampUtc);\n\n    public record TransformedEvent(\n        string     NormalisedType,\n        JsonElement Payload,\n        DateTime    ObservedAtUtc,\n        IDictionary<string, string> Tags);\n\n    // =========================================================================\n    //  Validation\n    // =========================================================================\n    public interface IEventEnvelopeValidator\n    {\n        void Validate(EventEnvelope envelope);\n    }\n\n    public sealed class DefaultEnvelopeValidator : IEventEnvelopeValidator\n    {\n        private readonly ILogger _log;\n\n        public DefaultEnvelopeValidator(ILogger log) => _log = log;\n\n        public void Validate(EventEnvelope envelope)\n        {\n            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(envelope.EventType))\n            {\n                throw new ValidationException(\"EventType is required.\");\n            }\n\n            if (envelope.TimestampUtc == default)\n            {\n                throw new ValidationException(\"TimestampUtc is required.\");\n            }\n\n            if (envelope.Payload.ValueKind == JsonValueKind.Undefined ||\n                envelope.Payload.ValueKind == JsonValueKind.Null)\n            {\n                throw new ValidationException(\"Payload cannot be null or undefined.\");\n            }\n\n            _log.Debug(\"Envelope validation passed for type {EventType}\", envelope.EventType);\n        }\n    }\n\n    public sealed class ValidationException : Exception\n    {\n        public ValidationException(string message) : base(message) { }\n    }\n\n    // =========================================================================\n    //  Strategy Pattern \u2014 Transformations\n    // =========================================================================\n    public interface ITransformationStrategy\n    {\n        Task<TransformedEvent> TransformAsync(EventEnvelope envelope, CancellationToken ct);\n    }\n\n    public sealed class TransformationStrategySelector : ITransformationStrategySelector\n    {\n        private readonly IReadOnlyDictionary<string, ITransformationStrategy> _strategies;\n\n        public TransformationStrategySelector(IReadOnlyDictionary<string, ITransformationStrategy> strategies)\n            => _strategies = strategies;\n\n        public ITransformationStrategy Resolve(string eventType)\n        {\n            if (_strategies.TryGetValue(eventType, out var strategy))\n            {\n                return strategy;\n            }\n\n            throw new InvalidOperationException($\"No transformation strategy registered for '{eventType}'.\");\n        }\n    }\n\n    public interface ITransformationStrategySelector\n    {\n        ITransformationStrategy Resolve(string eventType);\n    }\n\n    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n    //  Concrete Strategies\n    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n    public sealed class CalendarEventTransformationStrategy : ITransformationStrategy\n    {\n        public Task<TransformedEvent> TransformAsync(EventEnvelope envelope, CancellationToken ct)\n        {\n            // Example: Enrich meeting duration & cost statistics\n            var source = envelope.Payload;\n\n            var attendees  = source.GetProperty(\"attendees\").GetArrayLength();\n            var durationMs = source.GetProperty(\"duration_ms\").GetInt64();\n            var hourlyRate = 65; // USD \u2013 in practice looked up from DB\n\n            var meetingCost = (durationMs / 1000 / 60.0 / 60.0) * attendees * hourlyRate;\n\n            var enriched = new\n            {\n                attendees,\n                duration_ms  = durationMs,\n                meeting_cost = meetingCost,\n                source_id    = source.GetProperty(\"id\").GetString()\n            };\n\n            return Task.FromResult(\n                new TransformedEvent(\n                    NormalisedType : \"meeting_metrics\",\n                    Payload        : JsonSerializer.SerializeToElement(enriched),\n                    ObservedAtUtc  : envelope.TimestampUtc,\n                    Tags           : new Dictionary<string, string>\n                    {\n                        [\"source\"] = \"calendar\"\n                    }));\n        }\n    }\n\n    public sealed class CiCdLogTransformationStrategy : ITransformationStrategy\n    {\n        public Task<TransformedEvent> TransformAsync(EventEnvelope envelope, CancellationToken ct)\n        {\n            var payload        = envelope.Payload;\n            var started        = payload.GetProperty(\"job_started_at\").GetDateTime();\n            var finished       = payload.GetProperty(\"job_finished_at\").GetDateTime();\n            var leadTime       = (finished - started).TotalSeconds;\n            var pipelineStatus = payload.GetProperty(\"status\").GetString();\n\n            var normalised = new\n            {\n                lead_time_seconds = leadTime,\n                status            = pipelineStatus,\n                commit_sha        = payload.GetProperty(\"commit_sha\").GetString()\n            };\n\n            return Task.FromResult(\n                new TransformedEvent(\n                    NormalisedType : \"deployment_lead_time\",\n                    Payload        : JsonSerializer.SerializeToElement(normalised),\n                    ObservedAtUtc  : envelope.TimestampUtc,\n                    Tags           : new Dictionary<string, string>\n                    {\n                        [\"source\"] = \"cicd\"\n                    }));\n        }\n    }\n\n    public sealed class EmailMetadataTransformationStrategy : ITransformationStrategy\n    {\n        public Task<TransformedEvent> TransformAsync(EventEnvelope envelope, CancellationToken ct)\n        {\n            var p          = envelope.Payload;\n            var threadId   = p.GetProperty(\"thread_id\").GetString();\n            var direction  = p.GetProperty(\"direction\").GetString(); // inbound|outbound\n\n            var normalised = new\n            {\n                thread_id  = threadId,\n                is_reply   = p.GetProperty(\"is_reply\").GetBoolean(),\n                direction,\n                size_bytes = p.GetProperty(\"size_bytes\").GetInt64()\n            };\n\n            return Task.FromResult(\n                new TransformedEvent(\n                    NormalisedType : \"email_activity\",\n                    Payload        : JsonSerializer.SerializeToElement(normalised),\n                    ObservedAtUtc  : envelope.TimestampUtc,\n                    Tags           : new Dictionary<string, string>\n                    {\n                        [\"source\"] = \"email\",\n                        [\"direction\"] = direction\n                    }));\n        }\n    }\n\n    // =========================================================================\n    //  Dispatcher (Observer Pattern variant)\n    // =========================================================================\n    public interface ITransformedEventDispatcher\n    {\n        Task DispatchAsync(TransformedEvent evt, CancellationToken ct);\n        Task DeadLetterAsync(KinesisEvent.KinesisEventRecord rawRecord, Exception ex, CancellationToken ct);\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Fire-and-forget dispatcher that pushes transformed events onto a downstream\n    /// Kinesis stream.  If no stream is configured (e.g. local tests), we fall\n    /// back to logging.\n    /// </summary>\n    public sealed class FireAndForgetDispatcher : ITransformedEventDispatcher, IDisposable\n    {\n        private readonly ILogger _log;\n        private readonly IAmazonKinesis _kinesis;\n        private readonly string _targetStreamName;\n        private readonly ConcurrentQueue<Amazon.Kinesis.Model.PutRecordsRequestEntry> _buffer = new();\n\n        public FireAndForgetDispatcher(ILogger log)\n        {\n            _log              = log;\n            _kinesis          = new AmazonKinesisClient(); // region inferred from Lambda environment\n            _targetStreamName = Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable(\"TRANSFORMED_STREAM_NAME\") \n                                ?? \"pulseops-transformed-events\";\n        }\n\n        public Task DispatchAsync(TransformedEvent evt, CancellationToken ct)\n        {\n            var json   = JsonSerializer.Serialize(evt);\n            var record = new Amazon.Kinesis.Model.PutRecordsRequestEntry\n            {\n                PartitionKey = evt.Tags.TryGetValue(\"source\", out var source) ? source : \"unknown\",\n                Data         = new MemoryStream(Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(json))\n            };\n\n            _buffer.Enqueue(record);\n\n            // Flush in background if we crossed threshold (imperfect, but keeps demo short)\n            if (_buffer.Count >= 500)\n            {\n                _ = FlushAsync(CancellationToken.None);\n            }\n\n            return Task.CompletedTask;\n        }\n\n        public async Task DeadLetterAsync(KinesisEvent.KinesisEventRecord rawRecord, Exception ex, CancellationToken ct)\n        {\n            // Pipe to DLQ \u2013 in demo we just log.  In production it\u2019s an SQS DLQ.\n            _log.Warning(ex, \"Dead-lettering record {@PartitionKey}\", rawRecord.Kinesis.PartitionKey);\n            await Task.CompletedTask;\n        }\n\n        private async Task FlushAsync(CancellationToken ct)\n        {\n            if (_buffer.IsEmpty) return;\n\n            var batch = new List<Amazon.Kinesis.Model.PutRecordsRequestEntry>();\n            while (batch.Count < 500 && _buffer.TryDequeue(out var entry))\n            {\n                batch.Add(entry);\n            }\n\n            if (batch.Count == 0) return;\n\n            var request = new Amazon.Kinesis.Model.PutRecordsRequest\n            {\n                StreamName = _targetStreamName,\n                Records    = batch\n            };\n\n            var response = await _kinesis.PutRecordsAsync(request, ct);\n\n            if (response.FailedRecordCount > 0)\n            {\n                _log.Error(\"Failed to write {Failed}/{Total} records to stream {Stream}\",\n                           response.FailedRecordCount, batch.Count, _targetStreamName);\n            }\n            else\n            {\n                _log.Information(\"Flushed {Count} transformed events to stream {Stream}\",\n                                 batch.Count, _targetStreamName);\n            }\n        }\n\n        public void Dispose() => _ = FlushAsync(CancellationToken.None);\n    }\n}\n```",
    "filePath": "/app/project/src/module_72.txt",
    "numLines": 430,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 430
  },
  "type": "text"
}
17. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/app/project/tests/test_main.txt"

Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "```csharp\nusing System;\nusing System.Collections.Concurrent;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.Linq;\nusing System.Text.Json;\nusing System.Threading;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\nusing Amazon.Kinesis.Model;\nusing Moq;\nusing PulseOps.Warehouse.Core.Messaging;\nusing PulseOps.Warehouse.Core.Processing;\nusing PulseOps.Warehouse.Core.Processing.Contracts;\nusing PulseOps.Warehouse.Core.Processing.Engine;\nusing PulseOps.Warehouse.Core.Processing.Results;\nusing PulseOps.Warehouse.Core.Telemetry;\nusing PulseOps.Warehouse.Shared;\nusing Xunit;\n\nnamespace PulseOps.Warehouse.Tests.Integration\n{\n    /// <summary>\n    /// End-to-end tests that exercise the Transformation Engine in the context\n    /// of a streaming invocation while mocking out external dependencies such as\n    /// PagerDuty and the Dead-Letter-Queue.\n    /// </summary>\n    public sealed class TransformationEngineSpecs\n    {\n        private readonly Mock<ITransformationStrategyFactory> _strategyFactoryMock = new();\n        private readonly Mock<IDeadLetterQueue> _dlqMock = new();\n        private readonly Mock<IPagerDutyClient> _pagerDutyMock = new();\n        private readonly Mock<IWarehouseLogger> _loggerMock = new();\n\n        private readonly TransformationEngine _sut;\n\n        public TransformationEngineSpecs()\n        {\n            _sut = new TransformationEngine(\n                _strategyFactoryMock.Object,\n                _dlqMock.Object,\n                _pagerDutyMock.Object,\n                _loggerMock.Object);\n        }\n\n        [Fact(DisplayName = \"Happy-path: engine delegates to correct strategy and returns Success\")]\n        public async Task Engine_Delegates_To_Strategy_And_Returns_Success()\n        {\n            // Arrange\n            var kinesisRecord = new Record\n            {\n                Data = BinaryUtils.ToMemoryStream(JsonSerializer.SerializeToUtf8Bytes(new { hello = \"world\" }))\n            };\n\n            var fakeRequest = new TransformationRequest(\"json:foo/bar\", kinesisRecord);\n            var fakeResponse = new TransformationSuccess(\"unit-test-payload\");\n\n            var strategyMock = new Mock<ITransformationStrategy>();\n            strategyMock\n                .Setup(s => s.TransformAsync(fakeRequest, It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()))\n                .ReturnsAsync(fakeResponse);\n\n            _strategyFactoryMock\n                .Setup(f => f.Create(It.IsAny<string>()))\n                .Returns(strategyMock.Object);\n\n            // Act\n            var result = await _sut.HandleAsync(fakeRequest, CancellationToken.None);\n\n            // Assert\n            Assert.IsType<TransformationSuccess>(result);\n            Assert.Equal(\"unit-test-payload\", ((TransformationSuccess)result).Output);\n            strategyMock.Verify(s => s.TransformAsync(fakeRequest, It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()), Times.Once);\n            _dlqMock.VerifyNoOtherCalls();\n            _pagerDutyMock.VerifyNoOtherCalls();\n        }\n\n        [Fact(DisplayName = \"Failure-path: strategy throws, engine emits DLQ + PagerDuty and returns Failure\")]\n        public async Task Engine_Emits_DLQ_And_PagerDuty_On_Failure()\n        {\n            // Arrange\n            var record = new Record\n            {\n                Data = BinaryUtils.ToMemoryStream(\"bogus-payload\")\n            };\n\n            var request = new TransformationRequest(\"text/bogus\", record);\n            var ex = new InvalidOperationException(\"Boom\");\n\n            var strategyMock = new Mock<ITransformationStrategy>();\n            strategyMock\n                .Setup(s => s.TransformAsync(request, It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()))\n                .ThrowsAsync(ex);\n\n            _strategyFactoryMock\n                .Setup(f => f.Create(It.IsAny<string>()))\n                .Returns(strategyMock.Object);\n\n            // Act\n            var result = await _sut.HandleAsync(request, CancellationToken.None);\n\n            // Assert\n            Assert.IsType<TransformationFailure>(result);\n\n            _dlqMock.Verify(d => d.EnqueueAsync(It.Is<DeadLetterMessage>(m =>\n                m.Payload == \"bogus-payload\" &&\n                m.ExceptionType == ex.GetType().FullName), It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()), Times.Once);\n\n            _pagerDutyMock.Verify(p => p.TriggerAsync(It.Is<PagerDutyEvent>(e =>\n                e.Title.Contains(\"Transformation Failure\") &&\n                e.Details.Contains(\"Boom\"))), Times.Once);\n\n            _loggerMock.Verify(l => l.Error(It.IsAny<string>(), ex), Times.Once);\n        }\n\n        [Fact(DisplayName = \"Parallel-processing: engine can handle multiple concurrent requests without race conditions\")]\n        public async Task Engine_Processes_Messages_In_Parallel()\n        {\n            // Arrange\n            const int messageCount = 250;\n\n            var barrier = new Barrier(2); // ensure strategies overlap in execution\n\n            var strategyMock = new Mock<ITransformationStrategy>();\n            strategyMock\n                .Setup(s => s.TransformAsync(It.IsAny<TransformationRequest>(), It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()))\n                .Returns(async (TransformationRequest req, CancellationToken _) =>\n                {\n                    barrier.SignalAndWait(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(5)); // force concurrency\n                    await Task.Delay(10, _);\n                    return new TransformationSuccess(req.ToString());\n                });\n\n            _strategyFactoryMock\n                .Setup(f => f.Create(It.IsAny<string>()))\n                .Returns(strategyMock.Object);\n\n            var requests = Enumerable.Range(0, messageCount)\n                .Select(i => new TransformationRequest(\n                    $\"json://unit-test/{i}\",\n                    new Record { Data = BinaryUtils.ToMemoryStream($\"{{\\\"index\\\":{i}}}\") }))\n                .ToList();\n\n            // Act\n            var results = new ConcurrentBag<ITransformationResult>();\n\n            await Task.WhenAll(requests.Select(async r =>\n            {\n                var result = await _sut.HandleAsync(r, CancellationToken.None);\n                results.Add(result);\n            }));\n\n            // Assert\n            Assert.Equal(messageCount, results.Count);\n            Assert.All(results, r => Assert.IsType<TransformationSuccess>(r));\n            strategyMock.Verify(s =>\n                s.TransformAsync(It.IsAny<TransformationRequest>(), It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()),\n                Times.Exactly(messageCount));\n        }\n\n        [Theory(DisplayName = \"Strategy resolution: factory selects correct strategy based on content-type\")]\n        [InlineData(\"application/calendar+json\", typeof(CalendarEventStrategy))]\n        [InlineData(\"application/vnd.github.webhook+json\", typeof(GitHubWebhookStrategy))]\n        [InlineData(\"text/x-log\", typeof(CiCdLogStrategy))]\n        public void Factory_Returns_Correct_Strategy_Given_Content_Type(string contentType, Type expectedType)\n        {\n            // Arrange\n            var factory = new TransformationStrategyFactory(new []\n            {\n                new CalendarEventStrategy(),\n                new GitHubWebhookStrategy(),\n                new CiCdLogStrategy()\n            });\n\n            // Act\n            var strategy = factory.Create(contentType);\n\n            // Assert\n            Assert.IsType(expectedType, strategy);\n        }\n    }\n}\n```",
    "filePath": "/app/project/tests/test_main.txt",
    "numLines": 182,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 182
  },

  "file": {
    "content": "```csharp\nusing System;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.Linq;\nusing System.Text.Json;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\nusing FluentAssertions;\nusing Moq;\nusing Xunit;\nusing PulseOps.Warehouse.Shared.Utils;\nusing PulseOps.Warehouse.Shared.Models;\n\nnamespace PulseOps.Warehouse.Tests.Utils\n{\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Unit-tests for commonly used helper/utilities that power the PulseOps\n    /// Warehouse fabric.  All tests run in-memory and are therefore safe to\n    /// execute in parallel on the build server.\n    /// </summary>\n    public sealed class UtilityTests\n    {\n        #region \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 Timestamp / DateTime helpers \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n        [Theory(DisplayName = \"Iso8601Timestamp.ParseUtc() must round-trip arbitrary UTC dates\")]\n        [InlineData(\"2023-01-01T00:00:00Z\")]\n        [InlineData(\"1997-07-16T19:20:30Z\")]\n        [InlineData(\"2050-12-31T23:59:59Z\")]\n        public void Iso8601Timestamp_ParseUtc_RoundTrips(string iso)\n        {\n            // Act\n            var utc = Iso8601Timestamp.ParseUtc(iso);\n            var roundTripped = Iso8601Timestamp.ToIso8601(utc);\n\n            // Assert\n            roundTripped.Should().Be(iso);\n            utc.Kind.Should().Be(DateTimeKind.Utc);\n        }\n\n        [Fact(DisplayName = \"Iso8601Timestamp.ToEpochMilliseconds() should be epoch-compatible\")]\n        public void Iso8601Timestamp_ToEpochMilliseconds_Works()\n        {\n            // Arrange\n            var dt = new DateTime(1970, 01, 01, 00, 00, 01, DateTimeKind.Utc);\n\n            // Act\n            long epochMs = Iso8601Timestamp.ToEpochMilliseconds(dt);\n\n            // Assert\n            epochMs.Should().Be(1000);\n        }\n\n        [Fact(DisplayName = \"Iso8601Timestamp.ParseUtc() throws on non-UTC input\")]\n        public void Iso8601Timestamp_ParseUtc_ShouldThrowOnLocalTime()\n        {\n            // Arrange\n            const string localTime = \"2023-06-18T12:00:00+02:00\";\n\n            // Act\n            Action act = () => Iso8601Timestamp.ParseUtc(localTime);\n\n            // Assert\n            act.Should()\n               .Throw<ArgumentException>()\n               .WithMessage(\"*input must be in UTC (Z-suffix)*\");\n        }\n\n        #endregion\n\n        #region \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 Partition Key generator \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n        [Theory(DisplayName = \"PartitionKeyGenerator.Generate() creates deterministic keys\")]\n        [InlineData(\"tenant-001\", \"repo/service-a\", 1688219200L)]\n        [InlineData(\"tenant-001\", \"repo/service-a\", 1688219200L)] // deliberately repeated\n        [InlineData(\"tenant-999\", \"repo/service-b\", 1688219201L)]\n        public void PartitionKeyGenerator_ShouldBeDeterministic(\n            string tenant,\n            string granularitySource,\n            long timestamp)\n        {\n            // Arrange\n            var g1 = PartitionKeyGenerator.Generate(tenant, granularitySource, timestamp);\n            var g2 = PartitionKeyGenerator.Generate(tenant, granularitySource, timestamp);\n\n            // Act / Assert\n            g1.Should().Be(g2, \"same inputs must yield identical partition keys\");\n            g1.Should().MatchRegex(@\"^[a-z0-9\\-]{36}$\"); // encoded GUID-format\n        }\n\n        [Fact(DisplayName = \"PartitionKeyGenerator.Generate() should be evenly distributed\")]\n        public void PartitionKeyGenerator_ShouldUniformlyDistribute()\n        {\n            // Arrange\n            const int sampleSize = 10_000;\n            var keys = new HashSet<string>();\n\n            // Act\n            for (int i = 0; i < sampleSize; i++)\n            {\n                keys.Add(PartitionKeyGenerator.Generate(\n                    $\"tenant-{i % 50}\",\n                    $\"repo/foo-{i % 5}\",\n                    1688219200L + i));\n            }\n\n            // Assert\n            double uniqueRatio = (double)keys.Count / sampleSize;\n            uniqueRatio.Should().BeGreaterThan(0.99); // at most 1% collisions\n        }\n\n        #endregion\n\n        #region \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 RetryPolicy (exponential back-off w/ jitter) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n        [Fact(DisplayName = \"RetryPolicy should retry configured number of attempts\")]\n        public async Task RetryPolicy_ShouldRetryExpectedAttempts()\n        {\n            // Arrange\n            var attempts = 0;\n            var policy = RetryPolicy\n               .Builder()\n               .WithMaxRetries(3)\n               .WithBaseDelay(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(10))\n               .Build();\n\n            // Act\n            await policy.ExecuteAsync(async () =>\n            {\n                attempts++;\n                throw new InvalidOperationException(\"boom\");\n            }).ContinueWith(_ => { }); // ignore resulting exception for test\n\n            // Assert\n            attempts.Should().Be(4); // 3 retries + 1 original\n        }\n\n        [Fact(DisplayName = \"RetryPolicy should short-circuit on success\")]\n        public async Task RetryPolicy_ShouldReturnImmediatelyOnSuccess()\n        {\n            // Arrange\n            var attempts = 0;\n            var policy = RetryPolicy\n               .Builder()\n               .WithMaxRetries(5)\n               .WithBaseDelay(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(10))\n               .Build();\n\n            // Act\n            await policy.ExecuteAsync(async () =>\n            {\n                if (++attempts == 2)\n                    return; // success on second attempt\n\n                throw new Exception(\"transient failure\");\n            });\n\n            // Assert\n            attempts.Should().Be(2);\n        }\n\n        [Fact(DisplayName = \"RetryPolicy should propagate when CancellationToken is cancelled\")]\n        public async Task RetryPolicy_ShouldHonorCancellationToken()\n        {\n            // Arrange\n            var cts = new System.Threading.CancellationTokenSource();\n            var policy = RetryPolicy\n               .Builder()\n               .WithMaxRetries(10)\n               .WithBaseDelay(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(50))\n               .Build();\n\n            // cancel after first attempt\n            var attempt = 0;\n            cts.CancelAfter(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(5));\n\n            // Act\n            Func<Task> act = () => policy.ExecuteAsync(async token =>\n            {\n                attempt++;\n                await Task.Delay(100, token); // long running task\n                throw new Exception(\"should not reach\");\n            }, cts.Token);\n\n            // Assert\n            await act.Should()\n                     .ThrowAsync<OperationCanceledException>();\n\n            attempt.Should().Be(1);\n        }\n\n        #endregion\n\n        #region \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 JSON diff serializer \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n        [Fact(DisplayName = \"JsonPatchGenerator should skip unchanged properties\")]\n        public void JsonPatchGenerator_ShouldSkipUnchanged()\n        {\n            // Arrange\n            var original = new UserProfile\n            {\n                Email = \"bob@corp.com\",\n                FullName = \"Bob Foo\",\n                Department = \"R&D\"\n            };\n\n            var modified = original with { Department = \"Engineering\" };\n\n            // Act\n            var patch = JsonPatchGenerator.CreatePatch(original, modified);\n\n            // Assert\n            patch.Should().ContainSingle(operation =>\n                operation.Path.EndsWith(\"/Department\") &&\n                operation.Operation == \"replace\");\n        }\n\n        [Fact(DisplayName = \"JsonPatchGenerator should produce empty patch when identical\")]\n        public void JsonPatchGenerator_ShouldBeEmptyOnNoChange()\n        {\n            // Arrange\n            var profile = new UserProfile\n            {\n                Email = \"alice@corp.com\",\n                FullName = \"Alice Bar\",\n                Department = \"Finance\"\n            };\n\n            // Act\n            var patch = JsonPatchGenerator.CreatePatch(profile, profile);\n\n            // Assert\n            patch.Should().BeEmpty();\n        }\n\n        #endregion\n    }\n\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    // The following record is test-fixture only.  The production model lives\n    // under Shared.Models but gets trimmed in CI\u2019s \u201ctest-only\u201d publish phase\n    // for quicker unit test boot-time.\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    internal sealed record UserProfile\n    {\n        public string Email { get; init; } = string.Empty;\n        public string FullName { get; init; } = string.Empty;\n        public string Department { get; init; } = string.Empty;\n    }\n}\n```",
    "filePath": "/app/project/tests/test_utils.txt",
    "numLines": 249,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 249
  },

Respects back-pressure.\n/app/project/src/module_72.txt:377:            _buffer.Enqueue(record);\n/app/project/src/module_72.txt:400:            while (batch.Count < 500 && _buffer.TryDequeue(out var entry))\n/app/project/src/module_7.txt:276:                    _results.Enqueue(result);\n/app/project/src/module_7.txt:293:                while (_results.TryDequeue(out var result))",

25. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/app/project/src/module_7.txt"

Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "```csharp\n// File: src/module_7.txt\n// NOTE: The .txt extension is intentional\u2014this file is dynamically compiled in a\n//       Lambda environment via Amazon.Lambda.RuntimeSupport.  DO NOT RENAME.\n//\n// PulseOps Warehouse \u2014 Serverless Productivity Intelligence Fabric\n// Module 7: Transformation Strategy Registry + Execution Engine\n//\n// This module is responsible for:\n//\n//   \u2022 Discovering all ITransformationStrategy implementations in the current\n//     assembly (and optionally in referenced assemblies).\n//   \u2022 Mapping each strategy to a domain-specific EventType at runtime.\n//   \u2022 Executing strategies in parallel for a batch of EventEnvelope messages.\n//   \u2022 Providing robust error handling, observability, and graceful fallback\n//     semantics whenever a matching strategy is missing.\n//\n// The code below adheres to .NET 6+ best-practices and is production-ready.\n\nusing System;\nusing System.Collections.Concurrent;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.Diagnostics;\nusing System.Linq;\nusing System.Reflection;\nusing System.Runtime.CompilerServices;\nusing System.Text.Json;\nusing System.Threading;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions;\n\nnamespace PulseOps.Warehouse.Transformations\n{\n    #region Domain Contracts \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Wraps a raw event coming from the event streaming fabric (Kinesis or SQS).\n    /// </summary>\n    public sealed record EventEnvelope(\n        string EventId,\n        string EventType,\n        DateTimeOffset Timestamp,\n        JsonElement  Payload);\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Output produced by a transformation strategy; will be persisted by downstream\n    /// storage lambdas or Glue jobs.  Kept intentionally generic.\n    /// </summary>\n    public sealed record TransformationResult(\n        string EventId,\n        string EventType,\n        DateTimeOffset ProcessedAtUtc,\n        JsonElement TransformedPayload);\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Implement this interface to create a new domain-specific transformation.\n    /// </summary>\n    public interface ITransformationStrategy\n    {\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Friendly, unique identifier for this strategy \u2014 usually equals the\n        /// canonical EventType the strategy can handle.\n        /// </summary>\n        string StrategyKey { get; }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Executes domain-specific data transformation logic on a single event.\n        /// Implementations must be thread-safe.\n        /// </summary>\n        ValueTask<TransformationResult> TransformAsync(\n            EventEnvelope     envelope,\n            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Decorate a concrete strategy with this attribute to register it for one\n    /// or more EventTypes.  The registry will automatically wire things up.\n    /// </summary>\n    [AttributeUsage(AttributeTargets.Class, AllowMultiple = true, Inherited = false)]\n    public sealed class HandlesEventAttribute : Attribute\n    {\n        public HandlesEventAttribute(string eventType) => EventType = eventType;\n        public string EventType { get; }\n    }\n\n    #endregion\n\n    #region Transformation Registry \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Discovers and caches the mapping between EventType \u2192 ITransformationStrategy.\n    /// Thread-safe and lazy-loaded.  Intended to be instantiated once per Lambda\n    /// execution environment (static singleton).\n    /// </summary>\n    public sealed class TransformationStrategyRegistry\n    {\n        private readonly ILogger _logger;\n        private readonly ConcurrentDictionary<string, ITransformationStrategy> _cache = new();\n\n        public TransformationStrategyRegistry(ILogger? logger = null)\n        {\n            _logger = logger ?? NullLogger.Instance;\n            DiscoverStrategies();\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Retrieves the strategy for a given event type, or null if none found.\n        /// </summary>\n        public ITransformationStrategy? Resolve(string eventType)\n        {\n            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(eventType))\n                return null;\n\n            _cache.TryGetValue(eventType, out var strategy);\n            return strategy;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Scans loaded assemblies for implementations of ITransformationStrategy\n        /// decorated with <see cref=\"HandlesEventAttribute\"/>.\n        /// </summary>\n        private void DiscoverStrategies()\n        {\n            var sw = Stopwatch.StartNew();\n\n            // To reduce cold-start, limit to assemblies starting with \"PulseOps\".\n            var candidateAssemblies = AppDomain.CurrentDomain\n                                              .GetAssemblies()\n                                              .Where(a => a.GetName().Name?.StartsWith(\"PulseOps\") == true);\n\n            foreach (var assembly in candidateAssemblies)\n            {\n                foreach (var strategyType in assembly.GetTypes()\n                                                     .Where(t => !t.IsAbstract &&\n                                                                 !t.IsInterface &&\n                                                                 typeof(ITransformationStrategy).IsAssignableFrom(t)))\n                {\n                    var handlesAttrs = strategyType.GetCustomAttributes<HandlesEventAttribute>(false)\n                                                   .ToArray();\n\n                    if (!handlesAttrs.Any())\n                    {\n                        _logger.LogWarning(\n                            \"Transformation strategy {Strategy} implements ITransformationStrategy but \" +\n                            \"is not decorated with [HandlesEvent].  Skipping automatic registration.\",\n                            strategyType.FullName);\n\n                        continue;\n                    }\n\n                    // Instantiate via parameterless ctor; fail fast if missing.\n                    if (Activator.CreateInstance(strategyType) is not ITransformationStrategy instance)\n                    {\n                        _logger.LogError(\n                            \"Failed to instantiate transformation strategy {Strategy}.  Ensure it has a \" +\n                            \"public parameterless constructor.\",\n                            strategyType.FullName);\n                        continue;\n                    }\n\n                    foreach (var handles in handlesAttrs)\n                    {\n                        var eventType = handles.EventType;\n\n                        if (!_cache.TryAdd(eventType, instance))\n                        {\n                            _logger.LogError(\n                                \"Duplicate strategy registration attempted for EventType '{EventType}'.  \" +\n                                \"Strategy {Strategy} will be ignored.\",\n                                eventType,\n                                strategyType.FullName);\n                        }\n                        else\n                        {\n                            _logger.LogInformation(\n                                \"Registered transformation strategy {Strategy} for EventType '{EventType}'.\",\n                                strategyType.FullName,\n                                eventType);\n                        }\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n\n            sw.Stop();\n            _logger.LogInformation(\n                \"TransformationStrategyRegistry initialized with {Count} strategies in {ElapsedMs} ms.\",\n                _cache.Count,\n                sw.ElapsedMilliseconds);\n        }\n    }\n\n    #endregion\n\n    #region Execution Engine \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Orchestrates parallel execution of transformations for a collection of events.\n    /// </summary>\n    public sealed class TransformationEngine\n    {\n        private readonly TransformationStrategyRegistry _registry;\n        private readonly ILogger                         _logger;\n\n        public TransformationEngine(\n            TransformationStrategyRegistry registry,\n            ILogger?                       logger = null)\n        {\n            _registry = registry ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(registry));\n            _logger   = logger ?? NullLogger.Instance;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Executes transformations for the provided event batch.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <returns>A stream of successful <see cref=\"TransformationResult\"/>s.</returns>\n        /// <remarks>\n        ///   \u2022 Runs each transformation in an isolated task to contain failures.<br/>\n        ///   \u2022 Strategies are expected to be stateless / thread-safe.<br/>\n        ///   \u2022 Failures are logged and surfaced via <paramref name=\"onError\"/> callback.\n        /// </remarks>\n        public async IAsyncEnumerable<TransformationResult> TransformAsync(\n            IEnumerable<EventEnvelope>           batch,\n            Func<EventEnvelope, Exception, Task>? onError            = null,\n            [EnumeratorCancellation]\n            CancellationToken                    cancellationToken   = default)\n        {\n            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(batch);\n\n            var throttler = new SemaphoreSlim(Environment.ProcessorCount * 2);\n\n            foreach (var envelope in batch)\n            {\n                await throttler.WaitAsync(cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(false);\n\n                _ = Task.Run(async () =>\n                    {\n                        try\n                        {\n                            var strategy = _registry.Resolve(envelope.EventType);\n\n                            if (strategy is null)\n                            {\n                                // Graceful fallback: log + surface via callback.\n                                var ex = new InvalidOperationException(\n                                    $\"No transformation strategy registered for EventType '{envelope.EventType}'.\");\n\n                                await HandleErrorAsync(envelope, ex, onError).ConfigureAwait(false);\n                                return;\n                            }\n\n                            var result = await strategy.TransformAsync(envelope, cancellationToken)\n                                                       .ConfigureAwait(false);\n\n                            yieldResult(result); // Local function invocation\n                        }\n                        catch (Exception ex) when (!ex.IsCritical())\n                        {\n                            // Non-fatal exceptions are logged and optionally forwarded.\n                            await HandleErrorAsync(envelope, ex, onError).ConfigureAwait(false);\n                        }\n                        finally\n                        {\n                            throttler.Release();\n                        }\n                    },\n                    cancellationToken);\n            }\n\n            // Local helper to yield result back to caller in thread-safe manner.\n            void yieldResult(TransformationResult result)\n            {\n                // Channel-like behavior, but purposefully simple to keep dependencies down.\n                lock (_yieldLock)\n                {\n                    _results.Enqueue(result);\n                    _yieldSignal.Release();\n                }\n            }\n\n            // Internal queue & signal to serialize yield return across tasks.\n            var _results     = new ConcurrentQueue<TransformationResult>();\n            var _yieldSignal = new SemaphoreSlim(0);\n            var _yieldLock   = new object();\n\n            // Drain queue until all tasks complete.\n            var pendingTasks = throttler.CurrentCount;\n\n            while (pendingTasks > 0)\n            {\n                await _yieldSignal.WaitAsync(cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(false);\n\n                while (_results.TryDequeue(out var result))\n                {\n                    yield return result;\n                }\n\n                // When throttler count equals max, all tasks are done.\n                pendingTasks = throttler.CurrentCount;\n            }\n        }\n\n        private Task HandleErrorAsync(\n            EventEnvelope                 envelope,\n            Exception                     ex,\n            Func<EventEnvelope, Exception, Task>? onError)\n        {\n            _logger.LogError(\n                ex,\n                \"Error while transforming EventId {EventId} (Type: {EventType}).\",\n                envelope.EventId,\n                envelope.EventType);\n\n            return onError is null ? Task.CompletedTask : onError(envelope, ex);\n        }\n    }\n\n    #endregion\n\n    #region Sample Strategies \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Sample transformation for calendar events \u2014 computes meeting cost.\n    /// </summary>\n    [HandlesEvent(\"CalendarEvent\")]\n    public sealed class CalendarEventTransformationStrategy : ITransformationStrategy\n    {\n        public string StrategyKey => \"CalendarEvent\";\n\n        public ValueTask<TransformationResult> TransformAsync(\n            EventEnvelope     envelope,\n            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)\n        {\n            // Extract standard fields\n            var payload = envelope.Payload;\n\n            var attendees = payload.GetProperty(\"attendees\").GetArrayLength();\n            var duration  = payload.GetProperty(\"durationMinutes\").GetInt32();\n            var avgSalary = payload.GetProperty(\"averageSalaryPerMinute\").GetDecimal();\n\n            var cost = attendees * duration * avgSalary;\n\n            var transformed = new\n            {\n                envelope.EventId,\n                envelope.Timestamp,\n                MeetingCost = cost,\n                Original    = payload\n            };\n\n            var json = JsonSerializer.SerializeToElement(transformed);\n\n            return ValueTask.FromResult(\n                new TransformationResult(\n                    envelope.EventId,\n                    envelope.EventType,\n                    DateTimeOffset.UtcNow,\n                    json));\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Sample transformation for CI/CD logs \u2014 computes lead-time in minutes.\n    /// </summary>\n    [HandlesEvent(\"CICDLog\")]\n    public sealed class CicdLogTransformationStrategy : ITransformationStrategy\n    {\n        public string StrategyKey => \"CICDLog\";\n\n        public ValueTask<TransformationResult> TransformAsync(\n            EventEnvelope     envelope,\n            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)\n        {\n            var payload = envelope.Payload;\n\n            var commitTime   = payload.GetProperty(\"commitTimeUtc\").GetDateTimeOffset();\n            var deployTime   = payload.GetProperty(\"deployTimeUtc\").GetDateTimeOffset();\n            var leadTimeMins = (deployTime - commitTime).TotalMinutes;\n\n            var transformed = new\n            {\n                envelope.EventId,\n                envelope.Timestamp,\n                LeadTimeMinutes = leadTimeMins,\n                Original        = payload\n            };\n\n            var json = JsonSerializer.SerializeToElement(transformed);\n\n            return ValueTask.FromResult(\n                new TransformationResult(\n                    envelope.EventId,\n                    envelope.EventType,\n                    DateTimeOffset.UtcNow,\n                    json));\n        }\n    }\n\n    #endregion\n\n    #region Helper Extensions \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n    internal static class ExceptionExtensions\n    {\n        private static readonly HashSet<Type> _critical =\n        [\n            typeof(StackOverflowException),\n            typeof(OutOfMemoryException),\n            typeof(AccessViolationException),\n            typeof(AppDomainUnloadedException),\n            typeof(BadImageFormatException),\n            typeof(CannotUnloadAppDomainException),\n            typeof(InvalidProgramException)\n        ];\n\n        public static bool IsCritical(this Exception ex) => _critical.Contains(ex.GetType());\n    }\n\n    #endregion\n}\n```",
    "filePath": "/app/project/src/module_7.txt",
    "numLines": 421,

Input
