Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "```csharp\n// File: src/Module64/KpiComputationOrchestrator.cs\n// Project: PulseOps Warehouse \u2014 Serverless Productivity Intelligence Fabric\n//\n// Description:\n//  Implements the Strategy-Pattern based KPI computation orchestrator that runs\n//  inside a Lambda.  The orchestrator resolves a concrete IKpiComputationStrategy\n//  for the requested KPI, fans the work out across multiple threads (or\n//  reserved-concurrency Lambda instances, depending on runtime settings),\n//  handles transient failures with an exponential back-off policy, and finally\n//  streams the normalized result back to the Data-Lake.\n//\n//  The class is intentionally generic and can be reused from both the\n//  stream-processing (real-time) and batch-processing (historical back-fill)\n//  pipelines.\n\nusing System;\nusing System.Collections.Concurrent;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.Linq;\nusing System.Net;\nusing System.Text.Json;\nusing System.Threading;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\nusing Amazon;\nusing Amazon.Runtime;\nusing Amazon.S3;\nusing Amazon.S3.Model;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;\nusing PulseOps.Warehouse.Common;\nusing PulseOps.Warehouse.Contracts;\nusing PulseOps.Warehouse.Transformations.Strategies;\n\nnamespace PulseOps.Warehouse.Transformations\n{\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Orchestrates KPI computations by delegating the heavy lifting to a pool of\n    /// <see cref=\"IKpiComputationStrategy\"/> implementations.  Responsibilities:\n    ///\n    /// \u2022 Resolve the correct strategy for a given <see cref=\"KpiRequest\"/>\n    /// \u2022 Run the computation across a configurable degree of parallelism\n    /// \u2022 Persist results to the Lake (S3) using a structured partition scheme\n    /// \u2022 Emit CloudWatch observable metrics & traces\n    /// \u2022 Provide robust error-handling / back-off semantics\n    /// </summary>\n    public sealed class KpiComputationOrchestrator : IKpiComputationOrchestrator\n    {\n        private const string DefaultRegion = \"us-east-1\";\n        private readonly IKpiComputationStrategyRegistry _strategyRegistry;\n        private readonly IAmazonS3 _s3Client;\n        private readonly ILogger<KpiComputationOrchestrator> _logger;\n        private readonly OrchestratorOptions _options;\n\n        public KpiComputationOrchestrator(\n            IKpiComputationStrategyRegistry strategyRegistry,\n            ILogger<KpiComputationOrchestrator> logger,\n            OrchestratorOptions? options = null,\n            IAmazonS3? s3Client = null)\n        {\n            _strategyRegistry = strategyRegistry ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(strategyRegistry));\n            _logger = logger ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(logger));\n            _options = options ?? OrchestratorOptions.FromEnvironment();\n            _s3Client = s3Client ?? new AmazonS3Client(FallbackCredentialsFactory.GetCredentials(), RegionEndpoint.GetBySystemName(DefaultRegion));\n        }\n\n        public async Task<KpiBatchResult> ProcessBatchAsync(\n            IEnumerable<KpiRequest> requests,\n            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)\n        {\n            if (requests == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(requests));\n\n            var requestList = requests.ToList();\n            _logger.LogInformation(\"Processing {Count} KPI requests\", requestList.Count);\n\n            var throttler = new SemaphoreSlim(_options.DegreeOfParallelism);\n            var resultCollector = new ConcurrentBag<KpiComputationResult>();\n            var failures = new ConcurrentBag<KpiComputationFailure>();\n\n            var tasks = requestList.Select(async request =>\n            {\n                await throttler.WaitAsync(cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(false);\n                try\n                {\n                    await ExecuteWithRetryAsync(request, cancellationToken, async () =>\n                    {\n                        var strategy = _strategyRegistry.Resolve(request.KpiName);\n                        _logger.LogDebug(\"Resolved strategy {Strategy} for KPI {Kpi}\",\n                            strategy.GetType().Name, request.KpiName);\n\n                        var result = await strategy.ComputeAsync(request, cancellationToken)\n                            .ConfigureAwait(false);\n\n                        await PersistToLakeAsync(result, cancellationToken)\n                            .ConfigureAwait(false);\n\n                        _logger.LogInformation(\"Successfully processed KPI {Kpi} for Tenant {TenantId}\",\n                            request.KpiName, request.TenantId);\n\n                        resultCollector.Add(result);\n                    }).ConfigureAwait(false);\n                }\n                catch (Exception ex)\n                {\n                    _logger.LogError(ex, \"Failed to process KPI {Kpi} for Tenant {TenantId}\",\n                        request.KpiName, request.TenantId);\n\n                    failures.Add(new KpiComputationFailure(request, ex));\n                }\n                finally\n                {\n                    throttler.Release();\n                }\n            }).ToArray();\n\n            await Task.WhenAll(tasks).ConfigureAwait(false);\n\n            return new KpiBatchResult(resultCollector.ToArray(), failures.ToArray());\n        }\n\n        #region Helpers\n\n        private async Task ExecuteWithRetryAsync(\n            KpiRequest request,\n            CancellationToken cancellationToken,\n            Func<Task> action)\n        {\n            var attempt = 0;\n            var delay = _options.InitialBackoff;\n\n            while (true)\n            {\n                try\n                {\n                    cancellationToken.ThrowIfCancellationRequested();\n                    await action().ConfigureAwait(false);\n                    return; // success\n                }\n                catch (Exception ex) when (IsTransient(ex) && attempt < _options.MaxRetryAttempts)\n                {\n                    attempt++;\n                    _logger.LogWarning(ex,\n                        \"[Attempt {Attempt}/{MaxAttempts}] Transient failure while processing {Kpi} (Tenant {TenantId}). Retrying in {DelayMs}ms\u2026\",\n                        attempt, _options.MaxRetryAttempts, request.KpiName, request.TenantId, delay.TotalMilliseconds);\n\n                    await Task.Delay(delay, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(false);\n                    delay = TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(delay.TotalMilliseconds * _options.BackoffMultiplier);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        private static bool IsTransient(Exception ex)\n        {\n            return ex switch\n            {\n                AmazonServiceException ase\n                    when ase.StatusCode is HttpStatusCode.InternalServerError or HttpStatusCode.ServiceUnavailable => true,\n                TimeoutException => true,\n                _ => false\n            };\n        }\n\n        private async Task PersistToLakeAsync(\n            KpiComputationResult result,\n            CancellationToken cancellationToken)\n        {\n            // Example partition: kpi_name=FocusTimeRatio/year=2023/month=08/day=14/hour=13/<tenantId>.json\n            var (bucket, key) = GetS3LocationForResult(result);\n\n            using var stream = JsonSerializer.SerializeToUtf8Bytes(result).AsStream();\n            var putRequest = new PutObjectRequest\n            {\n                BucketName = bucket,\n                Key = key,\n                InputStream = stream,\n                ContentType = \"application/json\",\n                AutoCloseStream = true\n            };\n\n            await _s3Client.PutObjectAsync(putRequest, cancellationToken)\n                .ConfigureAwait(false);\n\n            _logger.LogDebug(\"Persisted KPI {Kpi} result to s3://{Bucket}/{Key}\", result.KpiName, bucket, key);\n        }\n\n        private (string Bucket, string Key) GetS3LocationForResult(KpiComputationResult result)\n        {\n            var timestamp = result.GeneratedAtUtc;\n            var key =\n                $\"{result.KpiName}/year={timestamp:yyyy}/month={timestamp:MM}/day={timestamp:dd}/hour={timestamp:HH}/{result.TenantId}.json\";\n\n            return (_options.S3Bucket, key);\n        }\n\n        #endregion\n    }\n\n    #region Options & Contracts\n\n    public sealed record OrchestratorOptions(\n        int DegreeOfParallelism,\n        int MaxRetryAttempts,\n        TimeSpan InitialBackoff,\n        double BackoffMultiplier,\n        string S3Bucket)\n    {\n        public static OrchestratorOptions FromEnvironment()\n        {\n            int GetInt(string name, int defaultValue) =>\n                int.TryParse(Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable(name), out var value) ? value : defaultValue;\n\n            double GetDouble(string name, double defaultValue) =>\n                double.TryParse(Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable(name), out var value) ? value : defaultValue;\n\n            string GetString(string name, string defaultValue) =>\n                Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable(name) ?? defaultValue;\n\n            return new OrchestratorOptions(\n                DegreeOfParallelism: GetInt(\"KPI_DOP\", Environment.ProcessorCount),\n                MaxRetryAttempts: GetInt(\"KPI_MAX_RETRIES\", 3),\n                InitialBackoff: TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(GetInt(\"KPI_RETRY_BACKOFF_MS\", 400)),\n                BackoffMultiplier: GetDouble(\"KPI_BACKOFF_MULTIPLIER\", 2.0),\n                S3Bucket: GetString(\"KPI_LAKE_BUCKET\", \"pulseops-data-lake\"));\n        }\n    }\n\n    public record KpiBatchResult(\n        IReadOnlyCollection<KpiComputationResult> Successes,\n        IReadOnlyCollection<KpiComputationFailure> Failures)\n    {\n        public bool HasFailures => Failures.Count > 0;\n    }\n\n    public record KpiComputationFailure(\n        KpiRequest Request,\n        Exception Exception);\n\n    #endregion\n\n    #region Interfaces\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Abstraction used for Dependency-Injection in Lambda entry-points.\n    /// </summary>\n    public interface IKpiComputationOrchestrator\n    {\n        Task<KpiBatchResult> ProcessBatchAsync(\n            IEnumerable<KpiRequest> requests,\n            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Registry used to look up strategy implementations at run-time.\n    /// </summary>\n    public interface IKpiComputationStrategyRegistry\n    {\n        IKpiComputationStrategy Resolve(string kpiName);\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// All KPI strategies must implement this contract.\n    /// </summary>\n    public interface IKpiComputationStrategy\n    {\n        string KpiName { get; }\n\n        Task<KpiComputationResult> ComputeAsync(\n            KpiRequest request,\n            CancellationToken cancellationToken);\n    }\n\n    #endregion\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------\n// Additional supporting code, typically placed\n// in their respective files/namespaces but kept\n// here for brevity.\n// ---------------------------------------------\nnamespace PulseOps.Warehouse.Contracts\n{\n    public record KpiRequest(\n        string TenantId,\n        string KpiName,\n        DateTimeOffset WindowStartUtc,\n        DateTimeOffset WindowEndUtc,\n        string PayloadS3Uri); // Pointer to raw data inside the lake\n\n    public record KpiComputationResult(\n        string TenantId,\n        string KpiName,\n        DateTimeOffset WindowStartUtc,\n        DateTimeOffset WindowEndUtc,\n        DateTimeOffset GeneratedAtUtc,\n        IReadOnlyDictionary<string, double> Metrics);\n}\n\nnamespace PulseOps.Warehouse.Transformations.Strategies\n{\n    using System.Threading;\n    using System.Threading.Tasks;\n    using PulseOps.Warehouse.Contracts;\n    using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Example strategy that calculates the Focus-Time Ratio KPI.\n    /// </summary>\n    public sealed class FocusTimeRatioStrategy : IKpiComputationStrategy\n    {\n        private readonly ILogger<FocusTimeRatioStrategy> _logger;\n\n        public FocusTimeRatioStrategy(ILogger<FocusTimeRatioStrategy> logger)\n        {\n            _logger = logger;\n        }\n\n        public string KpiName => \"FocusTimeRatio\";\n\n        public async Task<KpiComputationResult> ComputeAsync(\n            KpiRequest request,\n            CancellationToken cancellationToken)\n        {\n            // Simulated heavy computation (replace with real SQL or EMR job)\n            await Task.Delay(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100), cancellationToken);\n\n            var focusMinutes = Random.Shared.NextDouble() * 300;\n            var meetingMinutes = Random.Shared.NextDouble() * 180;\n\n            var ratio = focusMinutes / Math.Max(1, meetingMinutes + focusMinutes);\n\n            _logger.LogDebug(\"Computed Focus-Time Ratio {Ratio:F2} for Tenant {Tenant}\", ratio, request.TenantId);\n\n            return new KpiComputationResult(\n                TenantId: request.TenantId,\n                KpiName: KpiName,\n                WindowStartUtc: request.WindowStartUtc,\n                WindowEndUtc: request.WindowEndUtc,\n                GeneratedAtUtc: DateTimeOffset.UtcNow,\n                Metrics: new Dictionary<string, double>\n                {\n                    [\"FocusMinutes\"] = focusMinutes,\n                    [\"MeetingMinutes\"] = meetingMinutes,\n                    [\"FocusTimeRatio\"] = ratio\n                });\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Example strategy that calculates Meeting-Cost Index KPI.\n    /// </summary>\n    public sealed class MeetingCostIndexStrategy : IKpiComputationStrategy\n    {\n        private readonly ILogger<MeetingCostIndexStrategy> _logger;\n\n        public MeetingCostIndexStrategy(ILogger<MeetingCostIndexStrategy> logger)\n        {\n            _logger = logger;\n        }\n\n        public string KpiName => \"MeetingCostIndex\";\n\n        public async Task<KpiComputationResult> ComputeAsync(\n            KpiRequest request,\n            CancellationToken cancellationToken)\n        {\n            await Task.Delay(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100), cancellationToken);\n\n            var averageHourlyRate = 75.0; // USD \u2013 would be looked up from HR data\n            var totalMeetingHours = Random.Shared.NextDouble() * 50;\n            var costIndex = averageHourlyRate * totalMeetingHours;\n\n            _logger.LogDebug(\"Computed Meeting-Cost Index {Cost} for Tenant {Tenant}\", costIndex, request.TenantId);\n\n            return new KpiComputationResult(\n                TenantId: request.TenantId,\n                KpiName: KpiName,\n                WindowStartUtc: request.WindowStartUtc,\n                WindowEndUtc: request.WindowEndUtc,\n                GeneratedAtUtc: DateTimeOffset.UtcNow,\n                Metrics: new Dictionary<string, double>\n                {\n                    [\"AverageHourlyRate\"] = averageHourlyRate,\n                    [\"TotalMeetingHours\"] = totalMeetingHours,\n                    [\"MeetingCostIndex\"] = costIndex\n                });\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Simple in-memory registry used in Lambda start-up; could be replaced by DI scanning.\n    /// </summary>\n    public sealed class KpiComputationStrategyRegistry : IKpiComputationStrategyRegistry\n    {\n        private readonly IReadOnlyDictionary<string, IKpiComputationStrategy> _strategies;\n\n        public KpiComputationStrategyRegistry(IEnumerable<IKpiComputationStrategy> strategies)\n        {\n            _strategies = strategies.ToDictionary(s => s.KpiName, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n        }\n\n        public IKpiComputationStrategy Resolve(string kpiName)\n        {\n            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(kpiName))\n                throw new ArgumentException(\"KPI name is required\", nameof(kpiName));\n\n            if (_strategies.TryGetValue(kpiName, out var strategy))\n                return strategy;\n\n            throw new InvalidOperationException($\"No strategy registered for KPI '{kpiName}'.\");\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nnamespace PulseOps.Warehouse.Common\n{\n    using System.IO;\n\n    internal static class ByteArrayExtensions\n    {\n        public static Stream AsStream(this byte[] bytes) => new MemoryStream(bytes);\n    }\n}\n```",
    "filePath": "/app/project/src/module_64.txt",
    "numLines": 422,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 422
  },

Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "```csharp\n// -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n//  File:        module_33.txt   (kept extension for historical reasons, compiled as C# source)\n//  Project:     PulseOps Warehouse \u2014 Serverless Productivity Intelligence Fabric\n//  Description: Generic, strategy-driven data-quality validator that is reused by multiple\n//               ingestion/transformation Lambdas. The validator relies on the Strategy Pattern to\n//               load the proper IValidationStrategy implementation at runtime and the Observer\n//               Pattern to notify interested parties of validation outcomes (e.g., DLQ fan-out,\n//               metrics, PagerDuty alerts).\n// -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n#nullable enable\nusing System;\nusing System.Collections.Concurrent;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis;\nusing System.Text.Json;\nusing System.Text.RegularExpressions;\nusing System.Threading;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\n\nusing Amazon.SimpleNotificationService;\nusing Amazon.SimpleNotificationService.Model;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions;\n\n// ReSharper disable MemberCanBePrivate.Global\n\nnamespace PulseOps.Warehouse.Quality;\n\n/// <summary>\n/// Provides a single-responsibility fa\u00e7ade for validating incoming data envelopes, routing invalid\n/// payloads to a dead-letter topic, and notifying observers about quality incidents.\n/// </summary>\npublic sealed class DataQualityValidator : IObservable<ValidationResult>, IDisposable\n{\n    private readonly IValidationStrategyFactory _strategyFactory;\n    private readonly IAmazonSimpleNotificationService _snsClient;\n    private readonly string _deadLetterTopicArn;\n    private readonly ILogger<DataQualityValidator> _logger;\n    private readonly ConcurrentDictionary<IObserver<ValidationResult>, byte> _observers = new();\n\n    public DataQualityValidator(\n        IValidationStrategyFactory strategyFactory,\n        IAmazonSimpleNotificationService snsClient,\n        string deadLetterTopicArn,\n        ILogger<DataQualityValidator>? logger = null)\n    {\n        _strategyFactory = strategyFactory ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(strategyFactory));\n        _snsClient = snsClient ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(snsClient));\n        _deadLetterTopicArn = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(deadLetterTopicArn)\n            ? deadLetterTopicArn\n            : throw new ArgumentException(\"DLQ topic ARN must be provided.\", nameof(deadLetterTopicArn));\n\n        _logger = logger ?? NullLogger<DataQualityValidator>.Instance;\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Validates the provided <see cref=\"DataEnvelope\"/> by delegating to the appropriate\n    /// <see cref=\"IValidationStrategy\"/>. Errors are published to a DLQ topic on failure.\n    /// </summary>\n    /// <exception cref=\"UnknownSourceException\">\n    /// Thrown when no validation strategy exists for the envelope's Source.\n    /// </exception>\n    public async Task<ValidationResult> ValidateAsync(\n        DataEnvelope envelope,\n        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)\n    {\n        if (envelope is null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(envelope));\n\n        _logger.LogDebug(\"Validating envelope with CorrelationId={CorrelationId}\", envelope.CorrelationId);\n\n        if (!_strategyFactory.TryCreate(envelope.Source, out var strategy))\n        {\n            _logger.LogError(\"Unknown source '{Source}'. Unable to find validation strategy.\", envelope.Source);\n            throw new UnknownSourceException(envelope.Source);\n        }\n\n        var isValid = strategy.Validate(envelope.Payload, out var errors);\n        var result = new ValidationResult(envelope, isValid, errors);\n\n        if (!isValid)\n        {\n            await PublishToDlqAsync(result, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(false);\n        }\n\n        NotifyObservers(result);\n        return result;\n    }\n\n    /// <inheritdoc />\n    public IDisposable Subscribe(IObserver<ValidationResult> observer)\n    {\n        _observers.TryAdd(observer, 0);\n        return new Unsubscriber(_observers, observer);\n    }\n\n    private void NotifyObservers(ValidationResult result)\n    {\n        foreach (var observer in _observers.Keys)\n        {\n            try\n            {\n                observer.OnNext(result);\n            }\n            catch (Exception ex)\n            {\n                _logger.LogWarning(ex, \"Observer {Observer} threw while handling validation result.\", observer);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private async Task PublishToDlqAsync(ValidationResult result, CancellationToken cancellationToken)\n    {\n        var message = new PublishRequest\n        {\n            TopicArn = _deadLetterTopicArn,\n            Subject = \"PulseOps Data Validation Failure\",\n            Message = JsonSerializer.Serialize(result, Serializer.Options)\n        };\n\n        try\n        {\n            await _snsClient.PublishAsync(message, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(false);\n            _logger.LogWarning(\"Invalid envelope dispatched to DLQ (CorrelationId={CorrelationId})\",\n                result.Envelope.CorrelationId);\n        }\n        catch (Exception ex)\n        {\n            _logger.LogError(ex,\n                \"Failed to publish invalid envelope CorrelationId={CorrelationId} to DLQ.\",\n                result.Envelope.CorrelationId);\n            // In production we might reroute to backup storage or raise a PagerDuty alert.\n        }\n    }\n\n    public void Dispose()\n    {\n        _snsClient?.Dispose();\n        _logger.LogDebug(\"Disposed {Instance}\", nameof(DataQualityValidator));\n    }\n\n    // -- Nested helper types ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    private sealed class Unsubscriber : IDisposable\n    {\n        private readonly ConcurrentDictionary<IObserver<ValidationResult>, byte> _dict;\n        private readonly IObserver<ValidationResult> _observer;\n\n        public Unsubscriber(\n            ConcurrentDictionary<IObserver<ValidationResult>, byte> dict,\n            IObserver<ValidationResult> observer)\n        {\n            _dict = dict;\n            _observer = observer;\n        }\n\n        public void Dispose() => _dict.TryRemove(_observer, out _);\n    }\n}\n\n// -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n//  Strategy Pattern plumbing\n// -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/// <summary>\n/// Abstraction for source-specific validation strategies.\n/// </summary>\npublic interface IValidationStrategy\n{\n    bool Validate(JsonElement payload, out IReadOnlyList<string>? errors);\n}\n\n/// <summary>\n/// Factory for resolving a strategy matching the envelope's Source.\n/// </summary>\npublic interface IValidationStrategyFactory\n{\n    bool TryCreate(string source, [NotNullWhen(true)] out IValidationStrategy? strategy);\n}\n\n/// <summary>\n/// Default implementation that scans the current assembly (or DI container) for strategy types.\n/// New validation logic can be deployed as separate DLLs and loaded via reflection without\n/// touching this factory.\n/// </summary>\npublic sealed class ReflectionValidationStrategyFactory : IValidationStrategyFactory\n{\n    private readonly IReadOnlyDictionary<string, Type> _types;\n    private readonly ILogger<ReflectionValidationStrategyFactory> _logger;\n\n    public ReflectionValidationStrategyFactory(\n        ILogger<ReflectionValidationStrategyFactory>? logger = null)\n    {\n        _logger = logger ?? NullLogger<ReflectionValidationStrategyFactory>.Instance;\n        _types = LoadStrategyTypes();\n    }\n\n    public bool TryCreate(string source, [NotNullWhen(true)] out IValidationStrategy? strategy)\n    {\n        if (_types.TryGetValue(source, out var type))\n        {\n            strategy = (IValidationStrategy)Activator.CreateInstance(type)!;\n            return true;\n        }\n\n        strategy = null;\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    private static IReadOnlyDictionary<string, Type> LoadStrategyTypes()\n    {\n        var dict = new Dictionary<string, Type>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n\n        foreach (var type in typeof(ReflectionValidationStrategyFactory).Assembly.GetTypes())\n        {\n            if (type.IsAbstract || !typeof(IValidationStrategy).IsAssignableFrom(type)) continue;\n\n            var attr = type.GetCustomAttributes(typeof(SourceAttribute), inherit: false);\n            if (attr.Length == 0) continue;\n\n            var sourceName = ((SourceAttribute)attr[0]).Source;\n            dict[sourceName] = type;\n        }\n\n        return dict;\n    }\n}\n\n// -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n//  Example concrete validation strategies\n// -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/// <summary>\n/// Validates calendar event metadata originating from Google Workspace.\n/// </summary>\n[Source(\"calendar.google\")]\npublic sealed class GoogleCalendarValidationStrategy : IValidationStrategy\n{\n    private static readonly Regex EmailRegex =\n        new(@\"^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$\", RegexOptions.Compiled | RegexOptions.IgnoreCase);\n\n    public bool Validate(JsonElement payload, out IReadOnlyList<string>? errors)\n    {\n        var errorList = new List<string>();\n\n        if (!payload.TryGetProperty(\"organizerEmail\", out var organizerEmail) ||\n            organizerEmail.ValueKind != JsonValueKind.String ||\n            !EmailRegex.IsMatch(organizerEmail.GetString()!))\n        {\n            errorList.Add(\"Invalid or missing organizerEmail\");\n        }\n\n        if (!payload.TryGetProperty(\"startTimeUtc\", out var startTime) ||\n            !payload.TryGetProperty(\"endTimeUtc\", out var endTime) ||\n            startTime.ValueKind != JsonValueKind.String ||\n            endTime.ValueKind != JsonValueKind.String)\n        {\n            errorList.Add(\"Invalid or missing startTimeUtc/endTimeUtc\");\n        }\n        else\n        {\n            if (!DateTime.TryParse(startTime.GetString(), out var start))\n                errorList.Add(\"startTimeUtc cannot be parsed as DateTime\");\n\n            if (!DateTime.TryParse(endTime.GetString(), out var end))\n                errorList.Add(\"endTimeUtc cannot be parsed as DateTime\");\n            else if (end <= start)\n                errorList.Add(\"endTimeUtc must be greater than startTimeUtc\");\n        }\n\n        errors = errorList;\n        return errors.Count == 0;\n    }\n}\n\n/// <summary>\n/// Validates GitHub Actions workflow run events.\n/// </summary>\n[Source(\"github.cicd\")]\npublic sealed class GitHubCiCdValidationStrategy : IValidationStrategy\n{\n    public bool Validate(JsonElement payload, out IReadOnlyList<string>? errors)\n    {\n        var errorList = new List<string>();\n\n        if (!payload.TryGetProperty(\"repository\", out var repoProp) ||\n            repoProp.ValueKind != JsonValueKind.String ||\n            string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(repoProp.GetString()))\n        {\n            errorList.Add(\"repository must be a non-empty string\");\n        }\n\n        if (!payload.TryGetProperty(\"workflowId\", out var workflowIdProp) ||\n            workflowIdProp.ValueKind != JsonValueKind.Number ||\n            !workflowIdProp.TryGetInt32(out var workflowId) ||\n            workflowId <= 0)\n        {\n            errorList.Add(\"workflowId must be a positive integer\");\n        }\n\n        errors = errorList;\n        return errors.Count == 0;\n    }\n}\n\n// -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n//  Domain models & supporting infrastructure\n// -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/// <summary>\n/// Serializable wrapper used by various Lambdas to standardize incoming data.\n/// </summary>\n/// <param name=\"Source\">Source system identifier (e.g., \"calendar.google\").</param>\n/// <param name=\"Payload\">Raw JSON payload emitted by the source system.</param>\n/// <param name=\"IngestedAt\">UTC timestamp when the event was ingested.</param>\n/// <param name=\"CorrelationId\">Distributed trace identifier (propagated from API GW/Kinesis).</param>\npublic sealed record DataEnvelope(\n    string Source,\n    JsonElement Payload,\n    DateTimeOffset IngestedAt,\n    string CorrelationId);\n\n/// <summary>\n/// Outcome of a <see cref=\"DataQualityValidator.ValidateAsync\"/> operation.\n/// </summary>\npublic sealed record ValidationResult(\n    DataEnvelope Envelope,\n    bool IsValid,\n    IReadOnlyList<string>? Errors);\n\n/// <summary>\n/// Thrown when no <see cref=\"IValidationStrategy\"/> can be resolved for a data source.\n/// </summary>\npublic sealed class UnknownSourceException : Exception\n{\n    public UnknownSourceException(string source)\n        : base($\"Unknown data source '{source}'. No validation strategy registered.\")\n    {\n    }\n}\n\n/// <summary>\n/// Decorates a <see cref=\"IValidationStrategy\"/> implementation with its data-source identifier.\n/// </summary>\n[AttributeUsage(AttributeTargets.Class, AllowMultiple = false)]\npublic sealed class SourceAttribute : Attribute\n{\n    public string Source { get; }\n\n    public SourceAttribute(string source) => Source = source;\n}\n\n/// <summary>\n/// Shared JSON serializer options (camel-case, ignore null, etc.).\n/// </summary>\ninternal static class Serializer\n{\n    public static readonly JsonSerializerOptions Options = new()\n    {\n        PropertyNamingPolicy = JsonNamingPolicy.CamelCase,\n        WriteIndented = false,\n        DefaultIgnoreCondition = System.Text.Json.Serialization.JsonIgnoreCondition.WhenWritingNull\n    };\n}\n```",
    "filePath": "/app/project/src/module_33.txt",
    "numLines": 366,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 366
  },
  "type": "text"
}

35. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/app/project/src/module_19.txt"
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "using System;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.IO;\nusing System.Linq;\nusing System.Text.Json;\nusing System.Threading;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\nusing Amazon.Kinesis;\nusing Amazon.Kinesis.Model;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;\n\nnamespace PulseOps.Warehouse.Transformations\n{\n    #region Dispatcher\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Orchestrates run-time selection of <see cref=\"ITransformationStrategy\"/> instances and executes\n    /// them in parallel against a batch of <see cref=\"EventEnvelope\"/> messages.\n    /// </summary>\n    public sealed class TransformationDispatcher\n    {\n        private readonly IReadOnlyCollection<ITransformationStrategy> _strategies;\n        private readonly IDeadLetterSink _deadLetterSink;\n        private readonly ILogger<TransformationDispatcher> _logger;\n\n        public TransformationDispatcher(\n            IEnumerable<ITransformationStrategy> strategies,\n            IDeadLetterSink deadLetterSink,\n            ILogger<TransformationDispatcher> logger)\n        {\n            _strategies     = strategies?.ToArray() ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(strategies));\n            if (!_strategies.Any())\n            {\n                throw new ArgumentException(\"At least one transformation strategy must be registered.\", nameof(strategies));\n            }\n\n            _deadLetterSink = deadLetterSink ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(deadLetterSink));\n            _logger         = logger          ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(logger));\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Applies the matching strategy to every event in <paramref name=\"batch\"/>.  \n        /// Events that fail transformation are shunted to the configured DLQ sink.\n        /// </summary>\n        public async Task<IReadOnlyCollection<KpiRecord>> TransformBatchAsync(\n            IReadOnlyCollection<EventEnvelope> batch,\n            CancellationToken                    ct = default)\n        {\n            if (batch is null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(batch));\n\n            var output = new List<KpiRecord>(batch.Count);\n            var gate   = new object();\n\n            await Parallel.ForEachAsync(batch, ct, async (envelope, token) =>\n            {\n                try\n                {\n                    var strategy = _strategies.FirstOrDefault(s => s.CanHandle(envelope))\n                                   ?? throw new UnsupportedEventException(envelope);\n\n                    var kpi = await strategy.TransformAsync(envelope, token).ConfigureAwait(false);\n\n                    if (kpi is not null)\n                    {\n                        lock (gate) { output.Add(kpi); }\n                    }\n                }\n                catch (Exception ex)\n                {\n                    _logger.LogError(ex, \"Failed to transform event {EventId}\", envelope.Id);\n                    await _deadLetterSink.PublishAsync(envelope, ex, token).ConfigureAwait(false);\n                }\n            });\n\n            return output.AsReadOnly();\n        }\n    }\n\n    #endregion\n\n    #region Contracts & Records\n\n    /// <summary>Canonical wrapper for all inbound event messages.</summary>\n    public sealed record EventEnvelope(\n        string        Id,\n        string        EventType,\n        DateTimeOffset Timestamp,\n        JsonElement   Payload);\n\n    /// <summary>A normalized KPI record to be persisted to the warehouse.</summary>\n    public sealed record KpiRecord(\n        string                     Name,\n        double                     Value,\n        string                     Unit,\n        DateTimeOffset             Timestamp,\n        IReadOnlyDictionary<string,string> Dimensions);\n\n    /// <summary>Pluggable transformation contract.</summary>\n    public interface ITransformationStrategy\n    {\n        bool  CanHandle  (EventEnvelope envelope);\n        Task<KpiRecord?> TransformAsync(EventEnvelope envelope, CancellationToken ct);\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>Abstraction for writing failed events to a dead-letter queue.</summary>\n    public interface IDeadLetterSink\n    {\n        Task PublishAsync(EventEnvelope envelope, Exception ex, CancellationToken ct = default);\n    }\n\n    #endregion\n\n    #region DLQ Implementation\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Writes failed events to an Amazon Kinesis stream for replay or inspection.\n    /// </summary>\n    public sealed class KinesisDeadLetterSink : IDeadLetterSink\n    {\n        private const int MaxPayloadBytes = 1_000_000; // 1 MB Kinesis hard-limit (rounded down)\n\n        private readonly IAmazonKinesis               _kinesis;\n        private readonly string                       _streamName;\n        private readonly ILogger<KinesisDeadLetterSink> _logger;\n\n        public KinesisDeadLetterSink(\n            IAmazonKinesis               kinesis,\n            string                       streamName,\n            ILogger<KinesisDeadLetterSink> logger)\n        {\n            _kinesis    = kinesis                      ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(kinesis));\n            _streamName = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(streamName)\n                            ? throw new ArgumentException(\"Stream name must be supplied.\", nameof(streamName))\n                            : streamName;\n            _logger     = logger                       ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(logger));\n        }\n\n        public async Task PublishAsync(EventEnvelope envelope, Exception ex, CancellationToken ct = default)\n        {\n            var dlqPayload = new\n            {\n                envelope.Id,\n                envelope.EventType,\n                envelope.Timestamp,\n                envelope.Payload,\n                Error       = ex.ToString(),\n                PublishedAt = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow\n            };\n\n            var bytes = JsonSerializer.SerializeToUtf8Bytes(dlqPayload);\n\n            if (bytes.Length > MaxPayloadBytes)\n            {\n                _logger.LogWarning(\n                    \"DLQ payload exceeds the 1 MB limit and will be discarded. EventId={EventId}\",\n                    envelope.Id);\n                return;\n            }\n\n            var request = new PutRecordRequest\n            {\n                StreamName   = _streamName,\n                PartitionKey = envelope.Id,\n                Data         = new MemoryStream(bytes)\n            };\n\n            await _kinesis.PutRecordAsync(request, ct).ConfigureAwait(false);\n        }\n    }\n\n    #endregion\n\n    #region Strategy Implementations\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Computes the ratio of uninterrupted focus-time to total work-time\n    /// from raw calendar events.\n    /// </summary>\n    public sealed class FocusTimeStrategy : ITransformationStrategy\n    {\n        private readonly ILogger<FocusTimeStrategy> _logger;\n\n        public FocusTimeStrategy(ILogger<FocusTimeStrategy> logger) =>\n            _logger = logger ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(logger));\n\n        public bool CanHandle(EventEnvelope envelope) =>\n            string.Equals(envelope.EventType, \"calendar.event\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n\n        public Task<KpiRecord?> TransformAsync(EventEnvelope envelope, CancellationToken ct)\n        {\n            try\n            {\n                var payload = envelope.Payload;\n\n                if (!payload.TryGetProperty(\"meetingLengthMinutes\", out var meetingProp) ||\n                    !payload.TryGetProperty(\"workdayLengthMinutes\", out var workdayProp))\n                {\n                    throw new InvalidEventSchemaException(envelope.Id, \"Missing meeting/workday duration.\");\n                }\n\n                var meetingMinutes = meetingProp.GetInt32();\n                var workdayMinutes = workdayProp.GetInt32();\n\n                var ratio = (double)(workdayMinutes - meetingMinutes) / workdayMinutes;\n\n                return Task.FromResult<KpiRecord?>(new KpiRecord(\n                    Name       : \"focus_time_ratio\",\n                    Value      : Math.Round(ratio, 4),\n                    Unit       : \"ratio\",\n                    Timestamp  : envelope.Timestamp,\n                    Dimensions : new Dictionary<string, string>\n                    {\n                        [\"event_id\"] = envelope.Id\n                    }));\n            }\n            catch (Exception ex) when (ex is not InvalidEventSchemaException)\n            {\n                _logger.LogError(ex, \"FocusTime transformation failed for EventId={EventId}\", envelope.Id);\n                throw;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Calculates the monetary cost of meetings based on duration and attendee count.\n    /// </summary>\n    public sealed class MeetingCostStrategy : ITransformationStrategy\n    {\n        private readonly ILogger<MeetingCostStrategy> _logger;\n\n        // TODO: Inject via configuration / HR API lookup.\n        private const double AverageSalaryPerMinuteUsd = 1.00;\n\n        public MeetingCostStrategy(ILogger<MeetingCostStrategy> logger) =>\n            _logger = logger ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(logger));\n\n        public bool CanHandle(EventEnvelope envelope) =>\n            string.Equals(envelope.EventType, \"meeting.analytics\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n\n        public Task<KpiRecord?> TransformAsync(EventEnvelope envelope, CancellationToken ct)\n        {\n            try\n            {\n                var payload = envelope.Payload;\n\n                if (!payload.TryGetProperty(\"attendeeCount\",   out var attendeeProp) ||\n                    !payload.TryGetProperty(\"durationMinutes\", out var durationProp))\n                {\n                    throw new InvalidEventSchemaException(envelope.Id, \"Missing attendee count/duration.\");\n                }\n\n                var attendees       = attendeeProp.GetInt32();\n                var durationMinutes = durationProp.GetInt32();\n\n                var cost = attendees * durationMinutes * AverageSalaryPerMinuteUsd;\n\n                return Task.FromResult<KpiRecord?>(new KpiRecord(\n                    Name       : \"meeting_cost_usd\",\n                    Value      : cost,\n                    Unit       : \"USD\",\n                    Timestamp  : envelope.Timestamp,\n                    Dimensions : new Dictionary<string, string>\n                    {\n                        [\"attendees\"] = attendees.ToString(),\n                        [\"event_id\"]  = envelope.Id\n                    }));\n            }\n            catch (Exception ex) when (ex is not InvalidEventSchemaException)\n            {\n                _logger.LogError(ex, \"MeetingCost transformation failed for EventId={EventId}\", envelope.Id);\n                throw;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    #endregion\n\n    #region Exceptions\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Thrown when no strategy claims responsibility for a given event.\n    /// </summary>\n    public sealed class UnsupportedEventException : Exception\n    {\n        public EventEnvelope Envelope { get; }\n\n        public UnsupportedEventException(EventEnvelope envelope)\n            : base($\"No transformation strategy registered for eventType '{envelope.EventType}'.\")\n        {\n            Envelope = envelope;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Raised when an event payload violates its expected contract.\n    /// </summary>\n    public sealed class InvalidEventSchemaException : Exception\n    {\n        public string EventId { get; }\n\n        public InvalidEventSchemaException(string eventId, string details)\n            : base($\"Event '{eventId}' has an invalid schema: {details}\")\n        {\n            EventId = eventId;\n        }\n    }\n\n    #endregion\n}",

    "startLine": 1,

  },

  "file": {
    "content": "using System;\nusing System.Collections.Concurrent;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.IO;\nusing System.Text;\nusing System.Text.Json;\nusing System.Threading;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\nusing Amazon.Kinesis;\nusing Amazon.Kinesis.Model;\nusing Amazon.Lambda.Core;\nusing Amazon.Lambda.KinesisEvents;\nusing Amazon.S3;\nusing Amazon.S3.Transfer;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;\n\n// Assembly attribute to enable the Lambda function's JSON input to be converted into a .NET class.\n[assembly: LambdaSerializer(typeof(Amazon.Lambda.Serialization.SystemTextJson.DefaultLambdaJsonSerializer))]\n\nnamespace PulseOps.Warehouse.Serverless.Transformations\n{\n    /// <summary>\n    ///     Lambda entry point that consumes raw analytics events from a Kinesis Data Stream,\n    ///     invokes the appropriate transformation strategy, and finally persists the enriched\n    ///     event to S3 and/or downstream Kinesis streams.\n    /// </summary>\n    public sealed class TransformationLambda\n    {\n        private const string DefaultBucketEnvVar = \"TRANSFORMED_BUCKET\";\n        private const string OutputStreamEnvVar = \"OUTPUT_STREAM\";\n\n        private readonly IServiceProvider _serviceProvider;\n        private readonly ITransformationDispatcher _dispatcher;\n        private readonly IAmazonS3 _s3Client;\n        private readonly IAmazonKinesis _kinesisClient;\n        private readonly ILogger<TransformationLambda> _logger;\n\n        public TransformationLambda()\n            : this(ConfigureServices())\n        {\n        }\n\n        // For unit tests\n        public TransformationLambda(IServiceProvider serviceProvider)\n        {\n            _serviceProvider = serviceProvider;\n            _dispatcher      = _serviceProvider.GetRequiredService<ITransformationDispatcher>();\n            _s3Client        = _serviceProvider.GetRequiredService<IAmazonS3>();\n            _kinesisClient   = _serviceProvider.GetRequiredService<IAmazonKinesis>();\n            _logger          = _serviceProvider.GetRequiredService<ILogger<TransformationLambda>>();\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        ///     Lambda handler for Kinesis events.\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"kinesisEvent\">Kinesis batch</param>\n        /// <param name=\"context\">Lambda context</param>\n        /// <returns>Task</returns>\n        public async Task HandleAsync(KinesisEvent kinesisEvent, ILambdaContext context)\n        {\n            _logger.LogInformation(\"Received {RecordCount} records in batch {RequestId}\", \n                kinesisEvent.Records.Count, context.AwsRequestId);\n\n            var uploadTasks = new List<Task>();\n\n            foreach (var record in kinesisEvent.Records)\n            {\n                uploadTasks.Add(ProcessRecordAsync(record, context));\n            }\n\n            await Task.WhenAll(uploadTasks).ConfigureAwait(false);\n            _logger.LogInformation(\"Successfully processed batch {RequestId}\", context.AwsRequestId);\n        }\n\n        private async Task ProcessRecordAsync(KinesisEvent.KinesisEventRecord record, ILambdaContext context)\n        {\n            CancellationToken token = context.CancellationToken;\n\n            if (token.IsCancellationRequested)\n            {\n                _logger.LogWarning(\"Cancellation requested before processing record\");\n                return;\n            }\n\n            RawEvent raw;\n            try\n            {\n                var payloadJson = Encoding.UTF8.GetString(record.Kinesis.Data.Span);\n                raw = JsonSerializer.Deserialize<RawEvent>(payloadJson, JsonOptions.Options)\n                      ?? throw new InvalidDataException(\"Unable to deserialize event.\");\n            }\n            catch (Exception ex)\n            {\n                _logger.LogError(ex, \"Failed to deserialize record; pushing to DLQ\");\n                await PushToDlqAsync(record).ConfigureAwait(false);\n                return;\n            }\n\n            try\n            {\n                var transformed = await _dispatcher.TransformAsync(raw, token).ConfigureAwait(false);\n                await PersistAsync(transformed, token).ConfigureAwait(false);\n            }\n            catch (TransformationNotFoundException ex)\n            {\n                _logger.LogWarning(ex, \"No transformation found for EventType={EventType}\", raw.EventType);\n                await PushToDlqAsync(record).ConfigureAwait(false);\n            }\n            catch (Exception ex)\n            {\n                _logger.LogError(ex, \"Unhandled error while processing record\");\n                await PushToDlqAsync(record).ConfigureAwait(false);\n            }\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Persist the transformed event to S3 (parquet or json) and optionally fan out to a downstream Kinesis stream.\n        /// </summary>\n        private async Task PersistAsync(TransformedEvent evt, CancellationToken token)\n        {\n            var bucket = Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable(DefaultBucketEnvVar) \n                         ?? throw new InvalidOperationException($\"{DefaultBucketEnvVar} not configured\");\n\n            var key = $\"{evt.EventType}/{evt.OccurredAt:yyyy/MM/dd/HH}/{Guid.NewGuid():N}.json\";\n\n            var json = JsonSerializer.Serialize(evt, JsonOptions.Options);\n\n            await using var memStream = new MemoryStream(Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(json));\n\n            var uploadRequest = new TransferUtilityUploadRequest\n            {\n                BucketName  = bucket,\n                Key         = key,\n                InputStream = memStream,\n                ContentType = \"application/json\"\n            };\n\n            var transfer = new TransferUtility(_s3Client);\n            await transfer.UploadAsync(uploadRequest, token).ConfigureAwait(false);\n            _logger.LogDebug(\"Written transformed event to s3://{Bucket}/{Key}\", bucket, key);\n\n            var outputStream = Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable(OutputStreamEnvVar);\n            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(outputStream))\n            {\n                await _kinesisClient.PutRecordAsync(new PutRecordRequest\n                {\n                    StreamName   = outputStream,\n                    Data         = memStream,\n                    PartitionKey = evt.TenantId\n                }, token).ConfigureAwait(false);\n                _logger.LogDebug(\"Pushed transformed event to Kinesis stream {Stream}\", outputStream);\n            }\n        }\n\n        private Task PushToDlqAsync(KinesisEvent.KinesisEventRecord record)\n        {\n            // For brevity, we omit DLQ implementation details.\n            // In production, this would push to an SQS queue or SNS topic.\n            _logger.LogWarning(\"DLQ push simulated for SequenceNumber={Seq}\", record.Kinesis.SequenceNumber);\n            return Task.CompletedTask;\n        }\n\n        #region IoC Setup\n\n        private static IServiceProvider ConfigureServices()\n        {\n            var services = new ServiceCollection();\n            services.AddLogging(builder =>\n            {\n                builder\n                    .AddLambdaLogger()\n                    .SetMinimumLevel(LogLevel.Information);\n            });\n\n            services.AddAWSService<IAmazonS3>();\n            services.AddAWSService<IAmazonKinesis>();\n\n            services.AddSingleton<ITransformationDispatcher, TransformationDispatcher>();\n            \n            // Register transformation strategies\n            services.AddSingleton<ITransformationStrategy, FocusTimeStrategy>();\n            services.AddSingleton<ITransformationStrategy, DeploymentLeadTimeStrategy>();\n            services.AddSingleton<ITransformationStrategy, MeetingCostStrategy>();\n\n            return services.BuildServiceProvider();\n        }\n\n        #endregion\n    }\n\n    #region Models\n\n    internal sealed record RawEvent\n    {\n        public string  TenantId   { get; init; } = null!;\n        public string  EventType  { get; init; } = null!;\n        public DateTimeOffset OccurredAt { get; init; }\n        public JsonElement Payload { get; init; }\n    }\n\n    internal sealed record TransformedEvent\n    {\n        public string TenantId { get; init; } = null!;\n        public string EventType { get; init; } = null!;\n        public DateTimeOffset OccurredAt { get; init; }\n        public IDictionary<string, object?> Metrics { get; init; } = new Dictionary<string, object?>();\n        public string Version { get; init; } = \"1.0\";\n    }\n\n    #endregion\n\n    #region Dispatcher and Strategies\n\n    /// <summary>\n    ///     Exception thrown when no transformation strategy exists for a given event type.\n    /// </summary>\n    public sealed class TransformationNotFoundException : Exception\n    {\n        public TransformationNotFoundException(string eventType)\n            : base($\"No transformation registered for event type '{eventType}'\")\n        {\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    ///     Observer/Strategy bridge that routes RawEvent objects to the correct transformation strategy.\n    /// </summary>\n    public interface ITransformationDispatcher\n    {\n        Task<TransformedEvent> TransformAsync(RawEvent raw, CancellationToken token);\n    }\n\n    internal sealed class TransformationDispatcher : ITransformationDispatcher\n    {\n        private readonly IDictionary<string, ITransformationStrategy> _strategyMap;\n        private readonly ILogger<TransformationDispatcher> _logger;\n\n        public TransformationDispatcher(IEnumerable<ITransformationStrategy> strategies,\n                                        ILogger<TransformationDispatcher> logger)\n        {\n            _logger = logger;\n            _strategyMap = new ConcurrentDictionary<string, ITransformationStrategy>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n\n            foreach (var strategy in strategies)\n            {\n                if (_strategyMap.ContainsKey(strategy.EventType))\n                {\n                    _logger.LogWarning(\"Duplicate strategy registration for EventType={EventType}\", strategy.EventType);\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                _strategyMap[strategy.EventType] = strategy;\n            }\n        }\n\n        public Task<TransformedEvent> TransformAsync(RawEvent raw, CancellationToken token)\n        {\n            if (!_strategyMap.TryGetValue(raw.EventType, out var strategy))\n            {\n                throw new TransformationNotFoundException(raw.EventType);\n            }\n\n            return strategy.TransformAsync(raw, token);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    ///     Implemented by classes that convert RawEvent payloads into structured\n    ///     KPI-friendly metrics or aggregations.\n    /// </summary>\n    public interface ITransformationStrategy\n    {\n        string EventType { get; }\n        Task<TransformedEvent> TransformAsync(RawEvent raw, CancellationToken token);\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    ///     Calculates developer focus time ratio from IDE/coding session events.\n    /// </summary>\n    internal sealed class FocusTimeStrategy : ITransformationStrategy\n    {\n        private const string MetricName = \"focus_time_minutes\";\n\n        public string EventType => \"IDE_SESSION\";\n\n        public Task<TransformedEvent> TransformAsync(RawEvent raw, CancellationToken token)\n        {\n            // Example transformation: extract \"activeMinutes\" from payload.\n            if (!raw.Payload.TryGetProperty(\"activeMinutes\", out var activeMinutesElement) ||\n                !activeMinutesElement.TryGetInt32(out var activeMinutes))\n            {\n                throw new InvalidDataException(\"Missing activeMinutes in payload\");\n            }\n\n            var transformed = new TransformedEvent\n            {\n                TenantId   = raw.TenantId,\n                EventType  = \"FOCUS_TIME\",\n                OccurredAt = raw.OccurredAt,\n                Metrics    = new Dictionary<string, object?>\n                {\n                    [MetricName] = activeMinutes\n                }\n            };\n\n            return Task.FromResult(transformed);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    ///     Computes deployment lead time from CI/CD pipeline events.\n    /// </summary>\n    internal sealed class DeploymentLeadTimeStrategy : ITransformationStrategy\n    {\n        private const string MetricName = \"deployment_lead_time_seconds\";\n\n        public string EventType => \"CI_PIPELINE_COMPLETED\";\n\n        public Task<TransformedEvent> TransformAsync(RawEvent raw, CancellationToken token)\n        {\n            var startedAt  = raw.Payload.GetProperty(\"pipelineStartedAt\").GetDateTimeOffset();\n            var finishedAt = raw.Payload.GetProperty(\"pipelineFinishedAt\").GetDateTimeOffset();\n            var duration   = (finishedAt - startedAt).TotalSeconds;\n\n            var transformed = new TransformedEvent\n            {\n                TenantId   = raw.TenantId,\n                EventType  = \"DEPLOYMENT_LEAD_TIME\",\n                OccurredAt = raw.OccurredAt,\n                Metrics    = new Dictionary<string, object?>\n                {\n                    [MetricName] = duration\n                }\n            };\n\n            return Task.FromResult(transformed);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    ///     Calculates estimated meeting cost from calendar events.\n    /// </summary>\n    internal sealed class MeetingCostStrategy : ITransformationStrategy\n    {\n        private const string MetricName = \"meeting_cost_usd\";\n        private const decimal HourlyCostDefault = 75m;\n\n        public string EventType => \"CALENDAR_MEETING\";\n\n        public Task<TransformedEvent> TransformAsync(RawEvent raw, CancellationToken token)\n        {\n            int attendeeCount = raw.Payload.GetProperty(\"attendeeCount\").GetInt32();\n            decimal hourlyRate = raw.Payload.TryGetProperty(\"hourlyRateUsd\", out var rateElement) &&\n                                 rateElement.TryGetDecimal(out var rate)\n                                 ? rate\n                                 : HourlyCostDefault;\n\n            var durationMinutes = raw.Payload.GetProperty(\"durationMinutes\").GetInt32();\n            var cost = attendeeCount * hourlyRate * (durationMinutes / 60m);\n\n            var transformed = new TransformedEvent\n            {\n                TenantId   = raw.TenantId,\n                EventType  = \"MEETING_COST\",\n                OccurredAt = raw.OccurredAt,\n                Metrics    = new Dictionary<string, object?>\n                {\n                    [MetricName] = Math.Round(cost, 2)\n                }\n            };\n\n            return Task.FromResult(transformed);\n        }\n    }\n\n    #endregion\n\n    #region Utilities\n\n    internal static class JsonOptions\n    {\n        public static readonly JsonSerializerOptions Options = new()\n        {\n            PropertyNameCaseInsensitive = true,\n            PropertyNamingPolicy        = JsonNamingPolicy.CamelCase,\n            WriteIndented               = false\n        };\n    }\n\n    #endregion\n}",

  "file": {
    "content": "```csharp\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// <copyright>\n//   PulseOps Warehouse \u2014 Serverless Productivity Intelligence Fabric\n//   \u00a9 2023\u20132024 PulseOps, Inc.  All rights reserved.\n// </copyright>\n// <summary>\n//   KpiTransformerFunction.cs\n//\n//   Lambda entry-point that consumes calendar-centric productivity telemetry from\n//   an upstream Kinesis stream, transforms the payloads into actionable KPIs via\n//   pluggable Strategy Pattern, and emits the resulting artifacts into Amazon\n//   Kinesis Data Firehose for durable storage inside the corporate Data Lake.\n//\n//   This module purposefully stands alone (no internal project references) so\n//   that it can be executed in isolation for documentation/demo purposes.\n// </summary>\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nusing System;\nusing System.Buffers;\nusing System.Collections.Concurrent;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.IO;\nusing System.Text;\nusing System.Text.Json;\nusing System.Threading;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\nusing Amazon;\nusing Amazon.KinesisFirehose;\nusing Amazon.KinesisFirehose.Model;\nusing Amazon.Lambda.Core;\nusing Amazon.Lambda.KinesisEvents;\n\n// ReSharper disable HeuristicUnreachableCode\n// ReSharper disable TemplateIsNotCompileTimeConstantProblem\n\n[assembly: LambdaSerializer(typeof(Amazon.Lambda.Serialization.SystemTextJson.DefaultLambdaJsonSerializer))]\n\nnamespace PulseOps.Warehouse.EventTransformations;\n\n/// <summary>\n///     AWS Lambda entry-point that ingests calendar/KPI telemetry from a Kinesis\n///     stream, dispatches each record to a KPI strategy, and writes the\n///     calculated result to Kinesis Data Firehose.\n/// </summary>\npublic sealed class KpiTransformerFunction\n{\n    private readonly KpiStrategyResolver _strategyResolver;\n    private readonly IAmazonKinesisFirehose _firehoseClient;\n    private readonly string _outputStreamName;\n    private readonly string _errorStreamName;\n    private const int FirehosePutRecordBatchLimit = 500;\n\n    public KpiTransformerFunction()\n        : this(\n            firehoseClient: new AmazonKinesisFirehoseClient(\n                new AmazonKinesisFirehoseConfig { RegionEndpoint = RegionEndpoint.GetBySystemName(Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable(\"AWS_REGION\") ?? \"us-east-1\") }\n            ),\n            new KpiStrategyResolver()\n        )\n    {\n        /* no-op \u2014 delegates to overload */\n    }\n\n    // For unit-tests + DI\n    internal KpiTransformerFunction(IAmazonKinesisFirehose firehoseClient, KpiStrategyResolver strategyResolver)\n    {\n        _firehoseClient = firehoseClient ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(firehoseClient));\n        _strategyResolver = strategyResolver ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(strategyResolver));\n\n        _outputStreamName = Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable(\"FIREHOSE_STREAM_NAME\") ??\n                            throw new InvalidOperationException(\"FIREHOSE_STREAM_NAME env-var must be defined.\");\n\n        _errorStreamName = Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable(\"FIREHOSE_ERROR_STREAM_NAME\") ??\n                           $\"{_outputStreamName}-dlq\"; // fallback\n    }\n\n    /// <summary>\n    ///     Lambda handler invoked by AWS runtime.\n    /// </summary>\n    /// <param name=\"kinesisEvent\">Batch of Kinesis records.</param>\n    /// <param name=\"context\">Execution context.</param>\n    /// <returns>Async task.</returns>\n    public async Task HandlerAsync(KinesisEvent kinesisEvent, ILambdaContext context)\n    {\n        var logger = context.Logger;\n\n        var successes = new ConcurrentBag<Record>();\n        var failures  = new ConcurrentBag<Record>();\n\n        var processTasks = new List<Task>();\n\n        foreach (var record in kinesisEvent.Records)\n        {\n            processTasks.Add(ProcessRecordAsync(record, successes, failures, logger, context.CancellationToken));\n        }\n\n        await Task.WhenAll(processTasks);\n\n        // Flush successes first\n        if (!successes.IsEmpty)\n        {\n            await FlushBatchAsync(successes, _outputStreamName, logger, context.CancellationToken);\n            logger.LogInformation($\"Successfully processed {successes.Count} KPI records.\");\n        }\n\n        // Flush failures to dedicated DLQ Firehose stream\n        if (!failures.IsEmpty)\n        {\n            await FlushBatchAsync(failures, _errorStreamName, logger, context.CancellationToken);\n            logger.LogError($\"{failures.Count} records failed KPI transformation and were sent to DLQ '{_errorStreamName}'.\");\n        }\n    }\n\n    #region \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 Private helpers \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n    private async Task ProcessRecordAsync(\n        KinesisEvent.KinesisEventRecord kinesisRecord,\n        ConcurrentBag<Record> successBag,\n        ConcurrentBag<Record> failureBag,\n        ILambdaLogger logger,\n        CancellationToken cancellationToken)\n    {\n        try\n        {\n            var rawJson = Encoding.UTF8.GetString(kinesisRecord.Kinesis.Data.Span);\n\n            using var jsonDoc = JsonDocument.Parse(rawJson);\n            var root = jsonDoc.RootElement;\n\n            var kpiType = root.GetProperty(\"kpiType\").GetString();\n            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(kpiType))\n            {\n                throw new JsonException(\"kpiType property missing or empty.\");\n            }\n\n            var strategy = _strategyResolver.Resolve(kpiType);\n            if (strategy is null)\n            {\n                throw new InvalidOperationException($\"No strategy registered that can handle KPI type '{kpiType}'.\");\n            }\n\n            var result = await strategy.CalculateAsync(root.GetProperty(\"data\"), cancellationToken);\n\n            var resultJson = JsonSerializer.Serialize(result, KpiJsonSerializerContext.Default.KpiResult);\n\n            successBag.Add(new Record\n            {\n                Data = new MemoryStream(Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(resultJson))\n            });\n        }\n        catch (Exception ex)\n        {\n            logger.LogError(ex, $\"Failed to transform event {kinesisRecord.EventId}.\");\n\n            var errorPayload = new\n            {\n                error     = ex.Message,\n                stack     = ex.StackTrace,\n                timestamp = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow,\n                original  = Convert.ToBase64String(kinesisRecord.Kinesis.Data.ToArray())\n            };\n\n            var errorJson = JsonSerializer.Serialize(errorPayload);\n            failureBag.Add(new Record\n            {\n                Data = new MemoryStream(Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(errorJson))\n            });\n        }\n    }\n\n    private async Task FlushBatchAsync(IEnumerable<Record> records, string deliveryStreamName, ILambdaLogger logger, CancellationToken token)\n    {\n        var batch = new List<Record>(FirehosePutRecordBatchLimit);\n\n        foreach (var rec in records)\n        {\n            batch.Add(rec);\n\n            if (batch.Count == FirehosePutRecordBatchLimit)\n            {\n                await PutAsync(batch, deliveryStreamName, logger, token);\n                batch.Clear();\n            }\n        }\n\n        if (batch.Count > 0)\n        {\n            await PutAsync(batch, deliveryStreamName, logger, token);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private async Task PutAsync(IReadOnlyCollection<Record> batch, string streamName, ILambdaLogger logger, CancellationToken token)\n    {\n        var response = await _firehoseClient.PutRecordBatchAsync(\n            new PutRecordBatchRequest(streamName, new List<Record>(batch)),\n            token\n        );\n\n        if (response.FailedPutCount > 0)\n        {\n            logger.LogError($\"Firehose PutRecordBatchAsync reported {response.FailedPutCount} failures for stream {streamName}.\");\n        }\n    }\n\n    #endregion\n}\n\n/// <summary>\n///     Pluggable KPI strategy abstraction.\n/// </summary>\ninternal interface IKpiStrategy\n{\n    bool CanHandle(string kpiType);\n\n    /// <summary>\n    ///     Calculates KPI result for the supplied JSON payload. Implementations\n    ///     must remain pure \u2014 no side-effects or network traffic.\n    /// </summary>\n    Task<KpiResult> CalculateAsync(JsonElement data, CancellationToken token);\n}\n\n/// <summary>\n///     Strategy resolver with O(1) lookups.\n/// </summary>\ninternal sealed class KpiStrategyResolver\n{\n    private readonly IReadOnlyList<IKpiStrategy> _strategies;\n\n    public KpiStrategyResolver()\n    {\n        _strategies = new IKpiStrategy[]\n        {\n            new FocusTimeRatioStrategy(),\n            new MeetingCostIndexStrategy()\n        };\n    }\n\n    public IKpiStrategy? Resolve(string kpiType)\n    {\n        foreach (var strategy in _strategies)\n        {\n            if (strategy.CanHandle(kpiType))\n            {\n                return strategy;\n            }\n        }\n\n        return null;\n    }\n}\n\n/// <summary>\n///     Result record produced by KPI strategies.\n/// </summary>\npublic sealed record KpiResult(\n    string KpiType,\n    double Value,\n    DateTimeOffset CalculatedAtUtc,\n    JsonElement Metadata\n);\n\n#region \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 Strategy Implementations \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n/// <summary>\n///     Calculates \u201cFocus-Time Ratio\u201d per event as\n///     1 \u2212 (meetingDuration / workingWindowDuration).  For example, a 1-hour\n///     meeting inside an 8-hour day yields 0.875.\n/// </summary>\ninternal sealed class FocusTimeRatioStrategy : IKpiStrategy\n{\n    private const string KpiId = \"FocusTimeRatio\";\n\n    public bool CanHandle(string kpiType) => string.Equals(kpiType, KpiId, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n\n    public Task<KpiResult> CalculateAsync(JsonElement data, CancellationToken token)\n    {\n        var meetingStart = data.GetProperty(\"startTime\").GetDateTimeOffset();\n        var meetingEnd   = data.GetProperty(\"endTime\").GetDateTimeOffset();\n        var workingWindowMinutes = data.TryGetProperty(\"workingWindowMinutes\", out var windowElement)\n            ? windowElement.GetInt32()\n            : 480; // default 8-hour work-day\n\n        var meetingMinutes = (meetingEnd - meetingStart).TotalMinutes;\n        var ratio          = 1 - (meetingMinutes / workingWindowMinutes);\n\n        ratio = Math.Clamp(ratio, 0, 1);\n\n        return Task.FromResult(new KpiResult(\n            KpiType: KpiId,\n            Value: ratio,\n            CalculatedAtUtc: DateTimeOffset.UtcNow,\n            Metadata: data\n        ));\n    }\n}\n\n/// <summary>\n///     Calculates \u201cMeeting Cost Index\u201d as (# attendees \u00d7 durationHours \u00d7 hourlyRate).\n/// </summary>\ninternal sealed class MeetingCostIndexStrategy : IKpiStrategy\n{\n    private const string KpiId = \"MeetingCostIndex\";\n\n    public bool CanHandle(string kpiType) => string.Equals(kpiType, KpiId, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n\n    public Task<KpiResult> CalculateAsync(JsonElement data, CancellationToken token)\n    {\n        var attendees     = data.GetProperty(\"attendeesCount\").GetInt32();\n        var hourlyRate    = data.TryGetProperty(\"hourlyRate\",   out var rateEl) ? rateEl.GetDouble() : 75.0;\n        var start         = data.GetProperty(\"startTime\").GetDateTimeOffset();\n        var end           = data.GetProperty(\"endTime\").GetDateTimeOffset();\n        var durationHours = (end - start).TotalHours;\n\n        var cost = attendees * durationHours * hourlyRate;\n\n        return Task.FromResult(new KpiResult(\n            KpiType: KpiId,\n            Value: cost,\n            CalculatedAtUtc: DateTimeOffset.UtcNow,\n            Metadata: data\n        ));\n    }\n}\n\n#endregion\n\n#region \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 Source-Gen Context \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n// System.Text.Json source-generator to reduce cold-start overhead.\n[JsonSerializable(typeof(KpiResult))]\n[JsonSourceGenerationOptions(WriteIndented = false)]\ninternal partial class KpiJsonSerializerContext : JsonSerializerContext\n{\n    // Intentionally left blank; the partial modifier lets source-gen do the rest.\n}\n\n#endregion\n\n#region \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 Extensions \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\ninternal static class LambdaLoggerExtensions\n{\n    public static void LogError(this ILambdaLogger logger, Exception ex, string message)\n    {\n        logger.LogError($\"{message}{Environment.NewLine}{ex}\");\n    }\n\n    public static void LogError(this ILambdaLogger logger, string message) => logger.Log($\"[ERROR] {message}{Environment.NewLine}\");\n    public static void LogInformation(this ILambdaLogger logger, string message) => logger.Log($\"[INFO] {message}{Environment.NewLine}\");\n}\n\n#endregion\n```",

Stopwatch.StartNew();\n/app/project/src/module_39.txt-198-\n/app/project/src/module_39.txt-199-            // Run transformations concurrently but keep within sane parallelism to protect lambda memory\n/app/project/src/module_39.txt:200:            await Parallel.ForEachAsync(events, new ParallelOptions\n/app/project/src/module_39.txt-201-            {\n/app/project/src/module_39.txt-202-
