string Version { get; }\n    76\u2192    }\n    77\u2192\n    78\u2192    /// <summary>\n    79\u2192    /// Bag-object holding request-scoped services, metadata and DI.\n    80\u2192    /// Instances are short-lived and safe for concurrent use.\n    81\u2192    /// </summary>\n    82\u2192    public sealed class TransformationContext\n    83\u2192    {\n    84\u2192        public TransformationContext(\n    85\u2192            Guid requestId,\n    86\u2192            string tenantId,\n    87\u2192            ILogger? logger           = null,\n    88\u2192            IAmazonCloudWatch? cw     = null,\n    89\u2192            IDictionary<string, object>? items = null)\n    90\u2192        {\n    91\u2192            RequestId = requestId;\n    92\u2192            TenantId  = tenantId;\n    93\u2192            Logger    = logger ?? NullLogger.Instance;\n    94\u2192            CloudWatchClient = cw;\n    95\u2192            Items     = new ConcurrentDictionary<string, object>(\n    96\u2192                items ?? new Dictionary<string, object>());\n    97\u2192        }\n    98\u2192\n    99\u2192        public Guid RequestId { get; }\n   100\u2192        public string TenantId { get; }\n   101\u2192        public ILogger Logger { get; }\n   102\u2192        public IAmazonCloudWatch? CloudWatchClient { get; }\n   103\u2192        public ConcurrentDictionary<string, object> Items { get; }\n   104\u2192\n   105\u2192        public T GetOrAdd<T>(string key, Func<string, T> factory) =>\n   106\u2192            (T) Items.GetOrAdd(key, k => factory(k));\n   107\u2192    }\n   108\u2192\n   109\u2192    #endregion\n   110\u2192\n   111\u2192    #region \u2014\u2014\u2014 Registry & Discovery \u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\n   112\u2192\n   113\u2192    /// <summary>\n   114\u2192    /// Discovers and caches all <see cref=\"ITransformationStrategy{TIn,TOut}\"/>\n   115\u2192    /// implementations at runtime using reflection. Thread-safe singleton.\n   116\u2192    /// </summary>\n   117\u2192    public sealed class StrategyRegistry\n   118\u2192    {\n   119\u2192        private static readonly Lazy<StrategyRegistry> _lazy =\n   120\u2192            new(() => new StrategyRegistry());\n   121\u2192\n   122\u2192        public static StrategyRegistry Instance => _lazy.Value;\n   123\u2192\n   124\u2192        private readonly ConcurrentDictionary<string, Type> _strategies = new();\n   125\u2192        private readonly ILogger _logger;\n   126\u2192\n   127\u2192        private StrategyRegistry(ILogger? logger = null)\n   128\u2192        {\n   129\u2192            _logger = logger ?? NullLogger.Instance;\n   130\u2192\n   131\u2192            // Scan the current AppDomain once. Subsequent loads (Lambda cold-start)\n   132\u2192            // are negligible.\n   133\u2192            foreach (Assembly assembly in AppDomain.CurrentDomain.GetAssemblies())\n   134\u2192            {\n   135\u2192                try\n   136\u2192                {\n   137\u2192                    LoadStrategiesFromAssembly(assembly);\n   138\u2192                }\n   139\u2192                catch (ReflectionTypeLoadException e)\n   140\u2192                {\n   141\u2192                    _logger.LogWarning(\n   142\u2192                        e,\n   143\u2192                        \"Failed to reflectively load strategy types from assembly {Assembly}. \" +\n   144\u2192                        \"Loader exceptions: {LoaderExceptions}\",\n   145\u2192                        assembly.FullName,\n   146\u2192                        string.Join(\"; \",\n   147\u2192                            e.LoaderExceptions.Select(le => le.Message)));\n   148\u2192                }\n   149\u2192            }\n   150\u2192\n   151\u2192            _logger.LogInformation(\n   152\u2192                \"StrategyRegistry initialized with {Count} strategies.\",\n   153\u2192                _strategies.Count);\n   154\u2192        }\n   155\u2192\n   156\u2192        public bool TryResolve(string name, out Type strategyType) =>\n   157\u2192            _strategies.TryGetValue(name, out strategyType);\n   158\u2192\n   159\u2192        private void LoadStrategiesFromAssembly(Assembly assembly)\n   160\u2192        {\n   161\u2192            foreach (Type type in assembly.GetTypes())\n   162\u2192            {\n   163\u2192                if (type.IsAbstract || type.IsInterface) continue;\n   164\u2192\n   165\u2192                var strategyAttr = type.GetCustomAttribute<TransformationStrategyAttribute>();\n   166\u2192                if (strategyAttr == null) continue;\n   167\u2192\n   168\u2192                // Only consider generic type definitions ITransformationStrategy<,>.\n   169\u2192                bool implementsInterface = type\n   170\u2192                    .GetInterfaces()\n   171\u2192                    .Any(i =>\n   172\u2192                        i.IsGenericType &&\n   173\u2192                        i.GetGenericTypeDefinition() == typeof(ITransformationStrategy<,>));\n   174\u2192\n   175\u2192                if (!implementsInterface)\n   176\u2192                {\n   177\u2192                    _logger.LogWarning(\n   178\u2192                        \"Type {Type} is decorated with {Attribute} but does not implement \" +\n   179\u2192                        \"the required ITransformationStrategy<,> contract. Skipped.\",\n   180\u2192                        type.FullName,\n   181\u2192                        nameof(TransformationStrategyAttribute));\n   182\u2192                    continue;\n   183\u2192                }\n   184\u2192\n   185\u2192                string key = BuildKey(strategyAttr.Name, strategyAttr.Version);\n   186\u2192                if (!_strategies.TryAdd(key, type))\n   187\u2192                {\n   188\u2192                    _logger.LogWarning(\n   189\u2192                        \"Duplicate strategy registration detected for key '{Key}'. \" +\n   190\u2192                        \"Type {Type} ignored (existing: {Existing}).\",\n   191\u2192                        key,\n   192\u2192                        type.FullName,\n   193\u2192                        _strategies[key].FullName);\n   194\u2192                }\n   195\u2192            }\n   196\u2192        }\n   197\u2192\n   198\u2192        private static string BuildKey(string name, string version) => $\"{name}:{version}\";\n   199\u2192    }\n   200\u2192\n   201\u2192    #endregion\n   202\u2192\n   203\u2192    #region \u2014\u2014\u2014 Executor / Orchestration \u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\n   204\u2192\n   205\u2192    /// <summary>\n   206\u2192    /// Convenience wrapper around <see cref=\"StrategyRegistry\"/> that handles:\n   207\u2192    ///   \u2022 DI-friendly construction\n   208\u2192    ///   \u2022 Concurrency throttling (fan-out)\n   209\u2192    ///   \u2022 Structured logging & CloudWatch custom metrics\n   210\u2192    ///   \u2022 Graceful error propagation (fault-tolerant)\n   211\u2192    /// </summary>\n   212\u2192    public sealed class TransformationExecutor\n   213\u2192    {\n   214\u2192        private readonly ILogger _logger;\n   215\u2192        private readonly int _maxDegreeOfParallelism;\n   216\u2192        private readonly IServiceProvider? _serviceProvider;\n   217\u2192\n   218\u2192        public TransformationExecutor(\n   219\u2192            ILogger? logger = null,\n   220\u2192            int maxDegreeOfParallelism = 4,\n   221\u2192            IServiceProvider? serviceProvider = null)\n   222\u2192        {\n   223\u2192            _logger = logger ?? NullLogger.Instance;\n   224\u2192            _maxDegreeOfParallelism = Math.Max(1, maxDegreeOfParallelism);\n   225\u2192            _serviceProvider = serviceProvider;\n   226\u2192        }\n   227\u2192\n   228\u2192        /// <summary>\n   229\u2192        /// High-level entrypoint used by Lambda handlers and Step-Function tasks.\n   230\u2192        /// </summary>\n   231\u2192        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<object>> ExecuteAsync(\n   232\u2192            string strategyName,\n   233\u2192            string strategyVersion,\n   234\u2192            IAsyncEnumerable<object> stream,\n   235\u2192            TransformationContext context,\n   236\u2192            CancellationToken token = default)\n   237\u2192        {\n   238\u2192            var sw = Stopwatch.StartNew();\n   239\u2192            string key = $\"{strategyName}:{strategyVersion}\";\n   240\u2192\n   241\u2192            if (!StrategyRegistry.Instance.TryResolve(key, out Type strategyType))\n   242\u2192            {\n   243\u2192                throw new InvalidOperationException(\n   244\u2192                    $\"Strategy '{key}' is not registered. \" +\n   245\u2192                    \"Ensure the assembly containing the strategy is loaded.\");\n   246\u2192            }\n   247\u2192\n   248\u2192            // Build the strategy instance via DI or reflection fallback.\n   249\u2192            object? instance = _serviceProvider?.GetService(strategyType)\n   250\u2192                               ?? Activator.CreateInstance(strategyType);\n   251\u2192            if (instance is null)\n   252\u2192                throw new InvalidOperationException(\n   253\u2192                    $\"Failed to instantiate strategy '{key}'. \" +\n   254\u2192                    \"Make sure it has a public parameterless constructor or is registered in DI.\");\n   255\u2192\n   256\u2192            // Generic variance gymnastics: use reflection to call TransformAsync and materialize.\n   257\u2192            MethodInfo? transformMethod = strategyType\n   258\u2192                .GetMethod(nameof(ITransformationStrategy<object, object>.TransformAsync));\n   259\u2192            if (transformMethod is null)\n   260\u2192                throw new MissingMethodException(strategyType.FullName,\n   261\u2192                    nameof(ITransformationStrategy<object, object>.TransformAsync));\n   262\u2192\n   263\u2192            _logger.LogInformation(\n   264\u2192                \"[{RequestId}] Executing strategy {Strategy} for tenant {Tenant}.\",\n   265\u2192                context.RequestId,\n   266\u2192                key,\n   267\u2192                context.TenantId);\n   268\u2192\n   269\u2192            CancellationTokenSource linkedCts = CancellationTokenSource\n   270\u2192                .CreateLinkedTokenSource(token);\n   271\u2192\n   272\u2192            try\n   273\u2192            {\n   274\u2192                var resultStream = (IAsyncEnumerable<object>) transformMethod\n   275\u2192                    .Invoke(instance, new object[] { stream, context, linkedCts.Token })!;\n   276\u2192\n   277\u2192                // Materialize results in parallel to enable fan-out.\n   278\u2192                List<object> results = new();\n   279\u2192                SemaphoreSlim gate = new(_maxDegreeOfParallelism);\n   280\u2192\n   281\u2192                await foreach (object item in resultStream\n   282\u2192                                   .WithCancellation(linkedCts.Token))\n   283\u2192                {\n   284\u2192                    await gate.WaitAsync(linkedCts.Token);\n   285\u2192                    _ = Task.Run(() =>\n   286\u2192                        {\n   287\u2192                            try\n   288\u2192                            {\n   289\u2192                                lock (results)\n   290\u2192                                {\n   291\u2192                                    results.Add(item);\n   292\u2192                                }\n   293\u2192                            }\n   294\u2192                            finally\n   295\u2192                            {\n   296\u2192                                gate.Release();\n   297\u2192                            }\n   298\u2192                        }, linkedCts.Token);\n   299\u2192                }\n   300\u2192\n   301\u2192                // Wait for outstanding tasks to complete.\n   302\u2192                for (int i = 0; i < _maxDegreeOfParallelism; i++)\n   303\u2192                    await gate.WaitAsync(linkedCts.Token);\n   304\u2192\n   305\u2192                sw.Stop();\n   306\u2192                _logger.LogInformation(\n   307\u2192                    \"[{RequestId}] Strategy {Strategy} produced {RecordCount} records in {ElapsedMs} ms.\",\n   308\u2192                    context.RequestId,\n   309\u2192                    key,\n   310\u2192                    results.Count,\n   311\u2192                    sw.ElapsedMilliseconds);\n   312\u2192\n   313\u2192                await PublishMetricAsync(\n   314\u2192                    metricName: \"StrategyLatencyMs\",\n   315\u2192                    value: sw.ElapsedMilliseconds,\n   316\u2192                    dimensions: new Dictionary<string, string>\n   317\u2192                    {\n   318\u2192                        [\"Strategy\"] = strategyName,\n   319\u2192                        [\"Tenant\"]   = context.TenantId\n   320\u2192                    },\n   321\u2192                    context.CloudWatchClient,\n   322\u2192                    linkedCts.Token);\n   323\u2192\n   324\u2192                return results;\n   325\u2192            }\n   326\u2192            catch (Exception ex) when (!linkedCts.IsCancellationRequested)\n   327\u2192            {\n   328\u2192                _logger.LogError(\n   329\u2192                    ex,\n   330\u2192                    \"[{RequestId}] Strategy {Strategy} failed: {Message}\",\n   331\u2192                    context.RequestId,\n   332\u2192                    key,\n   333\u2192                    ex.Message);\n   334\u2192                throw;\n   335\u2192            }\n   336\u2192            finally\n   337\u2192            {\n   338\u2192                linkedCts.Dispose();\n   339\u2192            }\n   340\u2192        }\n   341\u2192\n   342\u2192        private static async Task PublishMetricAsync(\n   343\u2192            string metricName,\n   344\u2192            double value,\n   345\u2192            IDictionary<string, string> dimensions,\n   346\u2192            IAmazonCloudWatch? client,\n   347\u2192            CancellationToken token)\n   348\u2192        {\n   349\u2192            if (client == null) return;\n   350\u2192\n   351\u2192            var metricDatum = new MetricDatum\n   352\u2192            {\n   353\u2192                MetricName = metricName,\n   354\u2192                Timestamp  = DateTime.UtcNow,\n   355\u2192                Unit       = StandardUnit.Milliseconds,\n   356\u2192                Value      = value,\n   357\u2192                Dimensions = dimensions.Select(\n   358\u2192                    kv => new Dimension {Name = kv.Key, Value = kv.Value}).ToList()\n   359\u2192            };\n   360\u2192\n   361\u2192            await client.PutMetricDataAsync(new PutMetricDataRequest\n   362\u2192            {\n   363\u2192                Namespace   = \"PulseOps/Warehouse\",\n   364\u2192                MetricData  = new List<MetricDatum> { metricDatum }\n   365\u2192            }, token);\n   366\u2192        }\n   367\u2192    }\n   368\u2192\n   369\u2192    #endregion\n   370\u2192\n   371\u2192    #region \u2014\u2014\u2014 Sample Domain Models \u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\n   372\u2192\n   373\u2192    // NOTE: In the actual repository these live in a shared project. Included\n   374\u2192    // here for self-containment of this code example.\n   375\u2192\n   376\u2192    public sealed record CalendarEvent(\n   377\u2192        DateTime StartUtc,\n   378\u2192        DateTime EndUtc,\n   379\u2192        bool     IsFocusTime);\n   380\u2192\n   381\u2192    public sealed record FocusTimeRatioKpi(\n   382\u2192        DateTime WindowStartUtc,\n   383\u2192        DateTime WindowEndUtc,\n   384\u2192        double   Ratio);\n   385\u2192\n   386\u2192    #endregion\n   387\u2192\n   388\u2192    #region \u2014\u2014\u2014 Example Concrete Strategy \u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\n   389\u2192\n   390\u2192    /// <summary>\n   391\u2192    /// Calculates the \"Focus-Time Ratio\" KPI for a sliding window.\n   392\u2192    ///\n   393\u2192    /// Business logic:\n   394\u2192    ///   ratio = total_focus_time / total_calendar_time (within window)\n   395\u2192    ///   \u2022 Focus slots are identified via input.IsFocusTime\n   396\u2192    ///   \u2022 Empty windows yield ratio = 0\n   397\u2192    /// </summary>\n   398\u2192    [TransformationStrategy(\"FocusTimeRatio\", \"2.1\")]\n   399\u2192    public sealed class FocusTimeRatioStrategy\n   400\u2192        : ITransformationStrategy<CalendarEvent, FocusTimeRatioKpi>\n   401\u2192    {\n   402\u2192        public async IAsyncEnumerable<FocusTimeRatioKpi> TransformAsync(\n   403\u2192            IAsyncEnumerable<CalendarEvent> input,\n   404\u2192            TransformationContext context,\n   405\u2192            [System.Runtime.CompilerServices.EnumeratorCancellation]\n   406\u2192            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)\n   407\u2192        {\n   408\u2192            var window = new List<CalendarEvent>();\n   409\u2192            TimeSpan windowLength = TimeSpan.FromHours(24); // daily window\n   410\u2192            DateTime? currentWindowStart = null;\n   411\u2192\n   412\u2192            await foreach (CalendarEvent evt in input\n   413\u2192                               .WithCancellation(cancellationToken))\n   414\u2192            {\n   415\u2192                if (currentWindowStart == null)\n   416\u2192                    currentWindowStart = FloorToDay(evt.StartUtc);\n   417\u2192\n   418\u2192                DateTime windowEnd = currentWindowStart.Value + windowLength;\n   419\u2192                if (evt.StartUtc >= windowEnd)\n   420\u2192                {\n   421\u2192                    // Emit KPI for completed window.\n   422\u2192                    yield return Compute(window, currentWindowStart.Value, windowEnd);\n   423\u2192\n   424\u2192                    // Advance window boundary. Assuming chronological order.\n   425\u2192                    currentWindowStart = FloorToDay(evt.StartUtc);\n   426\u2192                    window.Clear();\n   427\u2192                }\n   428\u2192\n   429\u2192                window.Add(evt);\n   430\u2192            }\n   431\u2192\n   432\u2192            // Flush the last window.\n   433\u2192            if (window.Count > 0 && currentWindowStart != null)\n   434\u2192            {\n   435\u2192                DateTime windowEnd = currentWindowStart.Value + windowLength;\n   436\u2192                yield return Compute(window, currentWindowStart.Value, windowEnd);\n   437\u2192            }\n   438\u2192\n   439\u2192            static DateTime FloorToDay(DateTime dt) => dt.Date;\n   440\u2192\n   441\u2192            static FocusTimeRatioKpi Compute(\n   442\u2192                IReadOnlyCollection<CalendarEvent> events,\n   443\u2192                DateTime from,\n   444\u2192                DateTime to)\n   445\u2192            {\n   446\u2192                double focusMinutes = events\n   447\u2192                    .Where(e => e.IsFocusTime)\n   448\u2192                    .Sum(e => (e.EndUtc - e.StartUtc).TotalMinutes);\n   449\u2192\n   450\u2192                double totalMinutes = events\n   451\u2192                    .Sum(e => (e.EndUtc - e.StartUtc).TotalMinutes);\n   452\u2192\n   453\u2192                double ratio = totalMinutes == 0 ? 0 : focusMinutes / totalMinutes;\n   454\u2192\n   455\u2192                return new FocusTimeRatioKpi(from, to, ratio);\n   456\u2192            }\n   457\u2192        }\n   458\u2192    }\n   459\u2192\n   460\u2192    #endregion\n   461\u2192\n   462\u2192    #region \u2014\u2014\u2014 Extension-Helpers \u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\u2014\n   463\u2192\n   464\u2192    internal static class AsyncEnumerableExtensions\n   465\u2192    {\n   466\u2192        /// <summary>\n   467\u2192        /// Serializes an async-enumerable to NDJSON for debugging/tracing purposes.\n   468\u2192        /// </summary>\n   469\u2192        public static async Task<string> ToJsonLinesAsync<T>(\n   470\u2192            this IAsyncEnumerable<T> source,\n   471\u2192            CancellationToken token = default)\n   472\u2192        {\n   473\u2192            var jsonOptions = new JsonSerializerOptions\n   474\u2192            {\n   475\u2192                WriteIndented = false\n   476\u2192            };\n   477\u2192\n   478\u2192            List<string> lines = new();\n   479\u2192            await foreach (T item in source.WithCancellation(token))\n   480\u2192            {\n   481\u2192                string json = JsonSerializer.Serialize(item, jsonOptions);\n   482\u2192                lines.Add(json);\n   483\u2192            }\n   484\u2192\n   485\u2192            return string.Join(Environment.NewLine, lines);\n   486\u2192        }\n   487\u2192    }\n   488\u2192\n   489\u2192    #endregion\n   490\u2192}\n   491\u2192```\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
71. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/app/project/src/module_82.txt"
}
Output
"     1\u2192```csharp\n     2\u2192// File: src/module_82.txt\n     3\u2192// Project: PulseOps Warehouse \u2014 Serverless Productivity Intelligence Fabric\n     4\u2192//\n     5\u2192// Purpose:\n     6\u2192//   Implements the \u201cMeeting Cost Index\u201d KPI calculation using the Strategy\n     7\u2192//   pattern.  This KPI estimates the direct cost of meetings per-day by\n     8\u2192//   multiplying each attendee\u2019s hourly cost rate by the meeting duration.\n     9\u2192//\n    10\u2192//   The code demonstrates the following production-grade concerns:\n    11\u2192//     \u2022 Async/await & cancellation support\n    12\u2192//     \u2022 Dependency-injected collaborators (directory client, cache, logging)\n    13\u2192//     \u2022 Memory-cache with sliding expiration\n    14\u2192//     \u2022 Graceful degradation & structured error logging\n    15\u2192//     \u2022 Immutable record types & LINQ for expressiveness\n    16\u2192//\n    17\u2192// NOTE:  This file is compiled as part of the shared library and is consumed\n    18\u2192//        by a dedicated Lambda function that materialises KPI results into\n    19\u2192//        the warehouse\u2019s fact tables.\n    20\u2192\n    21\u2192using System;\n    22\u2192using System.Collections.Generic;\n    23\u2192using System.Linq;\n    24\u2192using System.Threading;\n    25\u2192using System.Threading.Tasks;\n    26\u2192using Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Memory;\n    27\u2192using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;\n    28\u2192\n    29\u2192namespace PulseOps.Warehouse.Transformations.KpiStrategies\n    30\u2192{\n    31\u2192    #region Domain Contracts \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    32\u2192\n    33\u2192    /// <summary>\n    34\u2192    /// Generic KPI calculation contract.\n    35\u2192    /// </summary>\n    36\u2192    public interface IKpiStrategy\n    37\u2192    {\n    38\u2192        /// <summary>\n    39\u2192        /// Calculates KPI values for the supplied event stream.\n    40\u2192        /// </summary>\n    41\u2192        /// <param name=\"events\">Domain events to aggregate.</param>\n    42\u2192        /// <param name=\"context\">Execution context metadata.</param>\n    43\u2192        /// <param name=\"token\">A cancellation token.</param>\n    44\u2192        /// <returns>Zero or more KPI results.</returns>\n    45\u2192        Task<IEnumerable<KpiResult>> CalculateAsync(\n    46\u2192            IEnumerable<EventEnvelope> events,\n    47\u2192            CalculationContext           context,\n    48\u2192            CancellationToken            token = default);\n    49\u2192    }\n    50\u2192\n    51\u2192    /// <summary>\n    52\u2192    /// Provider for hourly cost-rates used in meeting-cost calculations.\n    53\u2192    /// </summary>\n    54\u2192    public interface ICostRateProvider\n    55\u2192    {\n    56\u2192        Task<decimal> GetHourlyRateAsync(string email, CancellationToken token = default);\n    57\u2192    }\n    58\u2192\n    59\u2192    /// <summary>\n    60\u2192    /// External employee directory abstraction.\n    61\u2192    /// </summary>\n    62\u2192    public interface IEmployeeDirectoryClient\n    63\u2192    {\n    64\u2192        Task<EmployeeInfo?> GetEmployeeByEmailAsync(string email, CancellationToken token = default);\n    65\u2192    }\n    66\u2192\n    67\u2192    #endregion\n    68\u2192\n    69\u2192    #region Domain Models \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    70\u2192\n    71\u2192    /// <summary>\n    72\u2192    /// Supported raw event types in the warehouse.\n    73\u2192    /// </summary>\n    74\u2192    public enum EventType\n    75\u2192    {\n    76\u2192        CalendarMeeting,\n    77\u2192        // \u2026 other event kinds (PullRequest, Deployment, Build, etc.)\n    78\u2192    }\n    79\u2192\n    80\u2192    /// <summary>\n    81\u2192    /// Canonical event envelope used across the data-lake.\n    82\u2192    /// </summary>\n    83\u2192    public sealed record EventEnvelope(\n    84\u2192        Guid                        EventId,\n    85\u2192        EventType                   Type,\n    86\u2192        DateTimeOffset              StartTime,\n    87\u2192        DateTimeOffset              EndTime,\n    88\u2192        IReadOnlyDictionary<string, object?> Metadata);\n    89\u2192\n    90\u2192    /// <summary>\n    91\u2192    /// Ambient context for a KPI calculation run.\n    92\u2192    /// </summary>\n    93\u2192    /// <param name=\"TenantId\">Enterprise identifier (multi-tenant support).</param>\n    94\u2192    /// <param name=\"CorrelationId\">Correlation id for tracing purposes.</param>\n    95\u2192    public sealed record CalculationContext(\n    96\u2192        string TenantId,\n    97\u2192        Guid   CorrelationId);\n    98\u2192\n    99\u2192    /// <summary>\n   100\u2192    /// Immutable KPI result model.\n   101\u2192    /// </summary>\n   102\u2192    /// <param name=\"KpiName\">Name of the KPI (e.g., \u201cMeetingCostIndex\u201d).</param>\n   103\u2192    /// <param name=\"TimeWindowStart\">Start of the aggregation window (inclusive).</param>\n   104\u2192    /// <param name=\"TimeWindowEnd\">End of the aggregation window (inclusive).</param>\n   105\u2192    /// <param name=\"Value\">Calculated numeric value.</param>\n   106\u2192    /// <param name=\"Unit\">Unit of measurement (e.g., \u201cUSD\u201d).</param>\n   107\u2192    public sealed record KpiResult(\n   108\u2192        string        KpiName,\n   109\u2192        DateTimeOffset TimeWindowStart,\n   110\u2192        DateTimeOffset TimeWindowEnd,\n   111\u2192        decimal        Value,\n   112\u2192        string         Unit);\n   113\u2192\n   114\u2192    /// <summary>\n   115\u2192    /// Basic employee information used for cost-rate derivation.\n   116\u2192    /// </summary>\n   117\u2192    public sealed record EmployeeInfo(\n   118\u2192        string  EmployeeId,\n   119\u2192        string  Email,\n   120\u2192        decimal AnnualSalaryUsd);\n   121\u2192\n   122\u2192    #endregion\n   123\u2192\n   124\u2192    #region Strategy Implementation \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n   125\u2192\n   126\u2192    /// <summary>\n   127\u2192    /// KPI strategy that computes the \u201cMeeting Cost Index\u201d for a single day.\n   128\u2192    /// </summary>\n   129\u2192    public sealed class MeetingCostIndexStrategy : IKpiStrategy\n   130\u2192    {\n   131\u2192        private const string ParticipantsKey = \"participants\";\n   132\u2192\n   133\u2192        private readonly ICostRateProvider                     _costRateProvider;\n   134\u2192        private readonly ILogger<MeetingCostIndexStrategy>     _logger;\n   135\u2192\n   136\u2192        public MeetingCostIndexStrategy(\n   137\u2192            ICostRateProvider                 costRateProvider,\n   138\u2192            ILogger<MeetingCostIndexStrategy> logger)\n   139\u2192        {\n   140\u2192            _costRateProvider = costRateProvider\n   141\u2192                ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(costRateProvider));\n   142\u2192            _logger = logger\n   143\u2192                ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(logger));\n   144\u2192        }\n   145\u2192\n   146\u2192        /// <inheritdoc />\n   147\u2192        public async Task<IEnumerable<KpiResult>> CalculateAsync(\n   148\u2192            IEnumerable<EventEnvelope> events,\n   149\u2192            CalculationContext         context,\n   150\u2192            CancellationToken          token = default)\n   151\u2192        {\n   152\u2192            if (events  is null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(events));\n   153\u2192            if (context is null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(context));\n   154\u2192\n   155\u2192            // Filter and group calendar meeting events by calendar day.\n   156\u2192            var groupedMeetings = events\n   157\u2192                .Where(e => e.Type == EventType.CalendarMeeting)\n   158\u2192                .GroupBy(e => e.StartTime.Date);\n   159\u2192\n   160\u2192            var results = new List<KpiResult>();\n   161\u2192\n   162\u2192            foreach (var dayGroup in groupedMeetings)\n   163\u2192            {\n   164\u2192                token.ThrowIfCancellationRequested();\n   165\u2192\n   166\u2192                decimal dayTotal = 0m;\n   167\u2192\n   168\u2192                foreach (var meeting in dayGroup)\n   169\u2192                {\n   170\u2192                    try\n   171\u2192                    {\n   172\u2192                        dayTotal += await CalculateMeetingCostAsync(meeting, token)\n   173\u2192                            .ConfigureAwait(false);\n   174\u2192                    }\n   175\u2192                    catch (Exception ex) // swallow per-meeting failure, continue aggregation\n   176\u2192                    {\n   177\u2192                        _logger.LogWarning(\n   178\u2192                            ex,\n   179\u2192                            \"Failed to calculate meeting cost for event {EventId} (Tenant={TenantId}, Correlation={CorrelationId})\",\n   180\u2192                            meeting.EventId,\n   181\u2192                            context.TenantId,\n   182\u2192                            context.CorrelationId);\n   183\u2192                    }\n   184\u2192                }\n   185\u2192\n   186\u2192                results.Add(new KpiResult(\n   187\u2192                    KpiName:         \"MeetingCostIndex\",\n   188\u2192                    TimeWindowStart: dayGroup.Key,                  // 00:00 local\n   189\u2192                    TimeWindowEnd:   dayGroup.Key.AddDays(1).AddTicks(-1), // 23:59:59.999\n   190\u2192                    Value:           decimal.Round(dayTotal, 2),\n   191\u2192                    Unit:            \"USD\"));\n   192\u2192            }\n   193\u2192\n   194\u2192            return results;\n   195\u2192        }\n   196\u2192\n   197\u2192        /// <summary>\n   198\u2192        /// Calculates the cost of a single meeting event.\n   199\u2192        /// </summary>\n   200\u2192        private async Task<decimal> CalculateMeetingCostAsync(\n   201\u2192            EventEnvelope   meeting,\n   202\u2192            CancellationToken token)\n   203\u2192        {\n   204\u2192            // Pull participants out of the metadata bag.\n   205\u2192            var participants = meeting.Metadata.TryGetValue(ParticipantsKey, out var value) &&\n   206\u2192                               value is IEnumerable<string> emails\n   207\u2192                               ? emails\n   208\u2192                               : Enumerable.Empty<string>();\n   209\u2192\n   210\u2192            if (!participants.Any()) return 0m;\n   211\u2192\n   212\u2192            var durationHours =\n   213\u2192                (decimal)(meeting.EndTime - meeting.StartTime).TotalHours;\n   214\u2192            if (durationHours <= 0) return 0m;\n   215\u2192\n   216\u2192            var costTasks = participants.Select(async email =>\n   217\u2192            {\n   218\u2192                try\n   219\u2192                {\n   220\u2192                    var rate = await _costRateProvider\n   221\u2192                        .GetHourlyRateAsync(email, token)\n   222\u2192                        .ConfigureAwait(false);\n   223\u2192\n   224\u2192                    return rate * durationHours;\n   225\u2192                }\n   226\u2192                catch (Exception ex)\n   227\u2192                {\n   228\u2192                    _logger.LogWarning(ex,\n   229\u2192                        \"Could not resolve cost-rate for {Email}. Using fallback.\",\n   230\u2192                        email);\n   231\u2192                    return FallbackHourlyRateUsd * durationHours;\n   232\u2192                }\n   233\u2192            });\n   234\u2192\n   235\u2192            var costs = await Task.WhenAll(costTasks).ConfigureAwait(false);\n   236\u2192\n   237\u2192            return costs.Sum();\n   238\u2192        }\n   239\u2192\n   240\u2192        // Company-wide fallback hourly rate (in USD) when directory lookup fails.\n   241\u2192        private const decimal FallbackHourlyRateUsd = 75m;\n   242\u2192    }\n   243\u2192\n   244\u2192    #endregion\n   245\u2192\n   246\u2192    #region Infrastructure \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n   247\u2192\n   248\u2192    /// <summary>\n   249\u2192    /// Caching decorator around <see cref=\"IEmployeeDirectoryClient\"/> that\n   250\u2192    /// exposes an <see cref=\"ICostRateProvider\"/> abstraction.\n   251\u2192    /// </summary>\n   252\u2192    public sealed class MemoryCacheCostRateProvider : ICostRateProvider\n   253\u2192    {\n   254\u2192        private readonly IMemoryCache                      _cache;\n   255\u2192        private readonly IEmployeeDirectoryClient          _directory;\n   256\u2192        private readonly ILogger<MemoryCacheCostRateProvider> _logger;\n   257\u2192        private readonly MemoryCacheEntryOptions           _cacheOptions;\n   258\u2192\n   259\u2192        public MemoryCacheCostRateProvider(\n   260\u2192            IMemoryCache                       cache,\n   261\u2192            IEmployeeDirectoryClient           directory,\n   262\u2192            ILogger<MemoryCacheCostRateProvider> logger)\n   263\u2192        {\n   264\u2192            _cache   = cache     ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(cache));\n   265\u2192            _directory = directory ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(directory));\n   266\u2192            _logger  = logger    ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(logger));\n   267\u2192\n   268\u2192            _cacheOptions = new MemoryCacheEntryOptions\n   269\u2192            {\n   270\u2192                SlidingExpiration = TimeSpan.FromHours(6),\n   271\u2192                Size              = 1 // each entry counts as 1 unit towards CacheSizeLimit\n   272\u2192            };\n   273\u2192        }\n   274\u2192\n   275\u2192        /// <inheritdoc />\n   276\u2192        public async Task<decimal> GetHourlyRateAsync(\n   277\u2192            string email,\n   278\u2192            CancellationToken token = default)\n   279\u2192        {\n   280\u2192            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(email))\n   281\u2192                throw new ArgumentException(\"Value cannot be null or whitespace.\", nameof(email));\n   282\u2192\n   283\u2192            if (_cache.TryGetValue(email, out decimal cachedRate))\n   284\u2192            {\n   285\u2192                return cachedRate;\n   286\u2192            }\n   287\u2192\n   288\u2192            decimal rate;\n   289\u2192            try\n   290\u2192            {\n   291\u2192                var employee = await _directory\n   292\u2192                    .GetEmployeeByEmailAsync(email, token)\n   293\u2192                    .ConfigureAwait(false);\n   294\u2192\n   295\u2192                rate = employee is null\n   296\u2192                    ? MeetingCostIndexStrategy.FallbackHourlyRateUsd\n   297\u2192                    : ConvertAnnualSalaryToHourly(employee.AnnualSalaryUsd);\n   298\u2192            }\n   299\u2192            catch (Exception ex)\n   300\u2192            {\n   301\u2192                _logger.LogError(ex, \"Directory lookup failed for {Email}\", email);\n   302\u2192                rate = MeetingCostIndexStrategy.FallbackHourlyRateUsd;\n   303\u2192            }\n   304\u2192\n   305\u2192            _cache.Set(email, rate, _cacheOptions);\n   306\u2192            return rate;\n   307\u2192        }\n   308\u2192\n   309\u2192        private static decimal ConvertAnnualSalaryToHourly(decimal annualSalaryUsd)\n   310\u2192            => decimal.Round(annualSalaryUsd / StandardWorkHoursPerYear, 2);\n   311\u2192\n   312\u2192        // 2080 hours = 40h/week * 52 weeks\n   313\u2192        private const decimal StandardWorkHoursPerYear = 2080m;\n   314\u2192    }\n   315\u2192\n   316\u2192    #endregion\n   317\u2192}\n   318\u2192```\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
72. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/app/project/src/module_36.txt"
}
Output
"     1\u2192```csharp\n     2\u2192// File: src/module_36.cs\n     3\u2192// Project: PulseOps Warehouse \u2014 Serverless Productivity Intelligence Fabric\n     4\u2192//\n     5\u2192// Description:\n     6\u2192//     Transformation strategy infrastructure + concrete Focus-Time ratio implementation.\n     7\u2192//     Demonstrates Strategy-Pattern, parallel processing, structured logging, and\n     8\u2192//     resiliency best-practices.  This file is shared by multiple Lambda functions\n     9\u2192//     that need a plug-and-play metric computation engine.\n    10\u2192//\n    11\u2192// ReSharper disable PossibleMultipleEnumeration\n    12\u2192\n    13\u2192using System;\n    14\u2192using System.Collections.Concurrent;\n    15\u2192using System.Collections.Generic;\n    16\u2192using System.Diagnostics;\n    17\u2192using System.Linq;\n    18\u2192using System.Text.Json;\n    19\u2192using System.Threading;\n    20\u2192using System.Threading.Tasks;\n    21\u2192using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;\n    22\u2192\n    23\u2192namespace PulseOps.Warehouse.Transformations\n    24\u2192{\n    25\u2192    #region Contracts\n    26\u2192\n    27\u2192    /// <summary>\n    28\u2192    ///     Generic contract for a transformation strategy.\n    29\u2192    /// </summary>\n    30\u2192    /// <typeparam name=\"TIn\">Up-stream raw event payload.</typeparam>\n    31\u2192    /// <typeparam name=\"TOut\">Down-stream analytical entity.</typeparam>\n    32\u2192    public interface ITransformationStrategy<in TIn, TOut>\n    33\u2192    {\n    34\u2192        /// <summary>Unique, human-readable identifier.</summary>\n    35\u2192        string Name { get; }\n    36\u2192\n    37\u2192        /// <summary>Transforms a set of <typeparamref name=\"TIn\" /> into <typeparamref name=\"TOut\" />.</summary>\n    38\u2192        /// <param name=\"input\">Events partition belonging to the same routing key.</param>\n    39\u2192        /// <param name=\"cancellationToken\">Co-operative cancellation token.</param>\n    40\u2192        Task<TOut> TransformAsync(IEnumerable<TIn> input, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);\n    41\u2192    }\n    42\u2192\n    43\u2192    #endregion\n    44\u2192\n    45\u2192    #region Registry\n    46\u2192\n    47\u2192    /// <summary>\n    48\u2192    ///     Thread-safe registry that supports dynamic discovery and hot-swapping of\n    49\u2192    ///     transformation strategies at runtime.  The registry name is case-insensitive\n    50\u2192    ///     to avoid subtle deployment mistakes when multiple teams contribute.\n    51\u2192    /// </summary>\n    52\u2192    public static class TransformationStrategyRegistry\n    53\u2192    {\n    54\u2192        private static readonly ConcurrentDictionary<string, object> _registry =\n    55\u2192            new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n    56\u2192\n    57\u2192        /// <summary>Registers or overrides a strategy instance.</summary>\n    58\u2192        public static void Register<TIn, TOut>(ITransformationStrategy<TIn, TOut> strategy)\n    59\u2192        {\n    60\u2192            if (strategy == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(strategy));\n    61\u2192            _registry[strategy.Name] = strategy;\n    62\u2192        }\n    63\u2192\n    64\u2192        /// <summary>Fetches a strategy by name, throwing if not found.</summary>\n    65\u2192        public static ITransformationStrategy<TIn, TOut> Resolve<TIn, TOut>(string name)\n    66\u2192        {\n    67\u2192            if (!_registry.TryGetValue(name, out var boxed))\n    68\u2192                throw new KeyNotFoundException($\"Transformation '{name}' not registered.\");\n    69\u2192\n    70\u2192            if (boxed is ITransformationStrategy<TIn, TOut> typed) return typed;\n    71\u2192\n    72\u2192            throw new InvalidCastException(\n    73\u2192                $\"Strategy '{name}' is registered for a different payload shape.\");\n    74\u2192        }\n    75\u2192\n    76\u2192        /// <summary>Returns all registered strategy identifiers.</summary>\n    77\u2192        public static IReadOnlyCollection<string> List()\n    78\u2192            => _registry.Keys.ToArray();\n    79\u2192    }\n    80\u2192\n    81\u2192    #endregion\n    82\u2192\n    83\u2192    #region Domain Models\n    84\u2192\n    85\u2192    /// <summary>\n    86\u2192    ///     Minimal calendar event projection required for focus-time computation.\n    87\u2192    /// </summary>\n    88\u2192    public sealed record CalendarEvent(\n    89\u2192        string UserPrincipalName,\n    90\u2192        DateTimeOffset Start,\n    91\u2192        DateTimeOffset End,\n    92\u2192        string? Classification // e.g. \"Focus\", \"Meeting\", \"Personal\", etc.\n    93\u2192    )\n    94\u2192    {\n    95\u2192        public TimeSpan Duration => End - Start;\n    96\u2192    }\n    97\u2192\n    98\u2192    /// <summary>Analytical metric entity materialized by <see cref=\"FocusTimeRatioStrategy\" />.</summary>\n    99\u2192    public sealed record FocusTimeRatioKpi(\n   100\u2192        string UserPrincipalName,\n   101\u2192        DateOnly Day,\n   102\u2192        double FocusMinutes,\n   103\u2192        double TotalMinutes,\n   104\u2192        double FocusRatio\n   105\u2192    );\n   106\u2192\n   107\u2192    #endregion\n   108\u2192\n   109\u2192    #region Strategy Implementation\n   110\u2192\n   111\u2192    /// <summary>\n   112\u2192    ///     Calculates focus-time ratio per user per day:\n   113\u2192    ///         FocusRatio = FocusMinutes / TotalMinutes\n   114\u2192    ///     where FocusMinutes are calendar events classified as \"Focus\" or \"Deep-Work\".\n   115\u2192    /// </summary>\n   116\u2192    public sealed class FocusTimeRatioStrategy : ITransformationStrategy<CalendarEvent, IReadOnlyCollection<FocusTimeRatioKpi>>\n   117\u2192    {\n   118\u2192        public const string StrategyId = \"focus-time-ratio@v1\";\n   119\u2192        private const string DefaultFocusLabel = \"Focus\";\n   120\u2192        private static readonly string[] EquivalentFocusLabels = { \"Deep-Work\", \"Heads-Down\" };\n   121\u2192\n   122\u2192        public string Name => StrategyId;\n   123\u2192\n   124\u2192        /// <inheritdoc />\n   125\u2192        public async Task<IReadOnlyCollection<FocusTimeRatioKpi>> TransformAsync(\n   126\u2192            IEnumerable<CalendarEvent> input,\n   127\u2192            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)\n   128\u2192        {\n   129\u2192            if (input == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(input));\n   130\u2192\n   131\u2192            // Materialize the enumerable only once.\n   132\u2192            var events = input as CalendarEvent[] ?? input.ToArray();\n   133\u2192\n   134\u2192            return await Task.Run(() =>\n   135\u2192            {\n   136\u2192                var kpis = events\n   137\u2192                    .Where(evt => evt.Start.Date == evt.End.Date) // Skip multi-day events for simplicity\n   138\u2192                    .GroupBy(evt => new { evt.UserPrincipalName, Day = DateOnly.FromDateTime(evt.Start.Date) })\n   139\u2192                    .Select(group =>\n   140\u2192                    {\n   141\u2192                        double totalMinutes = group.Sum(evt => evt.Duration.TotalMinutes);\n   142\u2192                        double focusMinutes = group\n   143\u2192                            .Where(IsFocusEvent)\n   144\u2192                            .Sum(evt => evt.Duration.TotalMinutes);\n   145\u2192\n   146\u2192                        var ratio = totalMinutes > 0\n   147\u2192                            ? Math.Round(focusMinutes / totalMinutes, 4)\n   148\u2192                            : 0;\n   149\u2192\n   150\u2192                        return new FocusTimeRatioKpi(\n   151\u2192                            group.Key.UserPrincipalName,\n   152\u2192                            group.Key.Day,\n   153\u2192                            focusMinutes,\n   154\u2192                            totalMinutes,\n   155\u2192                            ratio);\n   156\u2192                    })\n   157\u2192                    .ToArray();\n   158\u2192\n   159\u2192                return (IReadOnlyCollection<FocusTimeRatioKpi>)kpis;\n   160\u2192            }, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(false);\n   161\u2192        }\n   162\u2192\n   163\u2192        private static bool IsFocusEvent(CalendarEvent evt)\n   164\u2192        {\n   165\u2192            if (evt.Classification == null) return false;\n   166\u2192\n   167\u2192            return StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase.Equals(evt.Classification, DefaultFocusLabel) ||\n   168\u2192                   EquivalentFocusLabels.Any(\n   169\u2192                       l => StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase.Equals(l, evt.Classification));\n   170\u2192        }\n   171\u2192    }\n   172\u2192\n   173\u2192    #endregion\n   174\u2192\n   175\u2192    #region Execution Harness\n   176\u2192\n   177\u2192    /// <summary>\n   178\u2192    ///     Provides utility methods to execute a strategy in parallel partitions.\n   179\u2192    ///     Lambda handlers leverage this type to maintain high throughput in large\n   180\u2192    ///     warehouse back-fills.\n   181\u2192    /// </summary>\n   182\u2192    public static class StrategyExecutor\n   183\u2192    {\n   184\u2192        /// <summary>\n   185\u2192        ///     Splits the input into partitions and runs the transformation concurrently.\n   186\u2192        /// </summary>\n   187\u2192        /// <param name=\"strategy\">Concrete strategy instance.</param>\n   188\u2192        /// <param name=\"input\">Full event batch (cross-partition).</param>\n   189\u2192        /// <param name=\"partitionKeySelector\">\n   190\u2192        ///     Deterministic key selector that yields the same value for events that must be\n   191\u2192        ///     transformed together (e.g. <c>UserPrincipalName</c>).\n   192\u2192        /// </param>\n   193\u2192        /// <param name=\"degreeOfParallelism\">Maximum concurrency.  Defaults to logical processors.</param>\n   194\u2192        /// <param name=\"logger\">Structured logger (optional).</param>\n   195\u2192        /// <typeparam name=\"TIn\">Raw event type.</typeparam>\n   196\u2192        /// <typeparam name=\"TOut\">Analytical entity type.</typeparam>\n   197\u2192        /// <returns>Flattened collection of transformed outputs.</returns>\n   198\u2192        public static async Task<IReadOnlyCollection<TOut>> ExecutePartitionedAsync<TIn, TOut>(\n   199\u2192            ITransformationStrategy<TIn, IReadOnlyCollection<TOut>> strategy,\n   200\u2192            IEnumerable<TIn> input,\n   201\u2192            Func<TIn, string> partitionKeySelector,\n   202\u2192            int? degreeOfParallelism = null,\n   203\u2192            ILogger? logger = null)\n   204\u2192        {\n   205\u2192            if (strategy == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(strategy));\n   206\u2192            if (input == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(input));\n   207\u2192            if (partitionKeySelector == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(partitionKeySelector));\n   208\u2192\n   209\u2192            var sw = Stopwatch.StartNew();\n   210\u2192            logger?.LogInformation(\"Executing strategy {Strategy}...\", strategy.Name);\n   211\u2192\n   212\u2192            var partitions = input\n   213\u2192                .GroupBy(partitionKeySelector, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)\n   214\u2192                .ToArray();\n   215\u2192\n   216\u2192            var resultsBag = new ConcurrentBag<TOut>();\n   217\u2192\n   218\u2192            // Limit concurrency to avoid Lambda over-subscription.\n   219\u2192            var parallelOptions = new ParallelOptions\n   220\u2192            {\n   221\u2192                MaxDegreeOfParallelism = degreeOfParallelism ?? Environment.ProcessorCount\n   222\u2192            };\n   223\u2192\n   224\u2192            try\n   225\u2192            {\n   226\u2192                await Parallel.ForEachAsync(partitions, parallelOptions, async (partition, ct) =>\n   227\u2192                {\n   228\u2192                    var partitionId = partition.Key;\n   229\u2192                    try\n   230\u2192                    {\n   231\u2192                        logger?.LogDebug(\"Transforming partition {PartitionId} ({Count} events)...\",\n   232\u2192                            partitionId, partition.Count());\n   233\u2192\n   234\u2192                        var outputs = await strategy.TransformAsync(partition, ct).ConfigureAwait(false);\n   235\u2192\n   236\u2192                        foreach (var output in outputs) resultsBag.Add(output);\n   237\u2192\n   238\u2192                        logger?.LogTrace(\"Partition {PartitionId} done.\", partitionId);\n   239\u2192                    }\n   240\u2192                    catch (Exception ex)\n   241\u2192                    {\n   242\u2192                        logger?.LogError(ex,\n   243\u2192                            \"Strategy {Strategy} failed for partition {PartitionId}.  Delegating to DLQ.\",\n   244\u2192                            strategy.Name, partitionId);\n   245\u2192\n   246\u2192                        // In production we would push the failing partition to an SQS-DLQ / Kinesis-DLQ.\n   247\u2192                        // For this shared lib we simply re-throw.\n   248\u2192                        throw;\n   249\u2192                    }\n   250\u2192                });\n   251\u2192            }\n   252\u2192            finally\n   253\u2192            {\n   254\u2192                logger?.LogInformation(\n   255\u2192                    \"Strategy {Strategy} completed in {ElapsedMs} ms.  {OutputCount} rows produced.\",\n   256\u2192                    strategy.Name, sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, resultsBag.Count);\n   257\u2192            }\n   258\u2192\n   259\u2192            return resultsBag.ToArray();\n   260\u2192        }\n   261\u2192    }\n   262\u2192\n   263\u2192    #endregion\n   264\u2192\n   265\u2192    #region Serialization Helpers\n   266\u2192\n   267\u2192    /// <summary>\n   268\u2192    ///     Centralizes JSON (de)serialization settings to guarantee schema stability\n   269\u2192    ///     across micro-components and avoid date/time pitfalls.\n   270\u2192    /// </summary>\n   271\u2192    public static class Json\n   272\u2192    {\n   273\u2192        private static readonly JsonSerializerOptions _opts = new()\n   274\u2192        {\n   275\u2192            PropertyNameCaseInsensitive = false,\n   276\u2192            PropertyNamingPolicy = JsonNamingPolicy.CamelCase,\n   277\u2192            WriteIndented = false,\n   278\u2192            Converters =\n   279\u2192            {\n   280\u2192                new System.Text.Json.Serialization.JsonStringEnumConverter(JsonNamingPolicy.CamelCase)\n   281\u2192            }\n   282\u2192        };\n   283\u2192\n   284\u2192        public static string Serialize<T>(T payload) =>\n   285\u2192            JsonSerializer.Serialize(payload, _opts);\n   286\u2192\n   287\u2192        public static T Deserialize<T>(string json) =>\n   288\u2192            JsonSerializer.Deserialize<T>(json, _opts) ??\n   289\u2192            throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Cannot deserialize json into {typeof(T).Name}.\");\n   290\u2192    }\n   291\u2192\n   292\u2192    #endregion\n   293\u2192\n   294\u2192    #region Module Initialization\n   295\u2192\n   296\u2192    /// <summary>\n   297\u2192    ///     Static initializer registers built-in strategies once per cold-start.\n   298\u2192    ///     Additional strategies can be registered by other assemblies at runtime.\n   299\u2192    /// </summary>\n   300\u2192    internal static class ModuleInitializer\n   301\u2192    {\n   302\u2192        // ReSharper disable once UnusedMember.Global\n   303\u2192        public static void Initialize()\n   304\u2192        {\n   305\u2192            TransformationStrategyRegistry.Register(new FocusTimeRatioStrategy());\n   306\u2192        }\n   307\u2192\n   308\u2192        // C# 11 module initializer attribute keeps reflection-free startup.\n   309\u2192        [System.Runtime.CompilerServices.ModuleInitializer]\n   310\u2192        // ReSharper disable once UnusedMember.Local\n   311\u2192        private static void Init() => Initialize();\n   312\u2192    }\n   313\u2192\n   314\u2192    #endregion\n   315\u2192}\n   316\u2192```\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
73. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/app/project/src/module_79.txt"
}
Output
"     1\u2192```csharp\n     2\u2192// File: src/module_79.txt\n     3\u2192// Project: PulseOps Warehouse \u2014 Serverless Productivity Intelligence Fabric (data_warehouse)\n     4\u2192// Language: C#\n     5\u2192\n     6\u2192/*\n     7\u2192 *  TransformationStrategyRegistry.cs\n     8\u2192 *\n     9\u2192 *  This source file provides a thread-safe, runtime-discoverable registry for\n    10\u2192 *  ITransformationStrategy implementations.  Strategies can be discovered via\n    11\u2192 *  reflection, explicitly registered, or hot-reloaded when new assemblies are\n    12\u2192 *  introduced (e.g., by an AWS Lambda Layer update).  The registry is the central\n    13\u2192 *  dispatch mechanism used by the event-driven micro-components to obtain the\n    14\u2192 *  correct transformation logic for a given data stream.\n    15\u2192 *\n    16\u2192 *  The code purposely lives in its own compilation unit so that downstream\n    17\u2192 *  services (Lambdas, Glue jobs, Step-Functions, etc.) can depend on it without\n    18\u2192 *  pulling in heavier dependencies from the ingestion or storage layers.\n    19\u2192 */\n    20\u2192\n    21\u2192using System;\n    22\u2192using System.Collections.Concurrent;\n    23\u2192using System.Collections.Generic;\n    24\u2192using System.Diagnostics;\n    25\u2192using System.Linq;\n    26\u2192using System.Reflection;\n    27\u2192using System.Runtime.Loader;\n    28\u2192using System.Threading;\n    29\u2192using System.Threading.Tasks;\n    30\u2192\n    31\u2192// NOTE: External dependencies shipped via Lambda Layer or NuGet.\n    32\u2192// using Amazon.CloudWatch.EMF; // Embedded Metric Format (optional telemetry)\n    33\u2192\n    34\u2192namespace PulseOps.Warehouse.Transformation\n    35\u2192{\n    36\u2192    #region Public Contracts \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    37\u2192\n    38\u2192    /// <summary>\n    39\u2192    /// Identifies the upstream domain/source of a raw event stream.\n    40\u2192    /// </summary>\n    41\u2192    public enum DataStreamType\n    42\u2192    {\n    43\u2192        Unknown = 0,\n    44\u2192        Calendar     = 1,\n    45\u2192        CodeRepo     = 2,\n    46\u2192        CiCd         = 3,\n    47\u2192        Email        = 4,\n    48\u2192        SaasTelemetry= 5\n    49\u2192    }\n    50\u2192\n    51\u2192    /// <summary>\n    52\u2192    /// Represents the canonical raw record emitted by an ingestion Lambda.  The\n    53\u2192    /// schema is highly simplified here \u2013 real implementations are located in\n    54\u2192    /// the PulseOps.Warehouse.Events namespace.\n    55\u2192    /// </summary>\n    56\u2192    public readonly struct RawRecord\n    57\u2192    {\n    58\u2192        public RawRecord(DataStreamType stream, string payload, DateTime timestampUtc)\n    59\u2192        {\n    60\u2192            StreamType    = stream;\n    61\u2192            Payload       = payload ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(payload));\n    62\u2192            TimestampUtc  = timestampUtc;\n    63\u2192        }\n    64\u2192\n    65\u2192        public DataStreamType StreamType { get; }\n    66\u2192        public string         Payload    { get; }\n    67\u2192        public DateTime       TimestampUtc { get; }\n    68\u2192    }\n    69\u2192\n    70\u2192    /// <summary>\n    71\u2192    /// Canonical output after transformation and domain enrichment.\n    72\u2192    /// </summary>\n    73\u2192    public sealed class TransformedRecord\n    74\u2192    {\n    75\u2192        public required DataStreamType StreamType { get; init; }\n    76\u2192        public required string         NormalizedPayload { get; init; }\n    77\u2192        public required DateTime       ObservedAtUtc     { get; init; }\n    78\u2192        public IDictionary<string, string>? Attributes   { get; init; }\n    79\u2192    }\n    80\u2192\n    81\u2192    /// <summary>\n    82\u2192    /// Strategy interface implemented by all transformation plug-ins.\n    83\u2192    /// Implementations must be stateless or otherwise thread-safe, as a single\n    84\u2192    /// instance may be shared across concurrent Lambda invocations.\n    85\u2192    /// </summary>\n    86\u2192    public interface ITransformationStrategy\n    87\u2192    {\n    88\u2192        /// <summary>Human-friendly name (e.g., \"Outlook Calendar \u2192 FocusTime\").</summary>\n    89\u2192        string Name { get; }\n    90\u2192\n    91\u2192        /// <summary>Indicates which upstream stream type this strategy supports.</summary>\n    92\u2192        DataStreamType StreamType { get; }\n    93\u2192\n    94\u2192        /// <summary>Transforms an incoming raw record into the warehouse schema.</summary>\n    95\u2192        Task<TransformedRecord> TransformAsync(RawRecord record, CancellationToken ct = default);\n    96\u2192    }\n    97\u2192\n    98\u2192    #endregion\n    99\u2192\n   100\u2192    #region Registry Implementation \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n   101\u2192\n   102\u2192    /// <summary>\n   103\u2192    /// Discovers, registers, and dispenses <see cref=\"ITransformationStrategy\"/>\n   104\u2192    /// instances at runtime.  The registry is explicitly designed for:\n   105\u2192    ///   \u2022 Lambda cold-start performance (caches reflection results)\n   106\u2192    ///   \u2022 Thread-safety (lock-free read path)\n   107\u2192    ///   \u2022 Hot-reloading (AssemblyLoadContext) for zero-downtime deploys\n   108\u2192    /// </summary>\n   109\u2192    public sealed class TransformationStrategyRegistry : IDisposable\n   110\u2192    {\n   111\u2192        private const string ENV_STRATEGY_OVERRIDE = \"PULSEOPS_STRATEGY_OVERRIDE\"; // \"Calendar=CustomCalStrategy;Email=Foo\"\n   112\u2192        private readonly ConcurrentDictionary<DataStreamType, ITransformationStrategy> _byStream\n   113\u2192            = new();\n   114\u2192        private readonly ConcurrentDictionary<string, ITransformationStrategy> _byName\n   115\u2192            = new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n   116\u2192        private readonly IDisposable? _assemblyLoadToken;\n   117\u2192        private bool _disposed;\n   118\u2192\n   119\u2192        #region Singleton Access \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n   120\u2192\n   121\u2192        private static readonly Lazy<TransformationStrategyRegistry> _lazy\n   122\u2192            = new(() => new TransformationStrategyRegistry());\n   123\u2192\n   124\u2192        /// <summary>Global singleton (lazy-initialized, thread-safe).</summary>\n   125\u2192        public static TransformationStrategyRegistry Instance => _lazy.Value;\n   126\u2192\n   127\u2192        /// <summary>Private ctor performs reflection-based discovery.</summary>\n   128\u2192        private TransformationStrategyRegistry()\n   129\u2192        {\n   130\u2192            DiscoverAndRegisterStrategies();\n   131\u2192\n   132\u2192            // Support hot-reload in Lambda: when a new AssemblyLoadContext is\n   133\u2192            // created for a version-ed layer, subscribe and re-discover.\n   134\u2192            _assemblyLoadToken = AssemblyLoadContext.Default.Resolving += OnAssemblyResolve;\n   135\u2192\n   136\u2192            ApplyEnvironmentOverrides();\n   137\u2192        }\n   138\u2192\n   139\u2192        #endregion\n   140\u2192\n   141\u2192        #region Strategy Discovery & Registration \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n   142\u2192\n   143\u2192        private void DiscoverAndRegisterStrategies()\n   144\u2192        {\n   145\u2192            var sw = Stopwatch.StartNew();\n   146\u2192\n   147\u2192            IEnumerable<ITransformationStrategy> strategies = AppDomain.CurrentDomain\n   148\u2192                .GetAssemblies()\n   149\u2192                .SelectMany(asm =>\n   150\u2192                {\n   151\u2192                    try\n   152\u2192                    {\n   153\u2192                        return asm.DefinedTypes;\n   154\u2192                    }\n   155\u2192                    catch (ReflectionTypeLoadException ex)\n   156\u2192                    {\n   157\u2192                        // Log and continue \u2013 some assemblies may fail to load.\n   158\u2192                        Console.Error.WriteLine($\"[WARN] ReflectionTypeLoadException for {asm.FullName}: {ex.Message}\");\n   159\u2192                        return ex.Types.Where(t => t != null).Cast<TypeInfo>();\n   160\u2192                    }\n   161\u2192                })\n   162\u2192                .Where(ti => ti is { IsClass: true, IsAbstract: false })\n   163\u2192                .Where(ti => typeof(ITransformationStrategy).IsAssignableFrom(ti))\n   164\u2192                .Select(ti =>\n   165\u2192                {\n   166\u2192                    try\n   167\u2192                    {\n   168\u2192                        return (ITransformationStrategy)Activator.CreateInstance(ti)!;\n   169\u2192                    }\n   170\u2192                    catch (Exception ex)\n   171\u2192                    {\n   172\u2192                        Console.Error.WriteLine($\"[ERROR] Failed to instantiate strategy {ti.FullName}: {ex}\");\n   173\u2192                        return null;\n   174\u2192                    }\n   175\u2192                })\n   176\u2192                .Where(instance => instance != null)!;\n   177\u2192\n   178\u2192            foreach (var strat in strategies)\n   179\u2192            {\n   180\u2192                RegisterStrategy(strat);\n   181\u2192            }\n   182\u2192\n   183\u2192            Console.WriteLine($\"[INFO] TransformationStrategyRegistry discovered {_byStream.Count} strategies in {sw.ElapsedMilliseconds} ms.\");\n   184\u2192        }\n   185\u2192\n   186\u2192        /// <summary>\n   187\u2192        /// Registers a strategy instance for runtime lookup.  If another strategy\n   188\u2192        /// for the same <see cref=\"DataStreamType\"/> already exists, the new one\n   189\u2192        /// will overwrite it (allowing environment overrides).\n   190\u2192        /// </summary>\n   191\u2192        public void RegisterStrategy(ITransformationStrategy strategy)\n   192\u2192        {\n   193\u2192            if (strategy == null)\n   194\u2192                throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(strategy));\n   195\u2192\n   196\u2192            _byStream.AddOrUpdate(strategy.StreamType, strategy, (_, _) => strategy);\n   197\u2192            _byName  .AddOrUpdate(strategy.Name, strategy, (_, _) => strategy);\n   198\u2192        }\n   199\u2192\n   200\u2192        #endregion\n   201\u2192\n   202\u2192        #region Lookup Operations \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n   203\u2192\n   204\u2192        /// <summary>\n   205\u2192        /// Retrieves the strategy responsible for the specified <paramref name=\"streamType\"/>.\n   206\u2192        /// Throws a descriptive exception if no strategy is registered.\n   207\u2192        /// </summary>\n   208\u2192        public ITransformationStrategy Get(DataStreamType streamType)\n   209\u2192        {\n   210\u2192            if (_byStream.TryGetValue(streamType, out var strat))\n   211\u2192            {\n   212\u2192                return strat;\n   213\u2192            }\n   214\u2192\n   215\u2192            throw new InvalidOperationException(\n   216\u2192                $\"No transformation strategy registered for stream '{streamType}'.  \" +\n   217\u2192                \"Ensure a plug-in implementing ITransformationStrategy is deployed \" +\n   218\u2192                \"and that its assembly is loaded.\");\n   219\u2192        }\n   220\u2192\n   221\u2192        /// <summary>\n   222\u2192        /// Attempts to retrieve a strategy by its <see cref=\"ITransformationStrategy.Name\"/>.\n   223\u2192        /// Returns null on failure.\n   224\u2192        /// </summary>\n   225\u2192        public ITransformationStrategy? TryGet(string strategyName)\n   226\u2192            => _byName.TryGetValue(strategyName, out var strat) ? strat : null;\n   227\u2192\n   228\u2192        #endregion\n   229\u2192\n   230\u2192        #region Environment-Driven Overrides \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n   231\u2192\n   232\u2192        private void ApplyEnvironmentOverrides()\n   233\u2192        {\n   234\u2192            string? overrideSpec = Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable(ENV_STRATEGY_OVERRIDE);\n   235\u2192            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(overrideSpec))\n   236\u2192                return;\n   237\u2192\n   238\u2192            // Format: \"Calendar=CustomCalStrategy;Email=FooBarStrategy\"\n   239\u2192            var kvps = overrideSpec.Split(';', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries);\n   240\u2192            foreach (var kvp in kvps)\n   241\u2192            {\n   242\u2192                var pair = kvp.Split('=', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries);\n   243\u2192                if (pair.Length != 2)\n   244\u2192                    continue;\n   245\u2192\n   246\u2192                if (!Enum.TryParse<DataStreamType>(pair[0], ignoreCase: true, out var stream))\n   247\u2192                    continue;\n   248\u2192\n   249\u2192                var stratName = pair[1];\n   250\u2192\n   251\u2192                var strat = TryGet(stratName);\n   252\u2192                if (strat == null)\n   253\u2192                {\n   254\u2192                    Console.Error.WriteLine($\"[WARN] Strategy override '{stratName}' not found; skipping.\");\n   255\u2192                    continue;\n   256\u2192                }\n   257\u2192\n   258\u2192                RegisterStrategy(strat);\n   259\u2192                Console.WriteLine($\"[INFO] Applied strategy override: {stream} \u2192 {strat.Name}\");\n   260\u2192            }\n   261\u2192        }\n   262\u2192\n   263\u2192        #endregion\n   264\u2192\n   265\u2192        #region Hot-Reload Support \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n   266\u2192\n   267\u2192        // Re-discover strategies whenever a new assembly is loaded.\n   268\u2192        private Assembly? OnAssemblyResolve(AssemblyLoadContext ctx, AssemblyName name)\n   269\u2192        {\n   270\u2192            // After the assembly successfully loads, re-run discovery.\n   271\u2192            DiscoverAndRegisterStrategies();\n   272\u2192            return null;\n   273\u2192        }\n   274\u2192\n   275\u2192        #endregion\n   276\u2192\n   277\u2192        #region IDisposable Implementation \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n   278\u2192\n   279\u2192        public void Dispose()\n   280\u2192        {\n   281\u2192            if (_disposed) return;\n   282\u2192\n   283\u2192            if (_assemblyLoadToken != null)\n   284\u2192            {\n   285\u2192                AssemblyLoadContext.Default.Resolving -= OnAssemblyResolve;\n   286\u2192            }\n   287\u2192\n   288\u2192            _disposed = true;\n   289\u2192            GC.SuppressFinalize(this);\n   290\u2192        }\n   291\u2192\n   292\u2192        #endregion\n   293\u2192    }\n   294\u2192\n   295\u2192    #endregion\n   296\u2192\n   297\u2192    #region Example Default Strategies \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n   298\u2192    // NOTE: In the real codebase, these would live in separate files/assemblies.\n   299\u2192    // They are included here to make this compilation unit self-contained.\n   300\u2192\n   301\u2192    /// <summary>A very naive transformation for calendar events.</summary>\n   302\u2192    internal sealed class CalendarDefaultStrategy : ITransformationStrategy\n   303\u2192    {\n   304\u2192        public string Name => nameof(CalendarDefaultStrategy);\n   305\u2192        public DataStreamType StreamType => DataStreamType.Calendar;\n   306\u2192\n   307\u2192        public Task<TransformedRecord> TransformAsync(RawRecord record, CancellationToken ct = default)\n   308\u2192        {\n   309\u2192            // In reality, JSON parse + domain enrichment occurs here.\n   310\u2192            var transformed = new TransformedRecord\n   311\u2192            {\n   312\u2192                StreamType        = record.StreamType,\n   313\u2192                NormalizedPayload = record.Payload.ToUpperInvariant(),\n   314\u2192                ObservedAtUtc     = record.TimestampUtc,\n   315\u2192                Attributes = new Dictionary<string, string>\n   316\u2192                {\n   317\u2192                    [\"DummyAttribute\"] = \"CalendarTransformed\"\n   318\u2192                }\n   319\u2192            };\n   320\u2192\n   321\u2192            return Task.FromResult(transformed);\n   322\u2192        }\n   323\u2192    }\n   324\u2192\n   325\u2192    /// <summary>Baseline strategy for CI/CD telemetry.</summary>\n   326\u2192    internal sealed class CiCdDefaultStrategy : ITransformationStrategy\n   327\u2192    {\n   328\u2192        public string Name => nameof(CiCdDefaultStrategy);\n   329\u2192        public DataStreamType StreamType => DataStreamType.CiCd;\n   330\u2192\n   331\u2192        public Task<TransformedRecord> TransformAsync(RawRecord record, CancellationToken ct = default)\n   332\u2192        {\n   333\u2192            var normalized = record.Payload\n   334\u2192                .Replace(\"BUILD\", \"\ud83d\udee0\ufe0f \") // Example transformation\n   335\u2192                .Trim();\n   336\u2192\n   337\u2192            var transformed = new TransformedRecord\n   338\u2192            {\n   339\u2192                StreamType        = record.StreamType,\n   340\u2192                NormalizedPayload = normalized,\n   341\u2192                ObservedAtUtc     = record.TimestampUtc,\n   342\u2192                Attributes = new Dictionary<string, string>\n   343\u2192                {\n   344\u2192                    [\"BuildId\"] = Guid.NewGuid().ToString(\"N\")\n   345\u2192                }\n   346\u2192            };\n   347\u2192\n   348\u2192            return Task.FromResult(transformed);\n   349\u2192        }\n   350\u2192    }\n   351\u2192\n   352\u2192    #endregion\n   353\u2192}\n   354\u2192```\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
74. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/app/project/src/module_51.txt"
}
Output
"     1\u2192```csharp\n     2\u2192// -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n     3\u2192//  File:        module_51.cs\n     4\u2192//  Project:     PulseOps Warehouse \u2014 Serverless Productivity Intelligence Fabric\n     5\u2192//  Description: Implements a pluggable Strategy-Pattern\u2013based transformation that converts raw\n     6\u2192//               calendar events into an analytical \u201cMeeting-Cost Index\u201d metric.  The component is\n     7\u2192//               purposely stateless and therefore Lambda/Serverless-friendly.\n     8\u2192//\n     9\u2192//  NOTE: The file is self-contained for illustration purposes.  In the full PulseOps solution all\n    10\u2192//        abstractions (ITransformationStrategy, domain records, etc.) live in dedicated shared\n    11\u2192//        libraries and are wired up via Dependency-Injection.\n    12\u2192//\n    13\u2192//  Author:      PulseOps Engineering\n    14\u2192//  -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n    15\u2192#nullable enable\n    16\u2192using System;\n    17\u2192using System.Collections.Concurrent;\n    18\u2192using System.Collections.Generic;\n    19\u2192using System.Globalization;\n    20\u2192using System.Linq;\n    21\u2192using System.Threading;\n    22\u2192using System.Threading.Tasks;\n    23\u2192using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;\n    24\u2192\n    25\u2192namespace PulseOps.Warehouse.Transformations.MeetingCost\n    26\u2192{\n    27\u2192    #region Domain Models\n    28\u2192\n    29\u2192    /// <summary>\n    30\u2192    /// Raw calendar event emitted by the <c>CalendarIngestionLambda</c>.\n    31\u2192    /// </summary>\n    32\u2192    /// <param name=\"Id\">Globally unique identifier (GUID v4).</param>\n    33\u2192    /// <param name=\"OrganizerEmail\">E-mail of the meeting organizer; doubled as primary owner.</param>\n    34\u2192    /// <param name=\"AttendeeEmails\">All invited attendees including organizer.</param>\n    35\u2192    /// <param name=\"StartUtc\">Meeting start in UTC.</param>\n
