36\u2192    /// <param name=\"EndUtc\">Meeting end in UTC.</param>\n    37\u2192    /// <param name=\"IsExternal\">True when at least one attendee has a non-corporate domain.</param>\n    38\u2192    public sealed record MeetingEvent(\n    39\u2192        Guid Id,\n    40\u2192        string OrganizerEmail,\n    41\u2192        IReadOnlyCollection<string> AttendeeEmails,\n    42\u2192        DateTime StartUtc,\n    43\u2192        DateTime EndUtc,\n    44\u2192        bool IsExternal);\n    45\u2192\n    46\u2192    /// <summary>\n    47\u2192    /// Final KPI record that gets persisted to the data-lake parquet table\n    48\u2192    /// <c>analytics.meeting_cost_index</c>.\n    49\u2192    /// </summary>\n    50\u2192    /// <param name=\"Id\">Meeting GUID (source of truth) / partition key.</param>\n    51\u2192    /// <param name=\"CostUsd\">Aggregated estimated cost of the meeting expressed in USD.</param>\n    52\u2192    /// <param name=\"DurationMinutes\">Duration (EndUtc-StartUtc) in minutes.</param>\n    53\u2192    /// <param name=\"CostModelVersion\">Semantic version identifying the cost algorithm.</param>\n    54\u2192    /// <param name=\"GeneratedAtUtc\">Time at which the KPI was computed.</param>\n    55\u2192    public sealed record MeetingCostRecord(\n    56\u2192        Guid Id,\n    57\u2192        decimal CostUsd,\n    58\u2192        int DurationMinutes,\n    59\u2192        string CostModelVersion,\n    60\u2192        DateTime GeneratedAtUtc);\n    61\u2192\n    62\u2192    #endregion\n    63\u2192\n    64\u2192    #region Transformation Abstractions\n    65\u2192\n    66\u2192    /// <summary>\n    67\u2192    /// Generic contract for transformation strategies inside PulseOps.\n    68\u2192    /// </summary>\n    69\u2192    /// <typeparam name=\"TIn\">Input record.</typeparam>\n    70\u2192    /// <typeparam name=\"TOut\">Output record.</typeparam>\n    71\u2192    public interface ITransformationStrategy<in TIn, TOut>\n    72\u2192    {\n    73\u2192        /// <summary>\n    74\u2192        /// Transforms a sequence of <typeparamref name=\"TIn\"/> records into <typeparamref name=\"TOut\"/> KPI\n    75\u2192        /// records in a non-blocking fashion.  Implementations must be thread-safe.\n    76\u2192        /// </summary>\n    77\u2192        Task<IReadOnlyCollection<TOut>> TransformAsync(\n    78\u2192            IReadOnlyCollection<TIn> input,\n    79\u2192            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);\n    80\u2192    }\n    81\u2192\n    82\u2192    #endregion\n    83\u2192\n    84\u2192    #region Cost-Model Strategies\n    85\u2192\n    86\u2192    /// <summary>\n    87\u2192    /// Enumeration of supported meeting cost models.\n    88\u2192    /// </summary>\n    89\u2192    public enum CostModelType\n    90\u2192    {\n    91\u2192        SimpleAverage = 0,\n    92\u2192        RoleBased = 1,\n    93\u2192        GeoAdjusted = 2\n    94\u2192    }\n    95\u2192\n    96\u2192    /// <summary>\n    97\u2192    /// Strategy for calculating the cost of a single meeting.\n    98\u2192    /// </summary>\n    99\u2192    internal interface ICostModelStrategy\n   100\u2192    {\n   101\u2192        string Version { get; }\n   102\u2192\n   103\u2192        /// <summary>\n   104\u2192        /// Computes cost in USD for the supplied <paramref name=\"meeting\"/>.\n   105\u2192        /// </summary>\n   106\u2192        decimal CalculateCost(MeetingEvent meeting);\n   107\u2192    }\n   108\u2192\n   109\u2192    /// <summary>\n   110\u2192    /// Calculates meeting cost using a company-wide flat hourly rate.\n   111\u2192    /// </summary>\n   112\u2192    internal sealed class SimpleAverageCostModelStrategy : ICostModelStrategy\n   113\u2192    {\n   114\u2192        // Flat hourly cost per participant (pulled from Finance KPI).\n   115\u2192        private readonly decimal _hourlyRateUsd;\n   116\u2192\n   117\u2192        public SimpleAverageCostModelStrategy(decimal hourlyRateUsd = 75m) =>\n   118\u2192            _hourlyRateUsd = hourlyRateUsd;\n   119\u2192\n   120\u2192        public string Version => \"simple-average-v1.0.0\";\n   121\u2192\n   122\u2192        public decimal CalculateCost(MeetingEvent meeting)\n   123\u2192        {\n   124\u2192            var durationHours = (decimal)(meeting.EndUtc - meeting.StartUtc).TotalHours;\n   125\u2192            if (durationHours <= 0)\n   126\u2192                return 0m;\n   127\u2192\n   128\u2192            var participants = meeting.AttendeeEmails.Count;\n   129\u2192            return Math.Round(durationHours * participants * _hourlyRateUsd, 2);\n   130\u2192        }\n   131\u2192    }\n   132\u2192\n   133\u2192    /// <summary>\n   134\u2192    /// Calculates meeting cost by mapping an attendee\u2019s role/seniority to a blended hourly rate.\n   135\u2192    /// </summary>\n   136\u2192    internal sealed class RoleBasedCostModelStrategy : ICostModelStrategy\n   137\u2192    {\n   138\u2192        private readonly IReadOnlyDictionary<string, decimal> _roleHourlyRateMap;\n   139\u2192\n   140\u2192        public RoleBasedCostModelStrategy(IReadOnlyDictionary<string, decimal>? roleHourlyRateMap = null)\n   141\u2192        {\n   142\u2192            // Fallback defaults if none are supplied (USD).\n   143\u2192            _roleHourlyRateMap = roleHourlyRateMap ?? new Dictionary<string, decimal>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)\n   144\u2192            {\n   145\u2192                [\"engineer\"]       = 85m,\n   146\u2192                [\"senior engineer\"] = 110m,\n   147\u2192                [\"manager\"]        = 125m,\n   148\u2192                [\"director\"]       = 175m,\n   149\u2192                [\"vp\"]             = 235m,\n   150\u2192            };\n   151\u2192        }\n   152\u2192\n   153\u2192        public string Version => \"role-based-v2.1.3\";\n   154\u2192\n   155\u2192        // A naive mapping from e-mail alias to role. In production this would query Workday or\n   156\u2192        // the company directory.  Kept simple for stand-alone compilation.\n   157\u2192        private string ResolveRole(string email)\n   158\u2192        {\n   159\u2192            var alias = email.Split('@', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries)[0];\n   160\u2192            return alias.Contains(\".mgr\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ? \"manager\"\n   161\u2192                 : alias.Contains(\".dir\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ? \"director\"\n   162\u2192                 : alias.Contains(\".vp\",  StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ? \"vp\"\n   163\u2192                 : \"engineer\";\n   164\u2192        }\n   165\u2192\n   166\u2192        public decimal CalculateCost(MeetingEvent meeting)\n   167\u2192        {\n   168\u2192            var durationHours = (decimal)(meeting.EndUtc - meeting.StartUtc).TotalHours;\n   169\u2192            if (durationHours <= 0)\n   170\u2192                return 0m;\n   171\u2192\n   172\u2192            decimal total = 0m;\n   173\u2192            foreach (var email in meeting.AttendeeEmails)\n   174\u2192            {\n   175\u2192                var role = ResolveRole(email);\n   176\u2192                var rate = _roleHourlyRateMap.TryGetValue(role, out var val) ? val : _roleHourlyRateMap[\"engineer\"];\n   177\u2192                total += rate * durationHours;\n   178\u2192            }\n   179\u2192\n   180\u2192            return Math.Round(total, 2);\n   181\u2192        }\n   182\u2192    }\n   183\u2192\n   184\u2192    /// <summary>\n   185\u2192    /// Calculates cost leveraging the geographical location of each attendee (time-zone proxy).\n   186\u2192    /// </summary>\n   187\u2192    internal sealed class GeoAdjustedCostModelStrategy : ICostModelStrategy\n   188\u2192    {\n   189\u2192        private readonly IReadOnlyDictionary<string, decimal> _geoHourlyRateMultiplier;\n   190\u2192\n   191\u2192        public GeoAdjustedCostModelStrategy(IReadOnlyDictionary<string, decimal>? geoHourlyRateMultiplier = null)\n   192\u2192        {\n   193\u2192            // Default multipliers relative to US base rate.\n   194\u2192            _geoHourlyRateMultiplier = geoHourlyRateMultiplier ?? new Dictionary<string, decimal>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)\n   195\u2192            {\n   196\u2192                [\"us\"] = 1.0m,\n   197\u2192                [\"eu\"] = 0.9m,\n   198\u2192                [\"apac\"] = 0.75m,\n   199\u2192                [\"latam\"] = 0.6m\n   200\u2192            };\n   201\u2192        }\n   202\u2192\n   203\u2192        public string Version => \"geo-adjusted-v1.4.0\";\n   204\u2192\n   205\u2192        private static string ResolveRegion(string email)\n   206\u2192        {\n   207\u2192            // For demo purposes extract region from TLD (.us, .de, .sg, etc.)\n   208\u2192            var domain = email.Split('@').Last();\n   209\u2192            var tld = domain.Split('.').Last().ToLowerInvariant();\n   210\u2192            return tld switch\n   211\u2192            {\n   212\u2192                \"us\" or \"com\" => \"us\",\n   213\u2192                \"de\" or \"fr\" or \"uk\" => \"eu\",\n   214\u2192                \"sg\" or \"jp\" or \"au\" => \"apac\",\n   215\u2192                \"br\" or \"mx\" => \"latam\",\n   216\u2192                _ => \"us\"\n   217\u2192            };\n   218\u2192        }\n   219\u2192\n   220\u2192        public decimal CalculateCost(MeetingEvent meeting)\n   221\u2192        {\n   222\u2192            var durationHours = (decimal)(meeting.EndUtc - meeting.StartUtc).TotalHours;\n   223\u2192            if (durationHours <= 0)\n   224\u2192                return 0m;\n   225\u2192\n   226\u2192            const decimal baseRateUsd = 75m;\n   227\u2192            decimal total = 0m;\n   228\u2192            foreach (var email in meeting.AttendeeEmails)\n   229\u2192            {\n   230\u2192                var region = ResolveRegion(email);\n   231\u2192                var multiplier = _geoHourlyRateMultiplier.TryGetValue(region, out var m) ? m : 1.0m;\n   232\u2192                total += baseRateUsd * multiplier * durationHours;\n   233\u2192            }\n   234\u2192\n   235\u2192            return Math.Round(total, 2);\n   236\u2192        }\n   237\u2192    }\n   238\u2192\n   239\u2192    /// <summary>\n   240\u2192    /// Factory that resolves a concrete cost model based on <see cref=\"CostModelType\"/>.\n   241\u2192    /// </summary>\n   242\u2192    internal static class CostModelStrategyFactory\n   243\u2192    {\n   244\u2192        public static ICostModelStrategy Resolve(CostModelType type) =>\n   245\u2192            type switch\n   246\u2192            {\n   247\u2192                CostModelType.SimpleAverage => new SimpleAverageCostModelStrategy(),\n   248\u2192                CostModelType.RoleBased     => new RoleBasedCostModelStrategy(),\n   249\u2192                CostModelType.GeoAdjusted   => new GeoAdjustedCostModelStrategy(),\n   250\u2192                _                            => throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(type), type, null)\n   251\u2192            };\n   252\u2192    }\n   253\u2192\n   254\u2192    #endregion\n   255\u2192\n   256\u2192    #region Transformation Implementation\n   257\u2192\n   258\u2192    /// <summary>\n   259\u2192    /// Transforms <see cref=\"MeetingEvent\"/> streams into <see cref=\"MeetingCostRecord\"/> streams by\n   260\u2192    /// delegating cost calculation to a pluggable strategy selected at run-time.\n   261\u2192    /// </summary>\n   262\u2192    public sealed class MeetingCostTransformationStrategy\n   263\u2192        : ITransformationStrategy<MeetingEvent, MeetingCostRecord>\n   264\u2192    {\n   265\u2192        private readonly ILogger<MeetingCostTransformationStrategy> _logger;\n   266\u2192        private readonly ICostModelStrategy _costModel;\n   267\u2192        private readonly int _parallelismDegree;\n   268\u2192\n   269\u2192        public MeetingCostTransformationStrategy(\n   270\u2192            ILogger<MeetingCostTransformationStrategy> logger,\n   271\u2192            CostModelType modelType,\n   272\u2192            int parallelismDegree = 4)\n   273\u2192        {\n   274\u2192            _logger = logger ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(logger));\n   275\u2192            _costModel = CostModelStrategyFactory.Resolve(modelType);\n   276\u2192            _parallelismDegree = Math.Clamp(parallelismDegree, min: 1, max: Environment.ProcessorCount);\n   277\u2192        }\n   278\u2192\n   279\u2192        /// <inheritdoc/>\n   280\u2192        public async Task<IReadOnlyCollection<MeetingCostRecord>> TransformAsync(\n   281\u2192            IReadOnlyCollection<MeetingEvent> input,\n   282\u2192            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)\n   283\u2192        {\n   284\u2192            if (input == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(input));\n   285\u2192\n   286\u2192            if (input.Count == 0)\n   287\u2192            {\n   288\u2192                _logger.LogDebug(\"No meeting events supplied, skipping transformation.\");\n   289\u2192                return Array.Empty<MeetingCostRecord>();\n   290\u2192            }\n   291\u2192\n   292\u2192            _logger.LogInformation(\n   293\u2192                \"Starting Meeting-Cost transformation for {Count} events using {StrategyVersion}.\",\n   294\u2192                input.Count, _costModel.Version);\n   295\u2192\n   296\u2192            var bag = new ConcurrentBag<MeetingCostRecord>();\n   297\u2192\n   298\u2192            // Use Task.Run with throttling to asynchronously compute costs.\n   299\u2192            var throttler = new SemaphoreSlim(_parallelismDegree);\n   300\u2192            var tasks = input.Select(async meeting =>\n   301\u2192            {\n   302\u2192                await throttler.WaitAsync(cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(false);\n   303\u2192                try\n   304\u2192                {\n   305\u2192                    var cost = _costModel.CalculateCost(meeting);\n   306\u2192                    var record = new MeetingCostRecord(\n   307\u2192                        Id: meeting.Id,\n   308\u2192                        CostUsd: cost,\n   309\u2192                        DurationMinutes: (int)(meeting.EndUtc - meeting.StartUtc).TotalMinutes,\n   310\u2192                        CostModelVersion: _costModel.Version,\n   311\u2192                        GeneratedAtUtc: DateTime.UtcNow);\n   312\u2192\n   313\u2192                    bag.Add(record);\n   314\u2192\n   315\u2192                    if (cost == 0m)\n   316\u2192                    {\n   317\u2192                        _logger.LogDebug(\n   318\u2192                            \"Meeting {MeetingId} produced zero cost (possibly invalid duration).\", meeting.Id);\n   319\u2192                    }\n   320\u2192                }\n   321\u2192                catch (Exception ex)\n   322\u2192                {\n   323\u2192                    _logger.LogError(ex, \"Failed to calculate cost for meeting {MeetingId}.\", meeting.Id);\n   324\u2192                }\n   325\u2192                finally\n   326\u2192                {\n   327\u2192                    throttler.Release();\n   328\u2192                }\n   329\u2192            }).ToArray();\n   330\u2192\n   331\u2192            await Task.WhenAll(tasks).ConfigureAwait(false);\n   332\u2192\n   333\u2192            var output = bag.ToArray();\n   334\u2192            _logger.LogInformation(\n   335\u2192                \"Meeting-Cost transformation finished. Produced {Count} KPI records.\", output.Length);\n   336\u2192\n   337\u2192            return output;\n   338\u2192        }\n   339\u2192    }\n   340\u2192\n   341\u2192    #endregion\n   342\u2192}\n   343\u2192```\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
75. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/app/project/src/module_26.txt"
}
Output
"     1\u2192```csharp\n     2\u2192// File: src/module_26.txt\n     3\u2192// Project: PulseOps Warehouse \u2014 Serverless Productivity Intelligence Fabric\n     4\u2192//\n     5\u2192// This module defines an in-memory transformation pipeline that is leveraged by\n     6\u2192// multiple Lambda micro-components to turn raw calendar-event payloads into\n     7\u2192// actionable KPI artefacts (e.g., Focus-Time Ratio).\n     8\u2192//\n     9\u2192// The implementation purposefully mirrors the ASP.NET Core middleware pattern,\n    10\u2192// giving engineers a familiar, highly-composable model while remaining\n    11\u2192// framework-agnostic and entirely serverless-friendly.\n    12\u2192//\n    13\u2192// NOTE: The pipeline deals exclusively with memory streams and therefore plays\n    14\u2192// nicely inside Lambda\u2019s \u201cno /tmp writes\u201d constrained runtime.\n    15\u2192// ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n    16\u2192\n    17\u2192#nullable enable\n    18\u2192using System;\n    19\u2192using System.Collections.Generic;\n    20\u2192using System.IO;\n    21\u2192using System.Text.Json;\n    22\u2192using System.Text.Json.Serialization;\n    23\u2192using System.Threading;\n    24\u2192using System.Threading.Tasks;\n    25\u2192using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;\n    26\u2192\n    27\u2192namespace PulseOps.Warehouse.Transformations\n    28\u2192{\n    29\u2192    #region Contracts & DTOs\n    30\u2192\n    31\u2192    /// <summary>\n    32\u2192    /// Represents the canonical envelope that every incoming event is wrapped in\n    33\u2192    /// once it lands inside the warehouse fabric.\n    34\u2192    /// </summary>\n    35\u2192    public sealed record RecordEnvelope(\n    36\u2192        Guid Id,\n    37\u2192        string SourceSystem,\n    38\u2192        string EventType,\n    39\u2192        Stream Payload,\n    40\u2192        DateTimeOffset IngestedAtUtc);\n    41\u2192\n    42\u2192    /// <summary>\n    43\u2192    /// Output artefact produced by a transformation pipeline run.\n    44\u2192    /// </summary>\n    45\u2192    public sealed record TransformationResult(\n    46\u2192        Guid Id,\n    47\u2192        bool Success,\n    48\u2192        DateTimeOffset ProducedAtUtc,\n    49\u2192        string? FailureReason,\n    50\u2192        JsonElement? Data);\n    51\u2192\n    52\u2192    /// <summary>\n    53\u2192    /// Pipeline context object that is threaded through each transformation step.\n    54\u2192    /// </summary>\n    55\u2192    public sealed class TransformationContext\n    56\u2192    {\n    57\u2192        public TransformationContext(RecordEnvelope envelope, ILogger logger)\n    58\u2192        {\n    59\u2192            Envelope = envelope ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(envelope));\n    60\u2192            Logger   = logger   ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(logger));\n    61\u2192            Items    = new Dictionary<string, object>(StringComparer.Ordinal);\n    62\u2192        }\n    63\u2192\n    64\u2192        public RecordEnvelope Envelope { get; }\n    65\u2192\n    66\u2192        public ILogger Logger { get; }\n    67\u2192\n    68\u2192        /// <summary>\n    69\u2192        /// A shared bag for passing data between steps without tight coupling.\n    70\u2192        /// </summary>\n    71\u2192        public IDictionary<string, object> Items { get; }\n    72\u2192\n    73\u2192        /// <summary>\n    74\u2192        /// Convenience helper for strongly-typed item retrieval.\n    75\u2192        /// </summary>\n    76\u2192        public T GetItem<T>(string key) => (T)Items[key];\n    77\u2192\n    78\u2192        /// <summary>\n    79\u2192        /// Convenience helper for item upsert.\n    80\u2192        /// </summary>\n    81\u2192        public void SetItem<T>(string key, T value) => Items[key] = value!;\n    82\u2192    }\n    83\u2192\n    84\u2192    #endregion\n    85\u2192\n    86\u2192    #region Pipeline Core\n    87\u2192\n    88\u2192    /// <summary>\n    89\u2192    /// Signature of a transformation delegate (i.e., a pipeline step).\n    90\u2192    /// </summary>\n    91\u2192    /// <param name=\"context\">Current pipeline context.</param>\n    92\u2192    /// <param name=\"cancellationToken\">Task cancellation token.</param>\n    93\u2192    public delegate Task<TransformationResult> TransformationDelegate(\n    94\u2192        TransformationContext context,\n    95\u2192        CancellationToken cancellationToken);\n    96\u2192\n    97\u2192    /// <summary>\n    98\u2192    /// Interface that each transformation step must implement.\n    99\u2192    /// </summary>\n   100\u2192    public interface ITransformationStep\n   101\u2192    {\n   102\u2192        Task<TransformationResult> InvokeAsync(\n   103\u2192            TransformationContext context,\n   104\u2192            TransformationDelegate next,\n   105\u2192            CancellationToken cancellationToken);\n   106\u2192    }\n   107\u2192\n   108\u2192    /// <summary>\n   109\u2192    /// Configurable pipeline that executes registered <see cref=\"ITransformationStep\"/> instances\n   110\u2192    /// in the order they were added.\n   111\u2192    /// </summary>\n   112\u2192    public sealed class TransformationPipeline\n   113\u2192    {\n   114\u2192        private readonly IList<Func<TransformationDelegate, TransformationDelegate>> _components =\n   115\u2192            new List<Func<TransformationDelegate, TransformationDelegate>>();\n   116\u2192\n   117\u2192        /// <summary>\n   118\u2192        /// Registers a transformation step.\n   119\u2192        /// </summary>\n   120\u2192        public TransformationPipeline Use<TStep>() where TStep : ITransformationStep, new()\n   121\u2192        {\n   122\u2192            _components.Add(next =>\n   123\u2192            {\n   124\u2192                var step = new TStep();\n   125\u2192                return (ctx, token) => step.InvokeAsync(ctx, next, token);\n   126\u2192            });\n   127\u2192\n   128\u2192            return this;\n   129\u2192        }\n   130\u2192\n   131\u2192        /// <summary>\n   132\u2192        /// Registers an inline transformation step via delegate (syntactic sugar).\n   133\u2192        /// </summary>\n   134\u2192        public TransformationPipeline Use(Func<TransformationContext, CancellationToken, Task> step)\n   135\u2192        {\n   136\u2192            if (step == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(step));\n   137\u2192\n   138\u2192            _components.Add(next => async (ctx, token) =>\n   139\u2192            {\n   140\u2192                await step(ctx, token).ConfigureAwait(false);\n   141\u2192                return await next(ctx, token).ConfigureAwait(false);\n   142\u2192            });\n   143\u2192\n   144\u2192            return this;\n   145\u2192        }\n   146\u2192\n   147\u2192        /// <summary>\n   148\u2192        /// Builds a <see cref=\"TransformationDelegate\"/> that can be executed.\n   149\u2192        /// </summary>\n   150\u2192        public TransformationDelegate Build()\n   151\u2192        {\n   152\u2192            TransformationDelegate app = async (ctx, token) =>\n   153\u2192            {\n   154\u2192                // Terminal delegate (runs if every preceding step succeeded)\n   155\u2192                ctx.Logger.LogDebug(\"Transformation pipeline terminated successfully for event {EventId}.\",\n   156\u2192                    ctx.Envelope.Id);\n   157\u2192\n   158\u2192                return new TransformationResult(\n   159\u2192                    ctx.Envelope.Id,\n   160\u2192                    Success: true,\n   161\u2192                    ProducedAtUtc: DateTimeOffset.UtcNow,\n   162\u2192                    FailureReason: null,\n   163\u2192                    Data: ctx.Items.TryGetValue(WellKnownContextKeys.Output, out var data)\n   164\u2192                        ? (JsonElement?)data\n   165\u2192                        : null);\n   166\u2192            };\n   167\u2192\n   168\u2192            // Build pipeline backwards.\n   169\u2192            for (var i = _components.Count - 1; i >= 0; i--)\n   170\u2192            {\n   171\u2192                app = _components[i](app);\n   172\u2192            }\n   173\u2192\n   174\u2192            return app;\n   175\u2192        }\n   176\u2192\n   177\u2192        private static class WellKnownContextKeys\n   178\u2192        {\n   179\u2192            public const string Output = \"OUTPUT_JSON\";\n   180\u2192        }\n   181\u2192    }\n   182\u2192\n   183\u2192    #endregion\n   184\u2192\n   185\u2192    #region Built-In Steps\n   186\u2192\n   187\u2192    /// <summary>\n   188\u2192    /// Performs basic sanity checks on the incoming envelope.\n   189\u2192    /// </summary>\n   190\u2192    public sealed class ValidationStep : ITransformationStep\n   191\u2192    {\n   192\u2192        public Task<TransformationResult> InvokeAsync(\n   193\u2192            TransformationContext context,\n   194\u2192            TransformationDelegate next,\n   195\u2192            CancellationToken cancellationToken)\n   196\u2192        {\n   197\u2192            var env = context.Envelope;\n   198\u2192\n   199\u2192            if (env.Payload is null || env.Payload.Length == 0)\n   200\u2192            {\n   201\u2192                context.Logger.LogWarning(\n   202\u2192                    \"Validation failed for event {EventId}: payload missing.\",\n   203\u2192                    env.Id);\n   204\u2192\n   205\u2192                return Task.FromResult(new TransformationResult(\n   206\u2192                    env.Id,\n   207\u2192                    Success: false,\n   208\u2192                    ProducedAtUtc: DateTimeOffset.UtcNow,\n   209\u2192                    FailureReason: \"PayloadMissing\",\n   210\u2192                    Data: null));\n   211\u2192            }\n   212\u2192\n   213\u2192            return next(context, cancellationToken);\n   214\u2192        }\n   215\u2192    }\n   216\u2192\n   217\u2192    /// <summary>\n   218\u2192    /// Deserializes the raw payload into a typed <see cref=\"CalendarEventBatch\"/>.\n   219\u2192    /// </summary>\n   220\u2192    public sealed class CalendarEventDeserializationStep : ITransformationStep\n   221\u2192    {\n   222\u2192        private static readonly JsonSerializerOptions _options = new()\n   223\u2192        {\n   224\u2192            PropertyNameCaseInsensitive = true,\n   225\u2192            Converters = { new JsonStringEnumConverter() }\n   226\u2192        };\n   227\u2192\n   228\u2192        public async Task<TransformationResult> InvokeAsync(\n   229\u2192            TransformationContext context,\n   230\u2192            TransformationDelegate next,\n   231\u2192            CancellationToken cancellationToken)\n   232\u2192        {\n   233\u2192            try\n   234\u2192            {\n   235\u2192                using var reader = new StreamReader(context.Envelope.Payload, leaveOpen: true);\n   236\u2192                var json = await reader.ReadToEndAsync().ConfigureAwait(false);\n   237\u2192\n   238\u2192                var batch = JsonSerializer.Deserialize<CalendarEventBatch>(json, _options)\n   239\u2192                            ?? throw new InvalidDataException(\"Unable to deserialize calendar payload.\");\n   240\u2192\n   241\u2192                context.SetItem(ContextKeys.CalendarBatch, batch);\n   242\u2192\n   243\u2192                return await next(context, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(false);\n   244\u2192            }\n   245\u2192            catch (JsonException jx)\n   246\u2192            {\n   247\u2192                context.Logger.LogError(jx,\n   248\u2192                    \"Failed to deserialize calendar payload for event {EventId}.\",\n   249\u2192                    context.Envelope.Id);\n   250\u2192\n   251\u2192                return new TransformationResult(\n   252\u2192                    context.Envelope.Id,\n   253\u2192                    Success: false,\n   254\u2192                    ProducedAtUtc: DateTimeOffset.UtcNow,\n   255\u2192                    FailureReason: \"InvalidJson\",\n   256\u2192                    Data: null);\n   257\u2192            }\n   258\u2192        }\n   259\u2192    }\n   260\u2192\n   261\u2192    /// <summary>\n   262\u2192    /// Computes the Focus-Time ratio KPI for the given <see cref=\"CalendarEventBatch\"/>.\n   263\u2192    /// </summary>\n   264\u2192    public sealed class FocusTimeComputationStep : ITransformationStep\n   265\u2192    {\n   266\u2192        private const int MinutesPerDay = 60 * 24;\n   267\u2192\n   268\u2192        public Task<TransformationResult> InvokeAsync(\n   269\u2192            TransformationContext context,\n   270\u2192            TransformationDelegate next,\n   271\u2192            CancellationToken cancellationToken)\n   272\u2192        {\n   273\u2192            var batch = context.GetItem<CalendarEventBatch>(ContextKeys.CalendarBatch);\n   274\u2192\n   275\u2192            var totalMeetingMinutes = 0;\n   276\u2192            foreach (var ev in batch.Events)\n   277\u2192            {\n   278\u2192                if (ev.IsMeeting)\n   279\u2192                {\n   280\u2192                    totalMeetingMinutes += ev.DurationMinutes;\n   281\u2192                }\n   282\u2192            }\n   283\u2192\n   284\u2192            var focusTimeRatio = (double)(MinutesPerDay - totalMeetingMinutes) / MinutesPerDay;\n   285\u2192\n   286\u2192            var output = new\n   287\u2192            {\n   288\u2192                batch.UserId,\n   289\u2192                batch.Date,\n   290\u2192                MeetingsMinutes   = totalMeetingMinutes,\n   291\u2192                FocusTimeRatio    = Math.Round(focusTimeRatio, 4),\n   292\u2192                SourceEventId     = context.Envelope.Id\n   293\u2192            };\n   294\u2192\n   295\u2192            var json = JsonSerializer.SerializeToElement(output);\n   296\u2192            context.SetItem(TransformationPipeline.WellKnownContextKeys.Output, json);\n   297\u2192\n   298\u2192            return next(context, cancellationToken);\n   299\u2192        }\n   300\u2192    }\n   301\u2192\n   302\u2192    /// <summary>\n   303\u2192    /// Persists the computed KPI artefact to downstream storage (e.g., Data Lake).\n   304\u2192    /// In this sample implementation we simply emit to an <c>ILogger</c>; real\n   305\u2192    /// deployments would inject IAmazonS3, IAmazonKinesis, etc.\n   306\u2192    /// </summary>\n   307\u2192    public sealed class PersistenceStep : ITransformationStep\n   308\u2192    {\n   309\u2192        public Task<TransformationResult> InvokeAsync(\n   310\u2192            TransformationContext context,\n   311\u2192            TransformationDelegate next,\n   312\u2192            CancellationToken cancellationToken)\n   313\u2192        {\n   314\u2192            var output = context.GetItem<JsonElement>(TransformationPipeline.WellKnownContextKeys.Output);\n   315\u2192\n   316\u2192            context.Logger.LogInformation(\n   317\u2192                \"Persisting Focus-Time KPI for event {EventId}: {Payload}\",\n   318\u2192                context.Envelope.Id,\n   319\u2192                output.GetRawText());\n   320\u2192\n   321\u2192            // NOP persistence. Replace with actual I/O in production.\n   322\u2192            return next(context, cancellationToken);\n   323\u2192        }\n   324\u2192    }\n   325\u2192\n   326\u2192    #endregion\n   327\u2192\n   328\u2192    #region Model Definitions\n   329\u2192\n   330\u2192    public static class ContextKeys\n   331\u2192    {\n   332\u2192        public const string CalendarBatch = \"CALENDAR_BATCH\";\n   333\u2192    }\n   334\u2192\n   335\u2192    /// <summary>\n   336\u2192    /// Root object representing a batch of calendar events for a single user/day.\n   337\u2192    /// </summary>\n   338\u2192    public sealed record CalendarEventBatch(\n   339\u2192        string UserId,\n   340\u2192        DateOnly Date,\n   341\u2192        IReadOnlyList<CalendarEvent> Events);\n   342\u2192\n   343\u2192    /// <summary>\n   344\u2192    /// A single calendar entry.\n   345\u2192    /// </summary>\n   346\u2192    public sealed record CalendarEvent(\n   347\u2192        string Id,\n   348\u2192        string Title,\n   349\u2192        DateTimeOffset StartUtc,\n   350\u2192        DateTimeOffset EndUtc,\n   351\u2192        bool IsMeeting)\n   352\u2192    {\n   353\u2192        public int DurationMinutes => (int)(EndUtc - StartUtc).TotalMinutes;\n   354\u2192    }\n   355\u2192\n   356\u2192    #endregion\n   357\u2192\n   358\u2192    #region Pipeline Builder Helper\n   359\u2192\n   360\u2192    /// <summary>\n   361\u2192    /// Static helper that assembles the default Focus-Time computation pipeline.\n   362\u2192    /// </summary>\n   363\u2192    public static class DefaultFocusTimePipeline\n   364\u2192    {\n   365\u2192        public static TransformationDelegate Create(ILogger logger)\n   366\u2192        {\n   367\u2192            return new TransformationPipeline()\n   368\u2192                .Use<ValidationStep>()\n   369\u2192                .Use<CalendarEventDeserializationStep>()\n   370\u2192                .Use<FocusTimeComputationStep>()\n   371\u2192                .Use<PersistenceStep>()\n   372\u2192                .Build()\n   373\u2192                .WithLogger(logger);\n   374\u2192        }\n   375\u2192\n   376\u2192        private static TransformationDelegate WithLogger(\n   377\u2192            this TransformationDelegate delegateToWrap,\n   378\u2192            ILogger logger) =>\n   379\u2192            (ctx, token) =>\n   380\u2192            {\n   381\u2192                // Enforce logger injection so that steps relying on ILogger are never null.\n   382\u2192                var contextWithLogger = new TransformationContext(ctx.Envelope, logger);\n   383\u2192                foreach (var kvp in ctx.Items)\n   384\u2192                {\n   385\u2192                    contextWithLogger.Items[kvp.Key] = kvp.Value;\n   386\u2192                }\n   387\u2192\n   388\u2192                return delegateToWrap(contextWithLogger, token);\n   389\u2192            };\n   390\u2192    }\n   391\u2192\n   392\u2192    #endregion\n   393\u2192}\n   394\u2192```\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

Output
"     1\u2192```csharp\n     2\u2192// --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n     3\u2192// <copyright>\n     4\u2192//   \u00a9 2024 PulseOps Inc. \u2014 All rights reserved.\n     5\u2192//   Licensed under the PulseOps Enterprise License. Unauthorized copying of this file, via any medium, \n     6\u2192//   is strictly prohibited. Proprietary and confidential.\n     7\u2192// </copyright>\n     8\u2192// --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n     9\u2192// File:        src/module_3.txt (compiled as .cs file in build pipeline)\n    10\u2192// Project:     PulseOps Warehouse \u2014 Serverless Productivity Intelligence Fabric (data_warehouse)\n    11\u2192// Description: Focus-Time Ratio KPI strategy implementation and supporting infrastructure.\n    12\u2192// --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n    13\u2192\n    14\u2192using System;\n    15\u2192using System.Collections.Generic;\n    16\u2192using System.Collections.ObjectModel;\n    17\u2192using System.Globalization;\n    18\u2192using System.Linq;\n    19\u2192using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;\n    20\u2192using System.Text.Json;\n    21\u2192using System.Text.Json.Serialization;\n    22\u2192using System.Threading;\n    23\u2192using System.Threading.Tasks;\n    24\u2192using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;\n    25\u2192\n    26\u2192namespace PulseOps.Warehouse.Transformations.KpiStrategies\n    27\u2192{\n    28\u2192    #region Public-Facing Surface --------------------------------------------------------------------\n    29\u2192\n    30\u2192    /// <summary>\n    31\u2192    /// Contract every KPI strategy must fulfil.  Strategies are registered in <see cref=\"KpiStrategyRegistry\"/>\n    32\u2192    /// and resolved through dependency injection at runtime.\n    33\u2192    /// </summary>\n    34\u2192    public interface IKpiComputationStrategy\n    35\u2192    {\n    36\u2192        /// <summary>Unique machine-readable identifier for the KPI.</summary>\n    37\u2192        string KpiName { get; }\n    38\u2192\n    39\u2192        /// <summary>\n    40\u2192        /// Asynchronous computation entry-point.  \n    41\u2192        /// </summary>\n    42\u2192        /// <param name=\"context\">The context containing all relevant raw material for the KPI.</param>\n    43\u2192        /// <param name=\"cancellationToken\">Cancellation token for cooperative cancellation.</param>\n    44\u2192        /// <returns>The calculation result wrapped in <see cref=\"KpiResult\"/>.</returns>\n    45\u2192        Task<KpiResult> ComputeAsync(\n    46\u2192            KpiComputationContext context, \n    47\u2192            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);\n    48\u2192    }\n    49\u2192\n    50\u2192    /// <summary>DI-friendly registry for run-time discovery of KPI strategies.</summary>\n    51\u2192    public static class KpiStrategyRegistry\n    52\u2192    {\n    53\u2192        private static readonly Dictionary<string, Type> _strategies = new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n    54\u2192\n    55\u2192        /// <summary>Registers a strategy type.</summary>\n    56\u2192        public static void Register<T>() where T : IKpiComputationStrategy, new()\n    57\u2192            => _strategies[Activator.CreateInstance<T>().KpiName] = typeof(T);\n    58\u2192\n    59\u2192        /// <summary>Resolves a strategy given its <paramref name=\"kpiName\"/>.</summary>\n    60\u2192        /// <exception cref=\"KeyNotFoundException\"/>\n    61\u2192        public static IKpiComputationStrategy Resolve(string kpiName, IServiceProvider serviceProvider)\n    62\u2192        {\n    63\u2192            if (!_strategies.TryGetValue(kpiName, out var type))\n    64\u2192                throw new KeyNotFoundException($\"No KPI strategy registered for '{kpiName}'.\");\n    65\u2192\n    66\u2192            // Prefer serviceProvider when type is registered in DI, otherwise fallback to reflection.\n    67\u2192            return (IKpiComputationStrategy)(serviceProvider.GetService(type) ?? Activator.CreateInstance(type)!);\n    68\u2192        }\n    69\u2192    }\n    70\u2192\n    71\u2192    /// <summary>\n    72\u2192    ///     A single, immutable KPI result.  Instances are emitted by <see cref=\"IKpiComputationStrategy\"/>.\n    73\u2192    /// </summary>\n    74\u2192    /// <param name=\"Name\">KPI identifier (snake_case).</param>\n    75\u2192    /// <param name=\"Value\">Calculated numeric value.</param>\n    76\u2192    /// <param name=\"WindowStart\">Inclusive lower bound of the time-window the KPI covers (UTC).</param>\n    77\u2192    /// <param name=\"WindowEnd\">Exclusive upper bound.</param>\n    78\u2192    /// <param name=\"Metadata\">Optional, arbitrarily nested metadata for downstream consumers.</param>\n    79\u2192    public sealed record KpiResult(\n    80\u2192        string Name,\n    81\u2192        double Value,\n    82\u2192        DateTimeOffset WindowStart,\n    83\u2192        DateTimeOffset WindowEnd,\n    84\u2192        IReadOnlyDictionary<string, object>? Metadata = null\n    85\u2192    )\n    86\u2192    {\n    87\u2192        /// <summary>Serializes the KPI result using standard JSON options for wire transport.</summary>\n    88\u2192        public string ToJson() => JsonSerializer.Serialize(this, JsonSerialization.Options);\n    89\u2192    }\n    90\u2192\n    91\u2192    #endregion\n    92\u2192\n    93\u2192    #region Context + Domain Models ------------------------------------------------------------------\n    94\u2192\n    95\u2192    /// <summary>\n    96\u2192    /// Context passed to strategies containing raw events within a given window.\n    97\u2192    /// Any additional pre-computed aggregations should be exposed here\n    98\u2192    /// to avoid recomputation in downstream strategies.\n    99\u2192    /// </summary>\n   100\u2192    public sealed class KpiComputationContext\n   101\u2192    {\n   102\u2192        /// <summary>All calendar events (meetings, focus blocks, OOO) in the window.</summary>\n   103\u2192        public IReadOnlyList<CalendarEvent> CalendarEvents { get; init; } = Array.Empty<CalendarEvent>();\n   104\u2192\n   105\u2192        /// <summary>\n   106\u2192        /// Start of the window (inclusive, UTC).  \n   107\u2192        /// Assumes the same for all datasets inside this context.\n   108\u2192        /// </summary>\n   109\u2192        public DateTimeOffset WindowStart { get; init; }\n   110\u2192\n   111\u2192        /// <summary>End of the window (exclusive, UTC).</summary>\n   112\u2192        public DateTimeOffset WindowEnd { get; init; }\n   113\u2192\n   114\u2192        /// <summary>A shared logger instance pre-configured with Lambda contextual metadata.</summary>\n   115\u2192        public ILogger Logger { get; init; } = NullLogger.Instance;\n   116\u2192    }\n   117\u2192\n   118\u2192    /// <summary>Canonical representation of a calendar event after ETL normalization.</summary>\n   119\u2192    public sealed record CalendarEvent(\n   120\u2192        DateTimeOffset Start,\n   121\u2192        DateTimeOffset End,\n   122\u2192        CalendarEventType EventType,\n   123\u2192        string Organizer,\n   124\u2192        string Title,\n   125\u2192        IReadOnlyList<string> Attendees\n   126\u2192    )\n   127\u2192    {\n   128\u2192        public TimeSpan Duration => End - Start;\n   129\u2192\n   130\u2192        public bool OverlapsWith(DateTimeOffset windowStart, DateTimeOffset windowEnd)\n   131\u2192            => !(End <= windowStart || Start >= windowEnd);\n   132\u2192    }\n   133\u2192\n   134\u2192    public enum CalendarEventType\n   135\u2192    {\n   136\u2192        Meeting,\n   137\u2192        Focus,\n   138\u2192        OutOfOffice,\n   139\u2192        Break\n   140\u2192    }\n   141\u2192\n   142\u2192    #endregion\n   143\u2192\n   144\u2192    #region Strategy Implementation ------------------------------------------------------------------\n   145\u2192\n   146\u2192    /// <summary>\n   147\u2192    /// Focus-Time Ratio:  (Total Focus Time) / (Total Meeting Time + Total Focus Time)\n   148\u2192    /// Produces a value in the range [0, 1].  If both denominators are zero, value is <c>double.NaN</c>.\n   149\u2192    /// </summary>\n   150\u2192    public sealed class FocusTimeRatioStrategy : IKpiComputationStrategy\n   151\u2192    {\n   152\u2192        public const string Identifier = \"focus_time_ratio\";\n   153\u2192\n   154\u2192        public string KpiName => Identifier;\n   155\u2192\n   156\u2192        /// <inheritdoc />\n   157\u2192        public async Task<KpiResult> ComputeAsync(\n   158\u2192            KpiComputationContext context,\n   159\u2192            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)\n   160\u2192        {\n   161\u2192            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(context);\n   162\u2192\n   163\u2192            var logger = context.Logger ?? NullLogger.Instance;\n   164\u2192            using var _ = logger.BeginScope(\"{Kpi}\", Identifier);\n   165\u2192\n   166\u2192            logger.LogDebug(\"Starting KPI computation.\");\n   167\u2192\n   168\u2192            // Filter events that overlap with computation window.\n   169\u2192            var windowEvents = context.CalendarEvents\n   170\u2192                                      .Where(e => e.OverlapsWith(context.WindowStart, context.WindowEnd))\n   171\u2192                                      .ToArray();\n   172\u2192\n   173\u2192            logger.LogDebug(\"Found {Count} overlapping calendar events.\", windowEvents.Length);\n   174\u2192\n   175\u2192            // Compute durations.\n   176\u2192            var focusDuration   = AggregateDuration(windowEvents, CalendarEventType.Focus);\n   177\u2192            var meetingDuration = AggregateDuration(windowEvents, CalendarEventType.Meeting);\n   178\u2192\n   179\u2192            // Defensive checks for cancellation.\n   180\u2192            cancellationToken.ThrowIfCancellationRequested();\n   181\u2192\n   182\u2192            double ratio;\n   183\u2192            try\n   184\u2192            {\n   185\u2192                ratio = ComputeRatio(focusDuration, meetingDuration);\n   186\u2192            }\n   187\u2192            catch (Exception ex) when (ex is not OperationCanceledException)\n   188\u2192            {\n   189\u2192                logger.LogError(ex, \"Error during ratio computation.\");\n   190\u2192                throw new KpiComputationException(\"Failed to compute Focus-Time Ratio.\", ex);\n   191\u2192            }\n   192\u2192\n   193\u2192            logger.LogInformation(\n   194\u2192                \"Computed Focus-Time Ratio KPI. Focus: {Focus}h, Meeting: {Meeting}h, Ratio: {Ratio:p2}\",\n   195\u2192                focusDuration.TotalHours,\n   196\u2192                meetingDuration.TotalHours,\n   197\u2192                ratio);\n   198\u2192\n   199\u2192            var metadata = new Dictionary<string, object>\n   200\u2192            {\n   201\u2192                [\"focusHours\"]   = Math.Round(focusDuration.TotalHours,   2),\n   202\u2192                [\"meetingHours\"] = Math.Round(meetingDuration.TotalHours, 2),\n   203\u2192                [\"version\"]      = \"v1.0.0\"\n   204\u2192            };\n   205\u2192\n   206\u2192            // Simulate IO-bound post-processing.  (E.g., fetch feature flags, audit logs.)\n   207\u2192            await SimulateLatencyAsync(cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(false);\n   208\u2192\n   209\u2192            return new KpiResult(\n   210\u2192                Name: Identifier,\n   211\u2192                Value: ratio,\n   212\u2192                WindowStart: context.WindowStart,\n   213\u2192                WindowEnd: context.WindowEnd,\n   214\u2192                Metadata: new ReadOnlyDictionary<string, object>(metadata)\n   215\u2192            );\n   216\u2192        }\n   217\u2192\n   218\u2192        private static TimeSpan AggregateDuration(IEnumerable<CalendarEvent> events, CalendarEventType type) =>\n   219\u2192            events.Where(e => e.EventType == type)\n   220\u2192                  .Aggregate(TimeSpan.Zero, (acc, x) => acc + x.Duration);\n   221\u2192\n   222\u2192        [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]\n   223\u2192        private static double ComputeRatio(TimeSpan focus, TimeSpan meeting)\n   224\u2192            => (focus + meeting).TotalSeconds == 0\n   225\u2192                   ? double.NaN\n   226\u2192                   : focus.TotalSeconds / (focus + meeting).TotalSeconds;\n   227\u2192\n   228\u2192        private static async Task SimulateLatencyAsync(CancellationToken token)\n   229\u2192        {\n   230\u2192            // The real implementation would call feature-flag services or other micro-services.\n   231\u2192            await Task.Delay(5, token).ConfigureAwait(false);\n   232\u2192        }\n   233\u2192    }\n   234\u2192\n   235\u2192    #endregion\n   236\u2192\n   237\u2192    #region Support Types ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n   238\u2192\n   239\u2192    /// <summary>Strongly-typed computation exception for KPI engine.</summary>\n   240\u2192    public sealed class KpiComputationException : Exception\n   241\u2192    {\n   242\u2192        public KpiComputationException(string message, Exception? innerException = null)\n   243\u2192            : base(message, innerException) { }\n   244\u2192    }\n   245\u2192\n   246\u2192    /// <summary>Null-object logger to avoid noisy null-checks.</summary>\n   247\u2192    internal sealed class NullLogger : ILogger\n   248\u2192    {\n   249\u2192        public static readonly ILogger Instance = new NullLogger();\n   250\u2192\n   251\u2192        private NullLogger() { }\n   252\u2192\n   253\u2192        public IDisposable BeginScope<TState>(TState state) => NullScope.Instance;\n   254\u2192        public bool IsEnabled(LogLevel logLevel) => false;\n   255\u2192        public void Log<TState>(\n   256\u2192            LogLevel    logLevel,\n   257\u2192            EventId     eventId,\n   258\u2192            TState      state,\n   259\u2192            Exception?  exception,\n   260\u2192            Func<TState, Exception?, string> formatter) { }\n   261\u2192\n   262\u2192        private sealed class NullScope : IDisposable\n   263\u2192        {\n   264\u2192            public static readonly IDisposable Instance = new NullScope();\n   265\u2192            public void Dispose() { }\n   266\u2192        }\n   267\u2192    }\n   268\u2192\n   269\u2192    /// <summary>\n   270\u2192    /// Shared JSON serialization settings for wire-level DTOs.\n   271\u2192    /// </summary>\n   272\u2192    internal static class JsonSerialization\n   273\u2192    {\n   274\u2192        public static readonly JsonSerializerOptions Options = CreateDefault();\n   275\u2192\n   276\u2192        private static JsonSerializerOptions CreateDefault()\n   277\u2192        {\n   278\u2192            var opts = new JsonSerializerOptions\n   279\u2192            {\n   280\u2192                PropertyNamingPolicy = JsonNamingPolicy.CamelCase,\n   281\u2192                Converters = { new JsonStringEnumConverter(JsonNamingPolicy.CamelCase) },\n   282\u2192                WriteIndented = false,\n   283\u2192                DefaultIgnoreCondition = JsonIgnoreCondition.WhenWritingNull\n   284\u2192            };\n   285\u2192\n   286\u2192            // Note: Add further converters for DateOnly/TimeOnly if needed.\n   287\u2192            return opts;\n   288\u2192        }\n   289\u2192    }\n   290\u2192\n   291\u2192    #endregion\n   292\u2192}\n   293\u2192```\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

"     1\u2192```csharp\n     2\u2192// -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n     3\u2192//  PulseOps Warehouse \u2014 Serverless Productivity Intelligence Fabric\n     4\u2192//  File:        src/module_59.txt  (mapped to FocusTimeRatioStrategy.cs at build time)\n     5\u2192//  Synopsis:    Strategy implementation that converts a stream of raw user-activity\n     6\u2192//               tuples into a Focus-Time Ratio KPI per user/day.\n     7\u2192//  Author:      PulseOps Engineering\n     8\u2192//  Copyright:   (c) 2024 PulseOps, Inc.\n     9\u2192// -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n    10\u2192\n    11\u2192using System;\n    12\u2192using System.Collections.Generic;\n    13\u2192using System.Linq;\n    14\u2192using System.Text.Json.Serialization;\n    15\u2192using System.Threading;\n    16\u2192using System.Threading.Tasks;\n    17\u2192using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;\n    18\u2192\n    19\u2192namespace PulseOps.Warehouse.Transformations.FocusedProductivity\n    20\u2192{\n    21\u2192    #region Contracts \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    22\u2192\n    23\u2192    /// <summary>\n    24\u2192    ///     Marker interface for all transformation strategies.\n    25\u2192    /// </summary>\n    26\u2192    /// <typeparam name=\"TIn\">Raw input model. Represents denormalized lake records.</typeparam>\n    27\u2192    /// <typeparam name=\"TOut\">Normalized output model. Represents warehouse entities.</typeparam>\n    28\u2192    public interface ITransformationStrategy<in TIn, TOut>\n    29\u2192    {\n    30\u2192        /// <summary>\n    31\u2192        ///     Transforms <paramref name=\"input\"/> into an enumerable of <typeparamref name=\"TOut\" />.\n    32\u2192        ///     Returning an <see cref=\"IAsyncEnumerable{T}\"/> makes the transformation stream-friendly\n    33\u2192        ///     (Kinesis shards, S3 select, etc.).\n    34\u2192        /// </summary>\n    35\u2192        /// <exception cref=\"TransformationException\">Any semantic validation failure.</exception>\n    36\u2192        IAsyncEnumerable<TOut> ExecuteAsync(\n    37\u2192            IAsyncEnumerable<TIn> input,\n    38\u2192            CancellationToken   cancellationToken = default);\n    39\u2192    }\n    40\u2192\n    41\u2192    /// <summary>\n    42\u2192    ///     Observer that receives typed business events (post-transformation).\n    43\u2192    /// </summary>\n    44\u2192    /// <typeparam name=\"T\">Event payload type.</typeparam>\n    45\u2192    public interface IEventObserver<in T>\n    46\u2192    {\n    47\u2192        ValueTask OnNextAsync(T evt, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);\n    48\u2192    }\n    49\u2192\n    50\u2192    /// <summary>\n    51\u2192    ///     Domain exception for any unrecoverable transformation anomaly.\n    52\u2192    /// </summary>\n    53\u2192    public sealed class TransformationException : Exception\n    54\u2192    {\n    55\u2192        public TransformationException(string message, Exception? inner = null)\n    56\u2192            : base(message, inner) { }\n    57\u2192    }\n    58\u2192\n    59\u2192    #endregion\n    60\u2192\n    61\u2192    #region Domain Models \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    62\u2192\n    63\u2192    /// <summary>\n    64\u2192    ///     Raw, denormalized activity record as ingested from the lake.\n    65\u2192    /// </summary>\n    66\u2192    public sealed record ActivityRecord\n    67\u2192    {\n    68\u2192        /// <summary>RFC-3339 timestamp (UTC).</summary>\n    69\u2192        public DateTimeOffset TimestampUtc { get; init; }\n    70\u2192\n    71\u2192        /// <summary>\n    72\u2192        ///     High-level origin of the activity.\n    73\u2192        ///     Example: \"Calendar\", \"Editor\", \"CI\", \"Slack\"\n    74\u2192        /// </summary>\n    75\u2192        public string Source { get; init; } = string.Empty;\n    76\u2192\n    77\u2192        /// <summary>\n    78\u2192        ///     Duration in seconds.\n    79\u2192        /// </summary>\n    80\u2192        public int DurationSec { get; init; }\n    81\u2192\n    82\u2192        /// <summary>Opaque user identifier.</summary>\n    83\u2192        public string UserId { get; init; } = string.Empty;\n    84\u2192    }\n    85\u2192\n    86\u2192    /// <summary>\n    87\u2192    ///     Aggregated KPI emitted by this strategy.\n    88\u2192    /// </summary>\n    89\u2192    public sealed record FocusTimeKpi\n    90\u2192    {\n    91\u2192        public string UserId          { get; init; } = string.Empty;\n    92\u2192        public DateOnly WorkDate      { get; init; }\n    93\u2192        public double  FocusTimeRatio { get; init; }\n    94\u2192\n    95\u2192        /// <summary>\n    96\u2192        ///     Correlation metadata for lineage tracking.\n    97\u2192        /// </summary>\n    98\u2192        [JsonIgnore(Condition = JsonIgnoreCondition.WhenWritingNull)]\n    99\u2192        public IReadOnlyDictionary<string, string>? Meta { get; init; }\n   100\u2192    }\n   101\u2192\n   102\u2192    #endregion\n   103\u2192\n   104\u2192    #region Strategy Implementation \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n   105\u2192\n   106\u2192    /// <summary>\n   107\u2192    ///     Computes Focus-Time Ratio KPI:\n   108\u2192    ///     \n   109\u2192    ///         focus_time_ratio = \u03a3(coding-sec) / [\u03a3(coding-sec) + \u03a3(meeting-sec)]\n   110\u2192    ///     \n   111\u2192    ///     Notes\n   112\u2192    ///     \u2022 'coding'    sources \u2192 \"Editor\",\"IDE\",\"Terminal\"\n   113\u2192    ///     \u2022 'meeting'   sources \u2192 \"Calendar\"\n   114\u2192    ///     \u2022 All other sources are ignored.\n   115\u2192    /// </summary>\n   116\u2192    public sealed class FocusTimeRatioStrategy :\n   117\u2192        ITransformationStrategy<ActivityRecord, FocusTimeKpi>\n   118\u2192    {\n   119\u2192        private static readonly HashSet<string> CodingSources   = new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)\n   120\u2192        {\n   121\u2192            \"Editor\", \"IDE\", \"Terminal\"\n   122\u2192        };\n   123\u2192\n   124\u2192        private static readonly HashSet<string> MeetingSources  = new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)\n   125\u2192        {\n   126\u2192            \"Calendar\"\n   127\u2192        };\n   128\u2192\n   129\u2192        private readonly ILogger<FocusTimeRatioStrategy> _logger;\n   130\u2192        private readonly IEventObserver<FocusTimeKpi>?   _observer;\n   131\u2192\n   132\u2192        /// <param name=\"logger\">Structured logging sink.</param>\n   133\u2192        /// <param name=\"observer\">\n   134\u2192        ///     Observer for downstream consumers (DLQ spooler, notifier, etc.).\n   135\u2192        ///     Can be <see langword=\"null\"/> when no reactive fan-out is required.\n   136\u2192        /// </param>\n   137\u2192        public FocusTimeRatioStrategy(\n   138\u2192            ILogger<FocusTimeRatioStrategy> logger,\n   139\u2192            IEventObserver<FocusTimeKpi>?   observer = null)\n   140\u2192        {\n   141\u2192            _logger   = logger  ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(logger));\n   142\u2192            _observer = observer; // may be null (Null-Object)\n   143\u2192        }\n   144\u2192\n   145\u2192        public async IAsyncEnumerable<FocusTimeKpi> ExecuteAsync(\n   146\u2192            IAsyncEnumerable<ActivityRecord> input,\n   147\u2192            [EnumeratorCancellation] CancellationToken              cancellationToken = default)\n   148\u2192        {\n   149\u2192            // Step-1: group activities by (UserId, Date)\n   150\u2192            var grouped = new Dictionary<(string user, DateOnly date), (long codingSec, long meetingSec)>();\n   151\u2192\n   152\u2192            await foreach (var record in input.WithCancellation(cancellationToken))\n   153\u2192            {\n   154\u2192                cancellationToken.ThrowIfCancellationRequested();\n   155\u2192\n   156\u2192                try\n   157\u2192                {\n   158\u2192                    if (!IsTrackedSource(record.Source))        // fast path\n   159\u2192                        continue;\n   160\u2192\n   161\u2192                    if (record.DurationSec <= 0)\n   162\u2192                    {\n   163\u2192                        _logger.LogWarning(\n   164\u2192                            \"Ignoring record with zero/negative duration \u2014 {@Record}\", record);\n   165\u2192                        continue;\n   166\u2192                    }\n   167\u2192\n   168\u2192                    var key = (record.UserId,\n   169\u2192                               DateOnly.FromDateTime(record.TimestampUtc.UtcDateTime));\n   170\u2192\n   171\u2192                    var tuple = grouped.TryGetValue(key, out var acc)\n   172\u2192                        ? acc\n   173\u2192                        : (codingSec: 0L, meetingSec: 0L);\n   174\u2192\n   175\u2192                    if (CodingSources.Contains(record.Source))\n   176\u2192                        tuple.codingSec  += record.DurationSec;\n   177\u2192                    else if (MeetingSources.Contains(record.Source))\n   178\u2192                        tuple.meetingSec += record.DurationSec;\n   179\u2192\n   180\u2192                    grouped[key] = tuple;\n   181\u2192                }\n   182\u2192                catch (Exception ex)\n   183\u2192                {\n   184\u2192                    _logger.LogError(ex, \"Failed to ingest record \u2014 {@Record}\", record);\n   185\u2192                    // decide whether to fail fast or continue \u2014 we choose to continue and encapsulate failure\n   186\u2192                    continue;\n   187\u2192                }\n   188\u2192            }\n   189\u2192\n   190\u2192            // Step-2: compute ratios and emit\n   191\u2192            foreach (var (key, (codingSec, meetingSec)) in grouped)\n   192\u2192            {\n   193\u2192                // Skip days with no meeting/coding time\n   194\u2192                if (codingSec == 0 && meetingSec == 0)\n   195\u2192                    continue;\n   196\u2192\n   197\u2192                var kpi = new FocusTimeKpi\n   198\u2192                {\n   199\u2192                    UserId          = key.user,\n   200\u2192                    WorkDate        = key.date,\n   201\u2192                    FocusTimeRatio  = Math.Round(\n   202\u2192                                          codingSec / (double)(codingSec + meetingSec),\n   203\u2192                                          4, MidpointRounding.AwayFromZero),\n   204\u2192                    Meta            = new Dictionary<string, string>\n   205\u2192                    {\n   206\u2192                        [\"coding_sec\"]  = codingSec.ToString(),\n   207\u2192                        [\"meeting_sec\"] = meetingSec.ToString()\n   208\u2192                    }\n   209\u2192                };\n   210\u2192\n   211\u2192                // Fire-and-forget observer (no back-pressure)\n   212\u2192                if (_observer is not null)\n   213\u2192                    _ = SafeNotifyAsync(kpi, cancellationToken);\n   214\u2192\n   215\u2192                yield return kpi;\n   216\u2192            }\n   217\u2192        }\n   218\u2192\n   219\u2192        #endregion\n   220\u2192\n   221\u2192        #region Helpers \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n   222\u2192\n   223\u2192        private static bool IsTrackedSource(string source)\n   224\u2192            => CodingSources.Contains(source) || MeetingSources.Contains(source);\n   225\u2192\n   226\u2192        private async Task SafeNotifyAsync(FocusTimeKpi kpi, CancellationToken token)\n   227\u2192        {\n   228\u2192            try\n   229\u2192            {\n   230\u2192                await _observer!.OnNextAsync(kpi, token);\n   231\u2192            }\n   232\u2192            catch (Exception ex)\n   233\u2192            {\n   234\u2192                _logger.LogWarning(ex, \"Observer notification failed for KPI {@Kpi}\", kpi);\n   235\u2192            }\n   236\u2192        }\n   237\u2192\n   238\u2192        #endregion\n   239\u2192    }\n   240\u2192}\n   241\u2192```\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
