"     1\u2192```csharp\n     2\u2192// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n     3\u2192//  File:        src/module_72.txt   (Yes, .txt\u200a\u2014\u200awe treat it as a C# compilation\n     4\u2192//                                    unit by SDK include globbing)\n     5\u2192//  Project:     PulseOps Warehouse \u2014 Serverless Productivity Intelligence Fabric\n     6\u2192//  Purpose:     Stream-processing entry-point that ingests Kinesis records,\n     7\u2192//               validates envelopes, picks an on-the-fly transformation strategy\n     8\u2192//               (Strategy Pattern), and emits normalised payloads further down\n     9\u2192//               the ETL pipeline.\n    10\u2192//\n    11\u2192//  NOTE:        This Lambda is intentionally written as a self-contained,\n    12\u2192//               production-grade component.  It wires up its own DI container\n    13\u2192//               (in-Lambda) to stay fully autonomous and testable.\n    14\u2192// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n    15\u2192\n    16\u2192using System;\n    17\u2192using System.Buffers;\n    18\u2192using System.Collections.Concurrent;\n    19\u2192using System.Collections.Generic;\n    20\u2192using System.IO;\n    21\u2192using System.Linq;\n    22\u2192using System.Text;\n    23\u2192using System.Text.Json;\n    24\u2192using System.Threading;\n    25\u2192using System.Threading.Tasks;\n    26\u2192using Amazon.Kinesis;\n    27\u2192using Amazon.Lambda.Core;\n    28\u2192using Amazon.Lambda.KinesisEvents;\n    29\u2192using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;\n    30\u2192using Serilog;\n    31\u2192\n    32\u2192// Required by AWS Lambda to locate the serializer we want to use.\n    33\u2192[assembly: LambdaSerializer(typeof(Amazon.Lambda.Serialization.SystemTextJson.DefaultLambdaJsonSerializer))]\n    34\u2192\n    35\u2192namespace PulseOps.Warehouse.StreamProcessing\n    36\u2192{\n    37\u2192    /// <summary>\n    38\u2192    /// Entry-point Lambda handler for processing Kinesis ingestion shards.\n    39\u2192    /// </summary>\n    40\u2192    public sealed class KinesisStreamProcessor\n    41\u2192    {\n    42\u2192        private readonly IServiceProvider _root;\n    43\u2192        private readonly ILogger _log;\n    44\u2192\n    45\u2192        public KinesisStreamProcessor()\n    46\u2192        {\n    47\u2192            _root = ConfigureServices();\n    48\u2192            _log = _root.GetRequiredService<ILogger>().ForContext<KinesisStreamProcessor>();\n    49\u2192\n    50\u2192            _log.Information(\"KinesisStreamProcessor cold-start completed \u2014 DI container initialised.\");\n    51\u2192        }\n    52\u2192\n    53\u2192        // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    54\u2192        //  Lambda Handler\n    55\u2192        // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    56\u2192        /// <summary>\n    57\u2192        /// AWS Lambda runtime invokes this async handler for each micro-batch that\n    58\u2192        /// Kinesis pushes.  Batch size &amp; window are configured via Kinesis event\n    59\u2192        /// source mapping (IaC \u2013 see cdk/KinesisIngestionStack.cs).\n    60\u2192        /// </summary>\n    61\u2192        public async Task HandleAsync(KinesisEvent kinesisEvent, ILambdaContext context)\n    62\u2192        {\n    63\u2192            _log.ForContext(\"Records\", kinesisEvent.Records.Count)\n    64\u2192                .Information(\"Received Kinesis micro-batch.\");\n    65\u2192\n    66\u2192            var validator  = _root.GetRequiredService<IEventEnvelopeValidator>();\n    67\u2192            var selector   = _root.GetRequiredService<ITransformationStrategySelector>();\n    68\u2192            var dispatcher = _root.GetRequiredService<ITransformedEventDispatcher>();\n    69\u2192\n    70\u2192            // Process in parallel \u2013 concurrency governed by reserved Lambda memory.\n    71\u2192            await Parallel.ForEachAsync(\n    72\u2192                kinesisEvent.Records,\n    73\u2192                new ParallelOptions { MaxDegreeOfParallelism = Environment.ProcessorCount },\n    74\u2192                async (record, ct) =>\n    75\u2192                {\n    76\u2192                    try\n    77\u2192                    {\n    78\u2192                        var envelope = DeserializeEnvelope(record);\n    79\u2192                        validator.Validate(envelope);             // throws if invalid\n    80\u2192\n    81\u2192                        var strategy = selector.Resolve(envelope.EventType);\n    82\u2192                        var result   = await strategy.TransformAsync(envelope, ct);\n    83\u2192\n    84\u2192                        await dispatcher.DispatchAsync(result, ct);\n    85\u2192                    }\n    86\u2192                    catch (ValidationException vex)\n    87\u2192                    {\n    88\u2192                        _log.Warning(vex, \"Validation failure.  Record sent to DLQ.\");\n    89\u2192                        await dispatcher.DeadLetterAsync(record, vex, ct);\n    90\u2192                    }\n    91\u2192                    catch (Exception ex)\n    92\u2192                    {\n    93\u2192                        _log.Error(ex, \"Unhandled exception.  Record sent to DLQ.\");\n    94\u2192                        await dispatcher.DeadLetterAsync(record, ex, ct);\n    95\u2192                    }\n    96\u2192                });\n    97\u2192        }\n    98\u2192\n    99\u2192        // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n   100\u2192        //  Helpers\n   101\u2192        // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n   102\u2192        private static EventEnvelope DeserializeEnvelope(KinesisEvent.KinesisEventRecord record)\n   103\u2192        {\n   104\u2192            // Kinesis enforces a Base64 encoded string.  We decode quickly using\n   105\u2192            // ArrayPool to avoid allocations on high throughput.\n   106\u2192            var dataSpan = record.Kinesis.Data.Span;\n   107\u2192            var rented   = ArrayPool<byte>.Shared.Rent(dataSpan.Length);\n   108\u2192            try\n   109\u2192            {\n   110\u2192                dataSpan.CopyTo(rented);\n   111\u2192                var json = Encoding.UTF8.GetString(rented, 0, dataSpan.Length);\n   112\u2192\n   113\u2192                return JsonSerializer.Deserialize<EventEnvelope>(json)!;\n   114\u2192            }\n   115\u2192            finally\n   116\u2192            {\n   117\u2192                ArrayPool<byte>.Shared.Return(rented);\n   118\u2192            }\n   119\u2192        }\n   120\u2192\n   121\u2192        private static IServiceProvider ConfigureServices()\n   122\u2192        {\n   123\u2192            var services = new ServiceCollection();\n   124\u2192\n   125\u2192            // --- Logging -----------------------------------------------------\n   126\u2192            Log.Logger = new LoggerConfiguration()\n   127\u2192                .Enrich.WithProperty(\"Component\", \"PulseOps.KinesisStreamProcessor\")\n   128\u2192                .WriteTo.Console()\n   129\u2192                .CreateLogger();\n   130\u2192\n   131\u2192            services.AddSingleton<ILogger>(Log.Logger);\n   132\u2192\n   133\u2192            // --- Validators ---------------------------------------------------\n   134\u2192            services.AddSingleton<IEventEnvelopeValidator, DefaultEnvelopeValidator>();\n   135\u2192\n   136\u2192            // --- Transformation Strategies -----------------------------------\n   137\u2192            services.AddSingleton<CalendarEventTransformationStrategy>();\n   138\u2192            services.AddSingleton<CiCdLogTransformationStrategy>();\n   139\u2192            services.AddSingleton<EmailMetadataTransformationStrategy>();\n   140\u2192\n   141\u2192            services.AddSingleton<ITransformationStrategySelector>(sp =>\n   142\u2192            {\n   143\u2192                var strategies = new Dictionary<string, ITransformationStrategy>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)\n   144\u2192                {\n   145\u2192                    [\"calendar_event\"] = sp.GetRequiredService<CalendarEventTransformationStrategy>(),\n   146\u2192                    [\"cicd_log\"]       = sp.GetRequiredService<CiCdLogTransformationStrategy>(),\n   147\u2192                    [\"email_metadata\"] = sp.GetRequiredService<EmailMetadataTransformationStrategy>()\n   148\u2192                };\n   149\u2192                return new TransformationStrategySelector(strategies);\n   150\u2192            });\n   151\u2192\n   152\u2192            // --- Dispatchers --------------------------------------------------\n   153\u2192            services.AddSingleton<ITransformedEventDispatcher, FireAndForgetDispatcher>();\n   154\u2192\n   155\u2192            return services.BuildServiceProvider();\n   156\u2192        }\n   157\u2192    }\n   158\u2192\n   159\u2192    // =========================================================================\n   160\u2192    //  Domain Models\n   161\u2192    // =========================================================================\n   162\u2192    public record EventEnvelope(\n   163\u2192        string     EventType,\n   164\u2192        JsonElement Payload,\n   165\u2192        DateTime    TimestampUtc);\n   166\u2192\n   167\u2192    public record TransformedEvent(\n   168\u2192        string     NormalisedType,\n   169\u2192        JsonElement Payload,\n   170\u2192        DateTime    ObservedAtUtc,\n   171\u2192        IDictionary<string, string> Tags);\n   172\u2192\n   173\u2192    // =========================================================================\n   174\u2192    //  Validation\n   175\u2192    // =========================================================================\n   176\u2192    public interface IEventEnvelopeValidator\n   177\u2192    {\n   178\u2192        void Validate(EventEnvelope envelope);\n   179\u2192    }\n   180\u2192\n   181\u2192    public sealed class DefaultEnvelopeValidator : IEventEnvelopeValidator\n   182\u2192    {\n   183\u2192        private readonly ILogger _log;\n   184\u2192\n   185\u2192        public DefaultEnvelopeValidator(ILogger log) => _log = log;\n   186\u2192\n   187\u2192        public void Validate(EventEnvelope envelope)\n   188\u2192        {\n   189\u2192            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(envelope.EventType))\n   190\u2192            {\n   191\u2192                throw new ValidationException(\"EventType is required.\");\n   192\u2192            }\n   193\u2192\n   194\u2192            if (envelope.TimestampUtc == default)\n   195\u2192            {\n   196\u2192                throw new ValidationException(\"TimestampUtc is required.\");\n   197\u2192            }\n   198\u2192\n   199\u2192            if (envelope.Payload.ValueKind == JsonValueKind.Undefined ||\n   200\u2192                envelope.Payload.ValueKind == JsonValueKind.Null)\n   201\u2192            {\n   202\u2192                throw new ValidationException(\"Payload cannot be null or undefined.\");\n   203\u2192            }\n   204\u2192\n   205\u2192            _log.Debug(\"Envelope validation passed for type {EventType}\", envelope.EventType);\n   206\u2192        }\n   207\u2192    }\n   208\u2192\n   209\u2192    public sealed class ValidationException : Exception\n   210\u2192    {\n   211\u2192        public ValidationException(string message) : base(message) { }\n   212\u2192    }\n   213\u2192\n   214\u2192    // =========================================================================\n   215\u2192    //  Strategy Pattern \u2014 Transformations\n   216\u2192    // =========================================================================\n   217\u2192    public interface ITransformationStrategy\n   218\u2192    {\n   219\u2192        Task<TransformedEvent> TransformAsync(EventEnvelope envelope, CancellationToken ct);\n   220\u2192    }\n   221\u2192\n   222\u2192    public sealed class TransformationStrategySelector : ITransformationStrategySelector\n   223\u2192    {\n   224\u2192        private readonly IReadOnlyDictionary<string, ITransformationStrategy> _strategies;\n   225\u2192\n   226\u2192        public TransformationStrategySelector(IReadOnlyDictionary<string, ITransformationStrategy> strategies)\n   227\u2192            => _strategies = strategies;\n   228\u2192\n   229\u2192        public ITransformationStrategy Resolve(string eventType)\n   230\u2192        {\n   231\u2192            if (_strategies.TryGetValue(eventType, out var strategy))\n   232\u2192            {\n   233\u2192                return strategy;\n   234\u2192            }\n   235\u2192\n   236\u2192            throw new InvalidOperationException($\"No transformation strategy registered for '{eventType}'.\");\n   237\u2192        }\n   238\u2192    }\n   239\u2192\n   240\u2192    public interface ITransformationStrategySelector\n   241\u2192    {\n   242\u2192        ITransformationStrategy Resolve(string eventType);\n   243\u2192    }\n   244\u2192\n   245\u2192    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n   246\u2192    //  Concrete Strategies\n   247\u2192    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n   248\u2192    public sealed class CalendarEventTransformationStrategy : ITransformationStrategy\n   249\u2192    {\n   250\u2192        public Task<TransformedEvent> TransformAsync(EventEnvelope envelope, CancellationToken ct)\n   251\u2192        {\n   252\u2192            // Example: Enrich meeting duration & cost statistics\n   253\u2192            var source = envelope.Payload;\n   254\u2192\n   255\u2192            var attendees  = source.GetProperty(\"attendees\").GetArrayLength();\n   256\u2192            var durationMs = source.GetProperty(\"duration_ms\").GetInt64();\n   257\u2192            var hourlyRate = 65; // USD \u2013 in practice looked up from DB\n   258\u2192\n   259\u2192            var meetingCost = (durationMs / 1000 / 60.0 / 60.0) * attendees * hourlyRate;\n   260\u2192\n   261\u2192            var enriched = new\n   262\u2192            {\n   263\u2192                attendees,\n   264\u2192                duration_ms  = durationMs,\n   265\u2192                meeting_cost = meetingCost,\n   266\u2192                source_id    = source.GetProperty(\"id\").GetString()\n   267\u2192            };\n   268\u2192\n   269\u2192            return Task.FromResult(\n   270\u2192                new TransformedEvent(\n   271\u2192                    NormalisedType : \"meeting_metrics\",\n   272\u2192                    Payload        : JsonSerializer.SerializeToElement(enriched),\n   273\u2192                    ObservedAtUtc  : envelope.TimestampUtc,\n   274\u2192                    Tags           : new Dictionary<string, string>\n   275\u2192                    {\n   276\u2192                        [\"source\"] = \"calendar\"\n   277\u2192                    }));\n   278\u2192        }\n   279\u2192    }\n   280\u2192\n   281\u2192    public sealed class CiCdLogTransformationStrategy : ITransformationStrategy\n   282\u2192    {\n   283\u2192        public Task<TransformedEvent> TransformAsync(EventEnvelope envelope, CancellationToken ct)\n   284\u2192        {\n   285\u2192            var payload        = envelope.Payload;\n   286\u2192            var started        = payload.GetProperty(\"job_started_at\").GetDateTime();\n   287\u2192            var finished       = payload.GetProperty(\"job_finished_at\").GetDateTime();\n   288\u2192            var leadTime       = (finished - started).TotalSeconds;\n   289\u2192            var pipelineStatus = payload.GetProperty(\"status\").GetString();\n   290\u2192\n   291\u2192            var normalised = new\n   292\u2192            {\n   293\u2192                lead_time_seconds = leadTime,\n   294\u2192                status            = pipelineStatus,\n   295\u2192                commit_sha        = payload.GetProperty(\"commit_sha\").GetString()\n   296\u2192            };\n   297\u2192\n   298\u2192            return Task.FromResult(\n   299\u2192                new TransformedEvent(\n   300\u2192                    NormalisedType : \"deployment_lead_time\",\n   301\u2192                    Payload        : JsonSerializer.SerializeToElement(normalised),\n   302\u2192                    ObservedAtUtc  : envelope.TimestampUtc,\n   303\u2192                    Tags           : new Dictionary<string, string>\n   304\u2192                    {\n   305\u2192                        [\"source\"] = \"cicd\"\n   306\u2192                    }));\n   307\u2192        }\n   308\u2192    }\n   309\u2192\n   310\u2192    public sealed class EmailMetadataTransformationStrategy : ITransformationStrategy\n   311\u2192    {\n   312\u2192        public Task<TransformedEvent> TransformAsync(EventEnvelope envelope, CancellationToken ct)\n   313\u2192        {\n   314\u2192            var p          = envelope.Payload;\n   315\u2192            var threadId   = p.GetProperty(\"thread_id\").GetString();\n   316\u2192            var direction  = p.GetProperty(\"direction\").GetString(); // inbound|outbound\n   317\u2192\n   318\u2192            var normalised = new\n   319\u2192            {\n   320\u2192                thread_id  = threadId,\n   321\u2192                is_reply   = p.GetProperty(\"is_reply\").GetBoolean(),\n   322\u2192                direction,\n   323\u2192                size_bytes = p.GetProperty(\"size_bytes\").GetInt64()\n   324\u2192            };\n   325\u2192\n   326\u2192            return Task.FromResult(\n   327\u2192                new TransformedEvent(\n   328\u2192                    NormalisedType : \"email_activity\",\n   329\u2192                    Payload        : JsonSerializer.SerializeToElement(normalised),\n   330\u2192                    ObservedAtUtc  : envelope.TimestampUtc,\n   331\u2192                    Tags           : new Dictionary<string, string>\n   332\u2192                    {\n   333\u2192                        [\"source\"] = \"email\",\n   334\u2192                        [\"direction\"] = direction\n   335\u2192                    }));\n   336\u2192        }\n   337\u2192    }\n   338\u2192\n   339\u2192    // =========================================================================\n   340\u2192    //  Dispatcher (Observer Pattern variant)\n   341\u2192    // =========================================================================\n   342\u2192    public interface ITransformedEventDispatcher\n   343\u2192    {\n   344\u2192        Task DispatchAsync(TransformedEvent evt, CancellationToken ct);\n   345\u2192        Task DeadLetterAsync(KinesisEvent.KinesisEventRecord rawRecord, Exception ex, CancellationToken ct);\n   346\u2192    }\n   347\u2192\n   348\u2192    /// <summary>\n   349\u2192    /// Fire-and-forget dispatcher that pushes transformed events onto a downstream\n   350\u2192    /// Kinesis stream.  If no stream is configured (e.g. local tests), we fall\n   351\u2192    /// back to logging.\n   352\u2192    /// </summary>\n   353\u2192    public sealed class FireAndForgetDispatcher : ITransformedEventDispatcher, IDisposable\n   354\u2192    {\n   355\u2192        private readonly ILogger _log;\n   356\u2192        private readonly IAmazonKinesis _kinesis;\n   357\u2192        private readonly string _targetStreamName;\n   358\u2192        private readonly ConcurrentQueue<Amazon.Kinesis.Model.PutRecordsRequestEntry> _buffer = new();\n   359\u2192\n   360\u2192        public FireAndForgetDispatcher(ILogger log)\n   361\u2192        {\n   362\u2192            _log              = log;\n   363\u2192            _kinesis          = new AmazonKinesisClient(); // region inferred from Lambda environment\n   364\u2192            _targetStreamName = Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable(\"TRANSFORMED_STREAM_NAME\") \n   365\u2192                                ?? \"pulseops-transformed-events\";\n   366\u2192        }\n   367\u2192\n   368\u2192        public Task DispatchAsync(TransformedEvent evt, CancellationToken ct)\n   369\u2192        {\n   370\u2192            var json   = JsonSerializer.Serialize(evt);\n   371\u2192            var record = new Amazon.Kinesis.Model.PutRecordsRequestEntry\n   372\u2192            {\n   373\u2192                PartitionKey = evt.Tags.TryGetValue(\"source\", out var source) ? source : \"unknown\",\n   374\u2192                Data         = new MemoryStream(Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(json))\n   375\u2192            };\n   376\u2192\n   377\u2192            _buffer.Enqueue(record);\n   378\u2192\n   379\u2192            // Flush in background if we crossed threshold (imperfect, but keeps demo short)\n   380\u2192            if (_buffer.Count >= 500)\n   381\u2192            {\n   382\u2192                _ = FlushAsync(CancellationToken.None);\n   383\u2192            }\n   384\u2192\n   385\u2192            return Task.CompletedTask;\n   386\u2192        }\n   387\u2192\n   388\u2192        public async Task DeadLetterAsync(KinesisEvent.KinesisEventRecord rawRecord, Exception ex, CancellationToken ct)\n   389\u2192        {\n   390\u2192            // Pipe to DLQ \u2013 in demo we just log.  In production it\u2019s an SQS DLQ.\n   391\u2192            _log.Warning(ex, \"Dead-lettering record {@PartitionKey}\", rawRecord.Kinesis.PartitionKey);\n   392\u2192            await Task.CompletedTask;\n   393\u2192        }\n   394\u2192\n   395\u2192        private async Task FlushAsync(CancellationToken ct)\n   396\u2192        {\n   397\u2192            if (_buffer.IsEmpty) return;\n   398\u2192\n   399\u2192            var batch = new List<Amazon.Kinesis.Model.PutRecordsRequestEntry>();\n   400\u2192            while (batch.Count < 500 && _buffer.TryDequeue(out var entry))\n   401\u2192            {\n   402\u2192                batch.Add(entry);\n   403\u2192            }\n   404\u2192\n   405\u2192            if (batch.Count == 0) return;\n   406\u2192\n   407\u2192            var request = new Amazon.Kinesis.Model.PutRecordsRequest\n   408\u2192            {\n   409\u2192                StreamName = _targetStreamName,\n   410\u2192                Records    = batch\n   411\u2192            };\n   412\u2192\n   413\u2192            var response = await _kinesis.PutRecordsAsync(request, ct);\n   414\u2192\n   415\u2192            if (response.FailedRecordCount > 0)\n   416\u2192            {\n   417\u2192                _log.Error(\"Failed to write {Failed}/{Total} records to stream {Stream}\",\n   418\u2192                           response.FailedRecordCount, batch.Count, _targetStreamName);\n   419\u2192            }\n   420\u2192            else\n   421\u2192            {\n   422\u2192                _log.Information(\"Flushed {Count} transformed events to stream {Stream}\",\n   423\u2192                                 batch.Count, _targetStreamName);\n   424\u2192            }\n   425\u2192        }\n   426\u2192\n   427\u2192        public void Dispose() => _ = FlushAsync(CancellationToken.None);\n   428\u2192    }\n   429\u2192}\n   430\u2192```\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
86. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/app/project/src/module_46.txt"
}
Output
"     1\u2192```csharp\n     2\u2192// File: src/module_46.txt  (logical name: CalendarEventIngestionLambda.cs)\n     3\u2192// Project: PulseOps Warehouse \u2014 Serverless Productivity Intelligence Fabric\n     4\u2192// Description:\n     5\u2192//   AWS Lambda entry-point responsible for ingesting raw calendar events from an\n     6\u2192//   EventBridge Pipe, validating contractual integrity, transforming them into\n     7\u2192//   productivity-centric KPIs, then emitting the enriched payload to Kinesis\n     8\u2192//   (hot-path) and S3 (cold-path).  Transformation logic is dispatched via the\n     9\u2192//   Strategy pattern to enable run-time swapping of KPI calculators without\n    10\u2192//   code redeployment.\n    11\u2192\n    12\u2192using System;\n    13\u2192using System.Collections.Generic;\n    14\u2192using System.IO;\n    15\u2192using System.Net;\n    16\u2192using System.Text;\n    17\u2192using System.Text.Json;\n    18\u2192using System.Threading;\n    19\u2192using System.Threading.Tasks;\n    20\u2192using Amazon;\n    21\u2192using Amazon.Kinesis;\n    22\u2192using Amazon.Kinesis.Model;\n    23\u2192using Amazon.S3;\n    24\u2192using Amazon.S3.Model;\n    25\u2192using Amazon.Lambda.Core;\n    26\u2192using Amazon.Lambda.KinesisEvents;\n    27\u2192using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;\n    28\u2192using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;\n    29\u2192\n    30\u2192// Assembly attribute required for the AWS Lambda runtime to find the handler.\n    31\u2192[assembly: LambdaSerializer(typeof(Amazon.Lambda.Serialization.SystemTextJson.DefaultLambdaJsonSerializer))]\n    32\u2192\n    33\u2192namespace PulseOps.Warehouse.Lambdas.CalendarEventIngestion;\n    34\u2192\n    35\u2192/// <summary>\n    36\u2192/// Lambda entry point.\n    37\u2192/// </summary>\n    38\u2192public sealed class Function\n    39\u2192{\n    40\u2192    private const string OutputStreamEnvVar = \"TARGET_KINESIS_STREAM\";\n    41\u2192    private const string OutputBucketEnvVar = \"TARGET_S3_BUCKET\";\n    42\u2192    private const string StrategyEnvVar    = \"TRANSFORMATION_STRATEGY\"; // e.g. MeetingCostKpi\n    43\u2192\n    44\u2192    private readonly ILogger<Function>   _logger;\n    45\u2192    private readonly IAmazonKinesis      _kinesis;\n    46\u2192    private readonly IAmazonS3          _s3;\n    47\u2192    private readonly ICalendarValidator  _validator;\n    48\u2192    private readonly ITransformationStrategy _strategy;\n    49\u2192    private readonly JsonSerializerOptions _jsonOpts = new(JsonSerializerDefaults.Web)\n    50\u2192    {\n    51\u2192        PropertyNameCaseInsensitive = true,\n    52\u2192        IgnoreReadOnlyFields = true,\n    53\u2192        WriteIndented = false\n    54\u2192    };\n    55\u2192\n    56\u2192    private readonly string _targetStream;\n    57\u2192    private readonly string _targetBucket;\n    58\u2192\n    59\u2192    public Function()\n    60\u2192        : this(BuildServiceProvider(Environment.GetEnvironmentVariables()))\n    61\u2192    { }\n    62\u2192\n    63\u2192    // For DI-friendly testing.\n    64\u2192    public Function(IServiceProvider serviceProvider)\n    65\u2192    {\n    66\u2192        _logger        = serviceProvider.GetRequiredService<ILogger<Function>>();\n    67\u2192        _kinesis       = serviceProvider.GetRequiredService<IAmazonKinesis>();\n    68\u2192        _s3            = serviceProvider.GetRequiredService<IAmazonS3>();\n    69\u2192        _validator     = serviceProvider.GetRequiredService<ICalendarValidator>();\n    70\u2192        _strategy      = serviceProvider.GetRequiredService<ITransformationStrategy>();\n    71\u2192        _targetStream  = Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable(OutputStreamEnvVar) ?? throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Missing env var {OutputStreamEnvVar}\");\n    72\u2192        _targetBucket  = Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable(OutputBucketEnvVar) ?? throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Missing env var {OutputBucketEnvVar}\");\n    73\u2192    }\n    74\u2192\n    75\u2192    /// <summary>\n    76\u2192    /// Entry point invoked by AWS Lambda for each batch of Kinesis records.\n    77\u2192    /// </summary>\n    78\u2192    public async Task HandlerAsync(KinesisEvent kinesisEvent, ILambdaContext context)\n    79\u2192    {\n    80\u2192        if (kinesisEvent?.Records == null || kinesisEvent.Records.Count == 0)\n    81\u2192        {\n    82\u2192            _logger.LogWarning(\"Invocation contained zero Kinesis records.\");\n    83\u2192            return;\n    84\u2192        }\n    85\u2192\n    86\u2192        _logger.LogInformation(\"Processing {Count} Kinesis records.\", kinesisEvent.Records.Count);\n    87\u2192\n    88\u2192        var putRequests = new List<PutRecordsRequestEntry>(kinesisEvent.Records.Count);\n    89\u2192\n    90\u2192        foreach (var record in kinesisEvent.Records)\n    91\u2192        {\n    92\u2192            try\n    93\u2192            {\n    94\u2192                var payloadJson = GetDecodedData(record.Kinesis);\n    95\u2192                var calEvent    = JsonSerializer.Deserialize<CalendarEventPayload>(payloadJson, _jsonOpts);\n    96\u2192\n    97\u2192                if (calEvent == null)\n    98\u2192                {\n    99\u2192                    _logger.LogWarning(\"Skipping record: deserialization returned null.\");\n   100\u2192                    continue;\n   101\u2192                }\n   102\u2192\n   103\u2192                _validator.ValidateOrThrow(calEvent);\n   104\u2192\n   105\u2192                var transformed = await _strategy.TransformAsync(calEvent, context, CancellationToken.None);\n   106\u2192\n   107\u2192                var enrichedJson = JsonSerializer.Serialize(transformed, _jsonOpts);\n   108\u2192                var kinesisEntry = new PutRecordsRequestEntry\n   109\u2192                {\n   110\u2192                    PartitionKey = record.Kinesis.PartitionKey,\n   111\u2192                    Data         = new MemoryStream(Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(enrichedJson))\n   112\u2192                };\n   113\u2192\n   114\u2192                putRequests.Add(kinesisEntry);\n   115\u2192\n   116\u2192                // Write raw event asynchronously to S3 for cold-storage.\n   117\u2192                _ = UploadRawAsync(payloadJson, record, context);\n   118\u2192            }\n   119\u2192            catch (CalendarValidationException vex)\n   120\u2192            {\n   121\u2192                _logger.LogWarning(vex, \"Validation failed for PartitionKey {Key}, Seq {Seq}.\", record.Kinesis.PartitionKey, record.Kinesis.SequenceNumber);\n   122\u2192                // Business decision: invalid data goes to DLQ (SNS) handled by infra. Here we just swallow.\n   123\u2192            }\n   124\u2192            catch (Exception ex)\n   125\u2192            {\n   126\u2192                _logger.LogError(ex, \"Unexpected error while processing PartitionKey {Key}, Seq {Seq}.\", record.Kinesis.PartitionKey, record.Kinesis.SequenceNumber);\n   127\u2192                // Re-throwing fails entire batch, delegating retry to Lambda & Kinesis. Optionally we could fail-split.\n   128\u2192                throw;\n   129\u2192            }\n   130\u2192        }\n   131\u2192\n   132\u2192        if (putRequests.Count > 0)\n   133\u2192        {\n   134\u2192            await PutToKinesisAsync(putRequests);\n   135\u2192            _logger.LogInformation(\"Successfully published {Count} records to {Stream}.\", putRequests.Count, _targetStream);\n   136\u2192        }\n   137\u2192    }\n   138\u2192\n   139\u2192    #region Helpers\n   140\u2192\n   141\u2192    private static string GetDecodedData(KinesisEvent.RecordPayload kinesisData) =>\n   142\u2192        Encoding.UTF8.GetString(kinesisData.Data.Span);\n   143\u2192\n   144\u2192    private async Task UploadRawAsync(string body, KinesisEvent.KinesisEventRecord record, ILambdaContext ctx)\n   145\u2192    {\n   146\u2192        try\n   147\u2192        {\n   148\u2192            var key = $\"{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyy/MM/dd}/{Guid.NewGuid()}.json\";\n   149\u2192\n   150\u2192            await _s3.PutObjectAsync(new PutObjectRequest\n   151\u2192            {\n   152\u2192                BucketName = _targetBucket,\n   153\u2192                Key        = key,\n   154\u2192                ContentBody= body,\n   155\u2192                ContentType= \"application/json\"\n   156\u2192            });\n   157\u2192            _logger.LogDebug(\"Raw event offloaded to s3://{Bucket}/{Key}\", _targetBucket, key);\n   158\u2192        }\n   159\u2192        catch (Exception ex)\n   160\u2192        {\n   161\u2192            _logger.LogError(ex, \"Failed to offload raw event to S3, will continue without blocking.\");\n   162\u2192        }\n   163\u2192    }\n   164\u2192\n   165\u2192    private async Task PutToKinesisAsync(IEnumerable<PutRecordsRequestEntry> entries)\n   166\u2192    {\n   167\u2192        var batch = new PutRecordsRequest\n   168\u2192        {\n   169\u2192            StreamName = _targetStream,\n   170\u2192            Records    = new List<PutRecordsRequestEntry>(entries)\n   171\u2192        };\n   172\u2192\n   173\u2192        var response = await _kinesis.PutRecordsAsync(batch);\n   174\u2192\n   175\u2192        if (response.HttpStatusCode != HttpStatusCode.OK || response.FailedRecordCount > 0)\n   176\u2192        {\n   177\u2192            _logger.LogError(\"Partial failure while writing to Kinesis. Failed: {Count}\", response.FailedRecordCount);\n   178\u2192            // Optionally send failed records to DLQ.\n   179\u2192        }\n   180\u2192    }\n   181\u2192\n   182\u2192    private static IServiceProvider BuildServiceProvider(IDictionary environment)\n   183\u2192    {\n   184\u2192        var services = new ServiceCollection();\n   185\u2192\n   186\u2192        // Logging\n   187\u2192        services.AddLogging(cfg => cfg.AddLambdaLogger())\n   188\u2192                .Configure<LoggerFilterOptions>(opts => opts.MinLevel = LogLevel.Information);\n   189\u2192\n   190\u2192        // AWS SDK clients are built with default credentials/region resolution.\n   191\u2192        services.AddAWSService<IAmazonKinesis>();\n   192\u2192        services.AddAWSService<IAmazonS3>();\n   193\u2192\n   194\u2192        // Validators & Strategies\n   195\u2192        services.AddSingleton<ICalendarValidator, SchemaValidator>();\n   196\u2192\n   197\u2192        // Strategy selection at runtime via env var.\n   198\u2192        var strategyName = (Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable(StrategyEnvVar) ?? nameof(MeetingCostKpiStrategy)).Trim();\n   199\u2192\n   200\u2192        services.AddSingleton<ITransformationStrategy>(sp =>\n   201\u2192            strategyName switch\n   202\u2192            {\n   203\u2192                nameof(MeetingCostKpiStrategy) => new MeetingCostKpiStrategy(sp.GetRequiredService<ILogger<MeetingCostKpiStrategy>>()),\n   204\u2192                _ => throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Unknown strategy: {strategyName}\")\n   205\u2192            });\n   206\u2192\n   207\u2192        return services.BuildServiceProvider();\n   208\u2192    }\n   209\u2192\n   210\u2192    #endregion\n   211\u2192}\n   212\u2192\n   213\u2192#region Domain Models\n   214\u2192\n   215\u2192/// <summary>\n   216\u2192/// Raw calendar event emitted by the upstream ingestion service.\n   217\u2192/// </summary>\n   218\u2192public sealed record CalendarEventPayload\n   219\u2192{\n   220\u2192    public required string  EventId          { get; init; }\n   221\u2192    public required string  Organizer        { get; init; }\n   222\u2192    public required string  Subject          { get; init; }\n   223\u2192    public required DateTimeOffset StartUtc  { get; init; }\n   224\u2192    public required DateTimeOffset EndUtc    { get; init; }\n   225\u2192    public required string[] Attendees       { get; init; }\n   226\u2192    public required bool    IsRecurring      { get; init; }\n   227\u2192    public IDictionary<string, string>? Metadata { get; init; }\n   228\u2192}\n   229\u2192\n   230\u2192/// <summary>\n   231\u2192/// Enriched record ready for downstream analytics.\n   232\u2192/// </summary>\n   233\u2192public sealed record MeetingCostKpiRecord\n   234\u2192{\n   235\u2192    public required string EventId { get; init; }\n   236\u2192    public required double CostUsd { get; init; }\n   237\u2192    public required TimeSpan Duration { get; init; }\n   238\u2192    public required Dictionary<string, object?> Attributes { get; init; }\n   239\u2192}\n   240\u2192\n   241\u2192#endregion\n   242\u2192\n   243\u2192#region Validation\n   244\u2192\n   245\u2192public interface ICalendarValidator\n   246\u2192{\n   247\u2192    void ValidateOrThrow(CalendarEventPayload payload);\n   248\u2192}\n   249\u2192\n   250\u2192public sealed class SchemaValidator : ICalendarValidator\n   251\u2192{\n   252\u2192    private const int MaxTitleLength = 256;\n   253\u2192\n   254\u2192    public void ValidateOrThrow(CalendarEventPayload payload)\n   255\u2192    {\n   256\u2192        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(payload.EventId))\n   257\u2192            throw new CalendarValidationException(\"EventId must be non-empty.\");\n   258\u2192\n   259\u2192        if (payload.StartUtc >= payload.EndUtc)\n   260\u2192            throw new CalendarValidationException(\"StartUtc must be before EndUtc.\");\n   261\u2192\n   262\u2192        if (payload.Subject.Length > MaxTitleLength)\n   263\u2192            throw new CalendarValidationException($\"Subject exceeds max length {MaxTitleLength}.\");\n   264\u2192\n   265\u2192        if (payload.Attendees.Length == 0)\n   266\u2192            throw new CalendarValidationException(\"Must have at least one attendee.\");\n   267\u2192    }\n   268\u2192}\n   269\u2192\n   270\u2192public sealed class CalendarValidationException : Exception\n   271\u2192{\n   272\u2192    public CalendarValidationException(string message) : base(message) { }\n   273\u2192}\n   274\u2192\n   275\u2192#endregion\n   276\u2192\n   277\u2192#region Strategy Pattern\n   278\u2192\n   279\u2192/// <summary>\n   280\u2192/// Transformation abstraction.  Implementations must be thread-safe.\n   281\u2192/// </summary>\n   282\u2192public interface ITransformationStrategy\n   283\u2192{\n   284\u2192    Task<MeetingCostKpiRecord> TransformAsync(CalendarEventPayload source, ILambdaContext ctx, CancellationToken ct);\n   285\u2192}\n   286\u2192\n   287\u2192/// <summary>\n   288\u2192/// Sample KPI strategy: estimates cost based on attendee salary bands & meeting duration.\n   289\u2192/// </summary>\n   290\u2192public sealed class MeetingCostKpiStrategy : ITransformationStrategy\n   291\u2192{\n   292\u2192    private readonly ILogger<MeetingCostKpiStrategy> _logger;\n   293\u2192\n   294\u2192    // Simplified static salary lookup. In reality this would query HR data.\n   295\u2192    private static readonly Dictionary<string, double> SalaryByEmail = new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)\n   296\u2192    {\n   297\u2192        [\"cto@example.com\"]       = 250_000,\n   298\u2192        [\"vp-eng@example.com\"]    = 220_000,\n   299\u2192        [\"staff@example.com\"]     = 190_000,\n   300\u2192        [\"intern@example.com\"]    = 60_000\n   301\u2192    };\n   302\u2192\n   303\u2192    public MeetingCostKpiStrategy(ILogger<MeetingCostKpiStrategy> logger) => _logger = logger;\n   304\u2192\n   305\u2192    public Task<MeetingCostKpiRecord> TransformAsync(CalendarEventPayload source, ILambdaContext ctx, CancellationToken ct)\n   306\u2192    {\n   307\u2192        var duration  = source.EndUtc - source.StartUtc;\n   308\u2192        var totalCost = 0.0;\n   309\u2192\n   310\u2192        foreach (var attendee in source.Attendees)\n   311\u2192        {\n   312\u2192            var salary   = SalaryByEmail.TryGetValue(attendee, out var sal) ? sal : 120_000; // default\n   313\u2192            var hourly   = salary / (52 * 40); // Rough hourly cost\n   314\u2192            totalCost   += hourly * duration.TotalHours;\n   315\u2192        }\n   316\u2192\n   317\u2192        var result = new MeetingCostKpiRecord\n   318\u2192        {\n   319\u2192            EventId    = source.EventId,\n   320\u2192            CostUsd    = Math.Round(totalCost, 2),\n   321\u2192            Duration   = duration,\n   322\u2192            Attributes = new Dictionary<string, object?>\n   323\u2192            {\n   324\u2192                [\"Subject\"]      = source.Subject,\n   325\u2192                [\"Organizer\"]    = source.Organizer,\n   326\u2192                [\"AttendeeCount\"]= source.Attendees.Length,\n   327\u2192                [\"IsRecurring\"]  = source.IsRecurring,\n   328\u2192                [\"CapturedAt\"]   = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow\n   329\u2192            }\n   330\u2192        };\n   331\u2192\n   332\u2192        _logger.LogDebug(\"Calculated cost for {EventId}: ${Cost}\", source.EventId, result.CostUsd);\n   333\u2192\n   334\u2192        return Task.FromResult(result);\n   335\u2192    }\n   336\u2192}\n   337\u2192\n   338\u2192#endregion\n   339\u2192```\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

Output
"     1\u2192```csharp\n     2\u2192// -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n     3\u2192// File:        module_34.cs\n     4\u2192// Project:     PulseOps Warehouse \u2014 Serverless Productivity Intelligence Fabric (data_warehouse)\n     5\u2192// Description: Registry, engine and exemplar strategies for KPI computation.  Leverages the\n     6\u2192//              Strategy Pattern to allow drop-in replacement of business rules without redeploying\n     7\u2192//              Lambda functions.  Designed to run inside a .NET AWS Lambda, but decoupled from the\n     8\u2192//              runtime so the same code can be executed in unit-tests or containers.\n     9\u2192// -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n    10\u2192#nullable enable\n    11\u2192\n    12\u2192using System;\n    13\u2192using System.Collections.Concurrent;\n    14\u2192using System.Collections.Generic;\n    15\u2192using System.Linq;\n    16\u2192using System.Text.Json;\n    17\u2192using System.Threading;\n    18\u2192using System.Threading.Tasks;\n    19\u2192using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;\n    20\u2192\n    21\u2192namespace PulseOps.Warehouse.KpiComputation\n    22\u2192{\n    23\u2192    #region \ud83d\udd11 Public Contracts\n    24\u2192\n    25\u2192    /// <summary>\n    26\u2192    /// Common contract for all KPI computation strategies.\n    27\u2192    /// Implementations MUST be stateless and thread-safe.\n    28\u2192    /// </summary>\n    29\u2192    public interface IKpiComputationStrategy\n    30\u2192    {\n    31\u2192        /// <summary>\n    32\u2192        /// Friendly identifier used for routing and diagnostics.\n    33\u2192        /// </summary>\n    34\u2192        string StrategyId { get; }\n    35\u2192\n    36\u2192        /// <summary>\n    37\u2192        /// Computes a KPI for the specified time-range and entity scope.\n    38\u2192        /// Implementations are encouraged to stream results progressively.\n    39\u2192        /// </summary>\n    40\u2192        /// <param name=\"context\">The input context containing raw events.</param>\n    41\u2192        /// <param name=\"logger\">Structured logger for diagnostics.</param>\n    42\u2192        /// <param name=\"cancellationToken\">Cancellation token.</param>\n    43\u2192        /// <returns>A KPI computation result payload.</returns>\n    44\u2192        Task<KpiComputationResult> ComputeAsync(\n    45\u2192            KpiComputationContext context,\n    46\u2192            ILogger logger,\n    47\u2192            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);\n    48\u2192    }\n    49\u2192\n    50\u2192    /// <summary>\n    51\u2192    /// Context object passed to KPI calculators, containing the raw material required\n    52\u2192    /// for the computation of a single KPI incl. configuration and raw events.\n    53\u2192    /// </summary>\n    54\u2192    public sealed record KpiComputationContext(\n    55\u2192        string TenantId,\n    56\u2192        DateTimeOffset From,\n    57\u2192        DateTimeOffset To,\n    58\u2192        IReadOnlyDictionary<string, JsonElement> Parameters,\n    59\u2192        RawEventBuffer RawEvents);\n    60\u2192\n    61\u2192    /// <summary>\n    62\u2192    /// Standard envelope returned by all KPI computation strategies.\n    63\u2192    /// </summary>\n    64\u2192    public sealed record KpiComputationResult(\n    65\u2192        string TenantId,\n    66\u2192        string KpiKey,\n    67\u2192        DateTimeOffset From,\n    68\u2192        DateTimeOffset To,\n    69\u2192        JsonElement Payload);\n    70\u2192\n    71\u2192    #endregion\n    72\u2192\n    73\u2192    #region \ud83d\udce6 Registry & Engine\n    74\u2192\n    75\u2192    /// <summary>\n    76\u2192    /// Thread-safe registry responsible for resolving KPI computation strategies at runtime.\n    77\u2192    /// Typically wired into the DI container with a Singleton lifetime.\n    78\u2192    /// </summary>\n    79\u2192    public sealed class KpiComputationStrategyRegistry\n    80\u2192    {\n    81\u2192        private readonly ConcurrentDictionary<string, IKpiComputationStrategy> _strategies = new();\n    82\u2192\n    83\u2192        public KpiComputationStrategyRegistry(IEnumerable<IKpiComputationStrategy> discoveredStrategies,\n    84\u2192                                              ILogger<KpiComputationStrategyRegistry> logger)\n    85\u2192        {\n    86\u2192            foreach (var strategy in discoveredStrategies)\n    87\u2192            {\n    88\u2192                if (!_strategies.TryAdd(strategy.StrategyId, strategy))\n    89\u2192                {\n    90\u2192                    logger.LogWarning(\"Duplicate KPI strategy registration detected for {StrategyId}\", strategy.StrategyId);\n    91\u2192                }\n    92\u2192                else\n    93\u2192                {\n    94\u2192                    logger.LogInformation(\"Registered KPI strategy: {StrategyId}\", strategy.StrategyId);\n    95\u2192                }\n    96\u2192            }\n    97\u2192        }\n    98\u2192\n    99\u2192        /// <summary>\n   100\u2192        /// Resolve a strategy by its logical identifier.\n   101\u2192        /// </summary>\n   102\u2192        /// <exception cref=\"KeyNotFoundException\">Thrown when the strategy cannot be resolved.</exception>\n   103\u2192        public IKpiComputationStrategy Resolve(string strategyId)\n   104\u2192        {\n   105\u2192            if (_strategies.TryGetValue(strategyId, out var strategy))\n   106\u2192                return strategy;\n   107\u2192\n   108\u2192            throw new KeyNotFoundException(\n   109\u2192                $\"No KPI computation strategy has been registered with id '{strategyId}'.\");\n   110\u2192        }\n   111\u2192\n   112\u2192        /// <summary>\n   113\u2192        /// Returns all known strategy identifiers.\n   114\u2192        /// </summary>\n   115\u2192        public IReadOnlyCollection<string> KnownStrategies => _strategies.Keys.ToArray();\n   116\u2192    }\n   117\u2192\n   118\u2192    /// <summary>\n   119\u2192    /// Orchestrates KPI computation by delegating to a concrete strategy.\n   120\u2192    /// Serves as an anti-corruption layer between the Lambda handler and strategy implementations.\n   121\u2192    /// </summary>\n   122\u2192    public sealed class KpiComputationEngine\n   123\u2192    {\n   124\u2192        private readonly KpiComputationStrategyRegistry _registry;\n   125\u2192        private readonly ILogger<KpiComputationEngine> _logger;\n   126\u2192\n   127\u2192        public KpiComputationEngine(KpiComputationStrategyRegistry registry,\n   128\u2192                                    ILogger<KpiComputationEngine> logger)\n   129\u2192        {\n   130\u2192            _registry = registry;\n   131\u2192            _logger = logger;\n   132\u2192        }\n   133\u2192\n   134\u2192        /// <summary>\n   135\u2192        /// Compute a KPI using the strategy specified in the context parameters (\"strategyId\").\n   136\u2192        /// Unknown strategies are automatically routed to a default pass-through result to avoid\n   137\u2192        /// poisoning the entire batch.\n   138\u2192        /// </summary>\n   139\u2192        public async Task<KpiComputationResult?> ComputeAsync(\n   140\u2192            KpiComputationContext context,\n   141\u2192            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)\n   142\u2192        {\n   143\u2192            if (!context.Parameters.TryGetValue(\"strategyId\", out var strategyIdElement) ||\n   144\u2192                strategyIdElement.ValueKind != JsonValueKind.String)\n   145\u2192            {\n   146\u2192                _logger.LogError(\"KPI context is missing 'strategyId' parameter\");\n   147\u2192                return null;\n   148\u2192            }\n   149\u2192\n   150\u2192            var strategyId = strategyIdElement.GetString()!;\n   151\u2192            IKpiComputationStrategy strategy;\n   152\u2192\n   153\u2192            try\n   154\u2192            {\n   155\u2192                strategy = _registry.Resolve(strategyId);\n   156\u2192            }\n   157\u2192            catch (KeyNotFoundException ex)\n   158\u2192            {\n   159\u2192                _logger.LogError(ex, \"Failed to resolve KPI strategy '{StrategyId}'\", strategyId);\n   160\u2192                return null;\n   161\u2192            }\n   162\u2192\n   163\u2192            using var activity = Telemetry.StartActivity(\"ComputeKpi\", (\"strategyId\", strategyId));\n   164\u2192\n   165\u2192            _logger.LogInformation(\"Starting KPI computation: {StrategyId} for Tenant={TenantId}\", strategyId, context.TenantId);\n   166\u2192\n   167\u2192            try\n   168\u2192            {\n   169\u2192                var result = await strategy.ComputeAsync(context, _logger, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(false);\n   170\u2192\n   171\u2192                _logger.LogInformation(\"Computed KPI '{KpiKey}' for Tenant={TenantId}\", result.KpiKey, result.TenantId);\n   172\u2192                return result;\n   173\u2192            }\n   174\u2192            catch (OperationCanceledException) when (cancellationToken.IsCancellationRequested)\n   175\u2192            {\n   176\u2192                _logger.LogWarning(\"KPI computation was cancelled (Strategy={StrategyId}, Tenant={TenantId})\",\n   177\u2192                    strategyId, context.TenantId);\n   178\u2192                return null;\n   179\u2192            }\n   180\u2192            catch (Exception ex)\n   181\u2192            {\n   182\u2192                _logger.LogError(ex,\n   183\u2192                    \"Unhandled error while computing KPI (Strategy={StrategyId}, Tenant={TenantId})\",\n   184\u2192                    strategyId, context.TenantId);\n   185\u2192                throw; // Bubble up to Lambda error handler \u2192 DLQ\n   186\u2192            }\n   187\u2192        }\n   188\u2192    }\n   189\u2192\n   190\u2192    #endregion\n   191\u2192\n   192\u2192    #region \ud83d\udcca Exemplary Strategies\n   193\u2192\n   194\u2192    /// <summary>\n   195\u2192    /// Calculates the Focus Time Ratio:\n   196\u2192    /// (Total Focus Hours) / (Total Working Hours)\n   197\u2192    /// Focus hours are defined as continuous blocks of time \u2265 2h with\n   198\u2192    /// no meetings, no commit activity, and no Slack messages.\n   199\u2192    /// </summary>\n   200\u2192    public sealed class FocusTimeRatioStrategy : IKpiComputationStrategy\n   201\u2192    {\n   202\u2192        public string StrategyId => \"focus-time-ratio\";\n   203\u2192\n   204\u2192        public async Task<KpiComputationResult> ComputeAsync(\n   205\u2192            KpiComputationContext context,\n   206\u2192            ILogger logger,\n   207\u2192            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)\n   208\u2192        {\n   209\u2192            // Simulate async I/O, e.g. reading additional artefacts from S3\n   210\u2192            await Task.Yield();\n   211\u2192\n   212\u2192            var focusIntervals = new List<DateTimeOffset>();\n   213\u2192            var workingIntervals = new List<DateTimeOffset>();\n   214\u2192\n   215\u2192            foreach (var e in context.RawEvents.Iterate())\n   216\u2192            {\n   217\u2192                cancellationToken.ThrowIfCancellationRequested();\n   218\u2192\n   219\u2192                switch (e)\n   220\u2192                {\n   221\u2192                    case TimeEntryEvent tee:\n   222\u2192                        workingIntervals.Add(tee.Timestamp);\n   223\u2192                        break;\n   224\u2192                    case MeetingEvent me:\n   225\u2192                        // Mark as non-focus\n   226\u2192                        break;\n   227\u2192                    case CommitEvent ce:\n   228\u2192                        // Non-focus\n   229\u2192                        break;\n   230\u2192                    default:\n   231\u2192                        break;\n   232\u2192                }\n   233\u2192\n   234\u2192                // For demo purposes we synthesise results\n   235\u2192                if (e.Timestamp.Minute % 13 == 0)\n   236\u2192                    focusIntervals.Add(e.Timestamp);\n   237\u2192            }\n   238\u2192\n   239\u2192            var totalWorkingHours = workingIntervals.Count / 4.0; // Fake math\n   240\u2192            var totalFocusHours   = focusIntervals.Count   / 4.0;\n   241\u2192\n   242\u2192            var ratio = totalWorkingHours == 0 ? 0 : totalFocusHours / totalWorkingHours;\n   243\u2192\n   244\u2192            var payloadJson = JsonSerializer.SerializeToElement(new\n   245\u2192            {\n   246\u2192                ratio,\n   247\u2192                totalFocusHours,\n   248\u2192                totalWorkingHours\n   249\u2192            });\n   250\u2192\n   251\u2192            return new KpiComputationResult(\n   252\u2192                context.TenantId,\n   253\u2192                \"focus_time_ratio\",\n   254\u2192                context.From,\n   255\u2192                context.To,\n   256\u2192                payloadJson);\n   257\u2192        }\n   258\u2192    }\n   259\u2192\n   260\u2192    /// <summary>\n   261\u2192    /// Calculates Deployment Lead Time:\n   262\u2192    /// Time elapsed between code commit and successful production deployment.\n   263\u2192    /// </summary>\n   264\u2192    public sealed class DeploymentLeadTimeStrategy : IKpiComputationStrategy\n   265\u2192    {\n   266\u2192        public string StrategyId => \"deployment-lead-time\";\n   267\u2192\n   268\u2192        public async Task<KpiComputationResult> ComputeAsync(\n   269\u2192            KpiComputationContext context,\n   270\u2192            ILogger logger,\n   271\u2192            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)\n   272\u2192        {\n   273\u2192            await Task.Yield();\n   274\u2192\n   275\u2192            var leadTimes = new List<TimeSpan>();\n   276\u2192\n   277\u2192            // Naive sample implementation\n   278\u2192            var commits     = context.RawEvents.OfType<CommitEvent>().OrderBy(c => c.Timestamp).ToList();\n   279\u2192            var deployments = context.RawEvents.OfType<DeploymentEvent>().OrderBy(d => d.Timestamp).ToList();\n   280\u2192\n   281\u2192            foreach (var commit in commits)\n   282\u2192            {\n   283\u2192                cancellationToken.ThrowIfCancellationRequested();\n   284\u2192\n   285\u2192                var deploy = deployments.FirstOrDefault(d => d.CommitId == commit.CommitId);\n   286\u2192                if (deploy != null)\n   287\u2192                {\n   288\u2192                    leadTimes.Add(deploy.Timestamp - commit.Timestamp);\n   289\u2192                }\n   290\u2192            }\n   291\u2192\n   292\u2192            var p50 = Percentile(leadTimes, 0.50);\n   293\u2192            var p90 = Percentile(leadTimes, 0.90);\n   294\u2192\n   295\u2192            var payloadJson = JsonSerializer.SerializeToElement(new\n   296\u2192            {\n   297\u2192                p50_minutes = p50.TotalMinutes,\n   298\u2192                p90_minutes = p90.TotalMinutes\n   299\u2192            });\n   300\u2192\n   301\u2192            return new KpiComputationResult(\n   302\u2192                context.TenantId,\n   303\u2192                \"deployment_lead_time\",\n   304\u2192                context.From,\n   305\u2192                context.To,\n   306\u2192                payloadJson);\n   307\u2192        }\n   308\u2192\n   309\u2192        private static TimeSpan Percentile(IReadOnlyList<TimeSpan> data, double percentile)\n   310\u2192        {\n   311\u2192            if (data.Count == 0) return TimeSpan.Zero;\n   312\u2192\n   313\u2192            var ordered = data.OrderBy(x => x).ToArray();\n   314\u2192            var index   = (int)Math.Ceiling(percentile * ordered.Length) - 1;\n   315\u2192            index       = Math.Clamp(index, 0, ordered.Length - 1);\n   316\u2192\n   317\u2192            return ordered[index];\n   318\u2192        }\n   319\u2192    }\n   320\u2192\n   321\u2192    /// <summary>\n   322\u2192    /// Calculates Meeting Cost Index \u2013 total salary cost of meetings held in the timeframe.\n   323\u2192    /// </summary>\n   324\u2192    public sealed class MeetingCostIndexStrategy : IKpiComputationStrategy\n   325\u2192    {\n   326\u2192        public string StrategyId => \"meeting-cost-index\";\n   327\u2192\n   328\u2192        public async Task<KpiComputationResult> ComputeAsync(\n   329\u2192            KpiComputationContext context,\n   330\u2192            ILogger logger,\n   331\u2192            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)\n   332\u2192        {\n   333\u2192            await Task.Yield();\n   334\u2192\n   335\u2192            var hourlyRate      = context.Parameters.TryGetValue(\"hourlyRateUSD\", out var rateElm) &&\n   336\u2192                                  rateElm.TryGetDecimal(out var rateUsd) ? rateUsd : 90m;\n   337\u2192\n   338\u2192            decimal totalCost = 0m;\n   339\u2192            int     meetings  = 0;\n   340\u2192\n   341\u2192            foreach (var meeting in context.RawEvents.OfType<MeetingEvent>())\n   342\u2192            {\n   343\u2192                cancellationToken.ThrowIfCancellationRequested();\n   344\u2192\n   345\u2192                var durationHours = meeting.Duration.TotalHours;\n   346\u2192                var attendeeCount = meeting.Attendees.Count;\n   347\u2192\n   348\u2192                totalCost += (decimal)durationHours * attendeeCount * hourlyRate;\n   349\u2192                meetings++;\n   350\u2192            }\n   351\u2192\n   352\u2192            var payloadJson = JsonSerializer.SerializeToElement(new\n   353\u2192            {\n   354\u2192                totalCostUSD = Math.Round(totalCost, 2),\n   355\u2192                meetingCount = meetings,\n   356\u2192                avgCostPerMeetingUSD = meetings == 0 ? 0 : Math.Round(totalCost / meetings, 2)\n   357\u2192            });\n   358\u2192\n   359\u2192            return new KpiComputationResult(\n   360\u2192                context.TenantId,\n   361\u2192                \"meeting_cost_index\",\n   362\u2192                context.From,\n   363\u2192                context.To,\n   364\u2192                payloadJson);\n   365\u2192        }\n   366\u2192    }\n   367\u2192\n   368\u2192    #endregion\n   369\u2192\n   370\u2192    #region \ud83e\uddf1 Supporting Domain Objects\n   371\u2192\n   372\u2192    /// <summary>\n   373\u2192    /// Simplistic in-memory buffer for raw events.  Backed by the Kinesis stream / S3\n   374\u2192    /// objects at runtime, but abstracted for testability.\n   375\u2192    /// </summary>\n   376\u2192    public sealed class RawEventBuffer : IEnumerable<BaseEvent>\n   377\u2192    {\n   378\u2192        private readonly IReadOnlyList<BaseEvent> _events;\n   379\u2192\n   380\u2192        public RawEventBuffer(IEnumerable<BaseEvent> events)\n   381\u2192        {\n   382\u2192            _events = events.ToArray();\n   383\u2192        }\n   384\u2192\n   385\u2192        public IEnumerator<BaseEvent> GetEnumerator() => _events.GetEnumerator();\n   386\u2192        System.Collections.IEnumerator System.Collections.IEnumerable.GetEnumerator() => GetEnumerator();\n   387\u2192\n   388\u2192        public IEnumerable<T> OfType<T>() where T : BaseEvent => _events.OfType<T>();\n   389\u2192\n   390\u2192        public IEnumerable<BaseEvent> Iterate() => _events;\n   391\u2192    }\n   392\u2192\n   393\u2192    public abstract record BaseEvent(DateTimeOffset Timestamp);\n   394\u2192\n   395\u2192    public sealed record TimeEntryEvent(DateTimeOffset Timestamp, string UserId) : BaseEvent(Timestamp);\n   396\u2192    public sealed record CommitEvent(DateTimeOffset Timestamp, string CommitId, string Author) : BaseEvent(Timestamp);\n   397\u2192    public sealed record DeploymentEvent(DateTimeOffset Timestamp, string CommitId, string Environment) : BaseEvent(Timestamp);\n   398\u2192    public sealed record MeetingEvent(DateTimeOffset Timestamp,\n   399\u2192                                      TimeSpan Duration,\n   400\u2192                                      IReadOnlyList<string> Attendees) : BaseEvent(Timestamp);\n   401\u2192\n   402\u2192    #endregion\n   403\u2192\n   404\u2192    #region \u2699\ufe0f  Telemetry Helper\n   405\u2192\n   406\u2192    /// <summary>\n   407\u2192    /// Minimalistic OpenTelemetry shim so callers don\u2019t need to reference the full library.\n   408\u2192    /// For production deployments this type is replaced by a proper wrapper.\n   409\u2192    /// </summary>\n   410\u2192    internal static class Telemetry\n   411\u2192    {\n   412\u2192        public static IDisposable StartActivity(string name, params (string Key, string? Value)[] tags)\n   413\u2192        {\n   414\u2192            // In production this would be: ActivitySource.StartActivity(...);\n   415\u2192            return new NullActivity();\n   416\u2192        }\n   417\u2192\n   418\u2192        private sealed class NullActivity : IDisposable\n   419\u2192        {\n   420\u2192            public void Dispose() { /* no-op */ }\n   421\u2192        }\n   422\u2192    }\n   423\u2192\n   424\u2192    #endregion\n   425\u2192\n   426\u2192    #region \ud83d\udd27 JsonElement Extensions\n   427\u2192\n   428\u2192    internal static class JsonElementExtensions\n   429\u2192    {\n   430\u2192        public static bool TryGetDecimal(this JsonElement element, out decimal value)\n   431\u2192        {\n   432\u2192            switch (element.ValueKind)\n   433\u2192            {\n   434\u2192                case JsonValueKind.Number when element.TryGetDecimal(out value):\n   435\u2192                    return true;\n   436\u2192                case JsonValueKind.String when decimal.TryParse(element.GetString(), out value):\n   437\u2192                    return true;\n   438\u2192                default:\n   439\u2192                    value = default;\n   440\u2192                    return false;\n   441\u2192            }\n   442\u2192        }\n   443\u2192    }\n   444\u2192\n   445\u2192    #endregion\n   446\u2192}\n   447\u2192```\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
