}
Output
"     1\u2192```csharp\n     2\u2192// File: src/module_11.txt\n     3\u2192// Project: PulseOps Warehouse \u2014 Serverless Productivity Intelligence Fabric (data_warehouse)\n     4\u2192// Language: C#\n     5\u2192// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n     6\u2192// This module provides a dynamic, plug-in\u2013aware strategy registry responsible\n     7\u2192// for discovering, instantiating, and caching transformation strategies at\n     8\u2192// runtime. It enables teams to hot-swap business logic without redeployment by\n     9\u2192// merely dropping an assembly into the strategy plug-in folder.\n    10\u2192// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------\n    11\u2192\n    12\u2192using System;\n    13\u2192using System.Collections.Concurrent;\n    14\u2192using System.Collections.Generic;\n    15\u2192using System.IO;\n    16\u2192using System.Linq;\n    17\u2192using System.Reflection;\n    18\u2192using System.Runtime.Loader;\n    19\u2192using System.Threading;\n    20\u2192using System.Threading.Tasks;\n    21\u2192using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;\n    22\u2192\n    23\u2192namespace PulseOps.Warehouse.Transformations\n    24\u2192{\n    25\u2192    /// <summary>\n    26\u2192    /// Represents the canonical contract every transformation strategy must fulfill.\n    27\u2192    /// </summary>\n    28\u2192    public interface ITransformationStrategy : IAsyncDisposable\n    29\u2192    {\n    30\u2192        /// <summary>\n    31\u2192        /// Human-readable, unique identifier that maps to this strategy.\n    32\u2192        /// </summary>\n    33\u2192        string Name { get; }\n    34\u2192\n    35\u2192        /// <summary>\n    36\u2192        /// Executes the transformation.\n    37\u2192        /// </summary>\n    38\u2192        /// <param name=\"context\">Input context with raw data + envelopes.</param>\n    39\u2192        /// <param name=\"cancellationToken\">Cancellation token.</param>\n    40\u2192        /// <returns>A task containing <see cref=\"TransformationResult\"/></returns>\n    41\u2192        Task<TransformationResult> ExecuteAsync(\n    42\u2192            TransformationContext context,\n    43\u2192            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);\n    44\u2192    }\n    45\u2192\n    46\u2192    /// <summary>\n    47\u2192    /// Input envelope passed to a transformation strategy.\n    48\u2192    /// Holds raw payload, entity metadata, and correlation identifiers.\n    49\u2192    /// </summary>\n    50\u2192    public sealed class TransformationContext\n    51\u2192    {\n    52\u2192        public TransformationContext(\n    53\u2192            ReadOnlyMemory<byte> payload,\n    54\u2192            string tenantId,\n    55\u2192            string streamName,\n    56\u2192            IDictionary<string, string> requestHeaders,\n    57\u2192            Guid correlationId)\n    58\u2192        {\n    59\u2192            Payload          = payload;\n    60\u2192            TenantId         = tenantId;\n    61\u2192            StreamName       = streamName;\n    62\u2192            RequestHeaders   = requestHeaders;\n    63\u2192            CorrelationId    = correlationId;\n    64\u2192            CreatedUtc       = DateTime.UtcNow;\n    65\u2192        }\n    66\u2192\n    67\u2192        public ReadOnlyMemory<byte> Payload { get; }\n    68\u2192        public string TenantId { get; }\n    69\u2192        public string StreamName { get; }\n    70\u2192        public IDictionary<string, string> RequestHeaders { get; }\n    71\u2192        public Guid CorrelationId { get; }\n    72\u2192        public DateTime CreatedUtc { get; }\n    73\u2192    }\n    74\u2192\n    75\u2192    /// <summary>\n    76\u2192    /// Result emitted by a transformation strategy.\n    77\u2192    /// </summary>\n    78\u2192    public sealed class TransformationResult\n    79\u2192    {\n    80\u2192        public TransformationResult(\n    81\u2192            string outputPartitionKey,\n    82\u2192            ReadOnlyMemory<byte> transformedPayload,\n    83\u2192            IDictionary<string, string> metadata)\n    84\u2192        {\n    85\u2192            OutputPartitionKey = outputPartitionKey;\n    86\u2192            TransformedPayload = transformedPayload;\n    87\u2192            Metadata           = metadata;\n    88\u2192        }\n    89\u2192\n    90\u2192        public string OutputPartitionKey { get; }\n    91\u2192        public ReadOnlyMemory<byte> TransformedPayload { get; }\n    92\u2192        public IDictionary<string, string> Metadata { get; }\n    93\u2192    }\n    94\u2192\n    95\u2192    /// <summary>\n    96\u2192    /// Factory/registry that discovers and caches transformation strategies on-demand.\n    97\u2192    /// Implements lazy loading & thread-safe caching for high-throughput streams.\n    98\u2192    /// </summary>\n    99\u2192    public sealed class TransformationStrategyRegistry : IAsyncDisposable\n   100\u2192    {\n   101\u2192        private readonly ILogger<TransformationStrategyRegistry> _logger;\n   102\u2192        private readonly ConcurrentDictionary<string, Lazy<Task<ITransformationStrategy>>> _strategyCache;\n   103\u2192        private readonly string _pluginFolder;\n   104\u2192\n   105\u2192        public TransformationStrategyRegistry(\n   106\u2192            ILogger<TransformationStrategyRegistry> logger,\n   107\u2192            string? pluginFolder = null)\n   108\u2192        {\n   109\u2192            _logger        = logger ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(logger));\n   110\u2192            _strategyCache = new ConcurrentDictionary<string, Lazy<Task<ITransformationStrategy>>>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n   111\u2192\n   112\u2192            // If not provided, fall back to a convention-based path inside /opt/plugins (Lambda Layer container path) or local bin folder.\n   113\u2192            _pluginFolder = pluginFolder ??\n   114\u2192                            (Directory.Exists(\"/opt/plugins\")\n   115\u2192                                    ? \"/opt/plugins\"\n   116\u2192                                    : Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, \"plugins\"));\n   117\u2192\n   118\u2192            _logger.LogInformation(\"TransformationStrategyRegistry initialized. Plugin folder: {PluginFolder}\", _pluginFolder);\n   119\u2192        }\n   120\u2192\n   121\u2192        /// <summary>\n   122\u2192        /// Asynchronously resolves a transformation strategy, loading it if required.\n   123\u2192        /// Strategies are cached in memory for subsequent calls.\n   124\u2192        /// </summary>\n   125\u2192        /// <param name=\"strategyName\">Case-insensitive unique name of the strategy.</param>\n   126\u2192        /// <returns>A task containing the strategy instance.</returns>\n   127\u2192        /// <exception cref=\"KeyNotFoundException\">Thrown if the strategy cannot be found.</exception>\n   128\u2192        public Task<ITransformationStrategy> ResolveAsync(string strategyName)\n   129\u2192        {\n   130\u2192            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(strategyName))\n   131\u2192                throw new ArgumentException(\"Strategy name cannot be empty.\", nameof(strategyName));\n   132\u2192\n   133\u2192            var lazyStrategy = _strategyCache.GetOrAdd(strategyName, name => new Lazy<Task<ITransformationStrategy>>(\n   134\u2192                () => LoadStrategyAsync(name), LazyThreadSafetyMode.ExecutionAndPublication));\n   135\u2192\n   136\u2192            return lazyStrategy.Value;\n   137\u2192        }\n   138\u2192\n   139\u2192        /// <summary>\n   140\u2192        /// Lists all strategies currently loaded in memory (does not scan disk).\n   141\u2192        /// </summary>\n   142\u2192        public IEnumerable<string> LoadedStrategies => _strategyCache.Keys;\n   143\u2192\n   144\u2192        /// <summary>\n   145\u2192        /// Releases all cached strategies and their managed/unmanaged resources.\n   146\u2192        /// </summary>\n   147\u2192        public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()\n   148\u2192        {\n   149\u2192            // Safely dispose every strategy.\n   150\u2192            foreach (var pair in _strategyCache)\n   151\u2192            {\n   152\u2192                if (pair.Value.IsValueCreated && pair.Value.Value.IsCompletedSuccessfully)\n   153\u2192                {\n   154\u2192                    var strategy = await pair.Value.Value.ConfigureAwait(false);\n   155\u2192                    await strategy.DisposeAsync().ConfigureAwait(false);\n   156\u2192                }\n   157\u2192            }\n   158\u2192\n   159\u2192            _strategyCache.Clear();\n   160\u2192            GC.SuppressFinalize(this);\n   161\u2192        }\n   162\u2192\n   163\u2192        // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n   164\u2192        // Implementation details\n   165\u2192        // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n   166\u2192\n   167\u2192        private async Task<ITransformationStrategy> LoadStrategyAsync(string strategyName)\n   168\u2192        {\n   169\u2192            _logger.LogInformation(\"Loading transformation strategy '{StrategyName}'.\", strategyName);\n   170\u2192\n   171\u2192            // Look for the plug-in DLL that contains a type implementing ITransformationStrategy with matching Name property.\n   172\u2192            var strategyType = await FindStrategyTypeOnDiskAsync(strategyName).ConfigureAwait(false);\n   173\u2192\n   174\u2192            if (strategyType == null)\n   175\u2192            {\n   176\u2192                _logger.LogError(\"Strategy '{StrategyName}' not found on disk.\", strategyName);\n   177\u2192                throw new KeyNotFoundException($\"Strategy '{strategyName}' not found.\");\n   178\u2192            }\n   179\u2192\n   180\u2192            // Instantiate via Activator (DI container could be integrated via ServiceProvider if needed).\n   181\u2192            if (Activator.CreateInstance(strategyType) is not ITransformationStrategy strategyInstance)\n   182\u2192            {\n   183\u2192                _logger.LogError(\n   184\u2192                    \"Failed to instantiate strategy '{StrategyName}'. Type loaded: {StrategyType}.\",\n   185\u2192                    strategyName, strategyType.FullName);\n   186\u2192\n   187\u2192                throw new InvalidOperationException(\n   188\u2192                    $\"Strategy '{strategyName}' failed to instantiate. Verify default constructor.\");\n   189\u2192            }\n   190\u2192\n   191\u2192            _logger.LogInformation(\"Strategy '{StrategyName}' successfully loaded & cached.\", strategyName);\n   192\u2192            return strategyInstance;\n   193\u2192        }\n   194\u2192\n   195\u2192        private async Task<Type?> FindStrategyTypeOnDiskAsync(string strategyName)\n   196\u2192        {\n   197\u2192            // Non-blocking I/O to enumerate potential assemblies.\n   198\u2192            return await Task.Run(() =>\n   199\u2192            {\n   200\u2192                if (!Directory.Exists(_pluginFolder))\n   201\u2192                {\n   202\u2192                    _logger.LogWarning(\"Plugin folder '{PluginFolder}' does not exist.\", _pluginFolder);\n   203\u2192                    return null;\n   204\u2192                }\n   205\u2192\n   206\u2192                foreach (var dllPath in Directory.EnumerateFiles(_pluginFolder, \"*.dll\", SearchOption.AllDirectories))\n   207\u2192                {\n   208\u2192                    try\n   209\u2192                    {\n   210\u2192                        // Load into a custom AssemblyLoadContext for hot-unload support.\n   211\u2192                        var alc    = new PluginLoadContext(dllPath);\n   212\u2192                        var asm    = alc.LoadFromAssemblyPath(dllPath);\n   213\u2192                        var types  = asm.GetTypes()\n   214\u2192                                        .Where(t => typeof(ITransformationStrategy).IsAssignableFrom(t) && !t.IsAbstract && !t.IsInterface);\n   215\u2192\n   216\u2192                        foreach (var type in types)\n   217\u2192                        {\n   218\u2192                            // Instantiate temporarily to check Name property.\n   219\u2192#if NET6_0_OR_GREATER\n   220\u2192                            if (Activator.CreateInstance(type) is ITransformationStrategy tmp)\n   221\u2192                            {\n   222\u2192                                if (string.Equals(tmp.Name, strategyName, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))\n   223\u2192                                {\n   224\u2192                                    // Important: store the ALC reference to prevent GC & keep assembly alive.\n   225\u2192                                    _ = _strategyCache.GetOrAdd(strategyName, _ => new Lazy<Task<ITransformationStrategy>>(\n   226\u2192                                        () => Task.FromResult<ITransformationStrategy>(tmp), LazyThreadSafetyMode.ExecutionAndPublication));\n   227\u2192\n   228\u2192                                    return type;\n   229\u2192                                }\n   230\u2192\n   231\u2192                                tmp.DisposeAsync().AsTask().GetAwaiter().GetResult();\n   232\u2192                            }\n   233\u2192#else\n   234\u2192                            var instance = Activator.CreateInstance(type) as ITransformationStrategy;\n   235\u2192                            if (instance != null)\n   236\u2192                            {\n   237\u2192                                if (string.Equals(instance.Name, strategyName, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))\n   238\u2192                                {\n   239\u2192                                    _ = _strategyCache.GetOrAdd(strategyName, _ => new Lazy<Task<ITransformationStrategy>>(\n   240\u2192                                        () => Task.FromResult<ITransformationStrategy>(instance), LazyThreadSafetyMode.ExecutionAndPublication));\n   241\u2192\n   242\u2192                                    return type;\n   243\u2192                                }\n   244\u2192\n   245\u2192                                instance.DisposeAsync().AsTask().GetAwaiter().GetResult();\n   246\u2192                            }\n   247\u2192#endif\n   248\u2192                        }\n   249\u2192                    }\n   250\u2192                    catch (Exception ex)\n   251\u2192                    {\n   252\u2192                        // Continue scanning; log and swallow since other assemblies might still contain the strategy.\n   253\u2192                        _logger.LogWarning(ex, \"Error while scanning assembly '{DllPath}' for strategy '{StrategyName}'.\", dllPath, strategyName);\n   254\u2192                    }\n   255\u2192                }\n   256\u2192\n   257\u2192                return null;\n   258\u2192            }).ConfigureAwait(false);\n   259\u2192        }\n   260\u2192\n   261\u2192        // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n   262\u2192        // Nested helper: AssemblyLoadContext that supports unloading.\n   263\u2192        // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n   264\u2192        private sealed class PluginLoadContext : AssemblyLoadContext\n   265\u2192        {\n   266\u2192            private readonly AssemblyDependencyResolver _resolver;\n   267\u2192\n   268\u2192            public PluginLoadContext(string pluginPath)\n   269\u2192                : base(isCollectible: true)\n   270\u2192            {\n   271\u2192                _resolver = new AssemblyDependencyResolver(pluginPath);\n   272\u2192            }\n   273\u2192\n   274\u2192            protected override Assembly? Load(AssemblyName assemblyName)\n   275\u2192            {\n   276\u2192                var assemblyPath = _resolver.ResolveAssemblyToPath(assemblyName);\n   277\u2192                return assemblyPath != null ? LoadFromAssemblyPath(assemblyPath) : null;\n   278\u2192            }\n   279\u2192        }\n   280\u2192    }\n   281\u2192}\n   282\u2192```\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
101. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "grep -rn \"class.*Stream\\|class.*Buffer\" /app/project/src --include=\"*.txt\" | grep -i \"manager\\|pool\" | head -20",
  "description": "Search for buffer/stream manager classes"
}
Output
""
102. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "ls -la /app/project/src/*.txt | wc -l && echo \"---\" && for f in /app/project/src/module_*.txt; do if grep -q \"private.*Queue\\|_queue\\|_pool\" \"$f\" 2>/dev/null; then echo \"$f\"; fi; done",
  "description": "Count modules and find ones with queue/pool fields"
}
Output
"90\n---\n/app/project/src/module_35.txt\n/app/project/src/module_61.txt\n/app/project/src/module_72.txt\n/app/project/src/module_75.txt"
103. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/app/project/src/module_75.txt"
}
Output
"     1\u2192```csharp\n     2\u2192// File: src/module_75.txt\n     3\u2192// Project: PulseOps Warehouse \u2014 Serverless Productivity Intelligence Fabric\n     4\u2192// Language: C# 10\n     5\u2192// ---------------------------------------------\n     6\u2192// This module implements a reusable, back-pressure-aware time-series\n     7\u2192// aggregation engine that can be plugged into any Lambda/Kinesis\n     8\u2192// micro-component.  It embraces the Observer pattern in order to be\n     9\u2192// embeddable in both streaming (push) and batch (pull) scenarios while\n    10\u2192// still preserving functional purity through a user-supplied\n    11\u2192// aggregation delegate.\n    12\u2192//\n    13\u2192// Key capabilities\n    14\u2192// \u2022 Tumbling & sliding windows                                             \n    15\u2192// \u2022 Thread-safe, lock-free hot path                                        \n    16\u2192// \u2022 Back-pressure aware via System.Threading.Channels                      \n    17\u2192// \u2022 Real-time Observable<KpiMetric> output                                 \n    18\u2192// \u2022 Fault-tolerant (bubble-up strategy / DLQ compatible)                   \n    19\u2192// ---------------------------------------------\n    20\u2192#nullable enable\n    21\u2192using System;\n    22\u2192using System.Collections.Concurrent;\n    23\u2192using System.Collections.Generic;\n    24\u2192using System.Globalization;\n    25\u2192using System.Linq;\n    26\u2192using System.Reactive.Linq;\n    27\u2192using System.Reactive.Subjects;\n    28\u2192using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;\n    29\u2192using System.Text.Json;\n    30\u2192using System.Threading;\n    31\u2192using System.Threading.Channels;\n    32\u2192using System.Threading.Tasks;\n    33\u2192\n    34\u2192namespace PulseOps.Warehouse.Transformations\n    35\u2192{\n    36\u2192    /// <summary>\n    37\u2192    /// Single domain event coming from any ingestion source.\n    38\u2192    /// A deliberately flat structure that can be re-shaped downstream.\n    39\u2192    /// </summary>\n    40\u2192    /// <param name=\"Timestamp\">UTC timestamp the event occurred.</param>\n    41\u2192    /// <param name=\"EventType\">Human-friendly event discriminator.</param>\n    42\u2192    /// <param name=\"ActorId\">Primary user / system identifier.</param>\n    43\u2192    /// <param name=\"NumericValue\">\n    44\u2192    /// Optional raw measurement (e.g. duration seconds, bytes, \u2026).\n    45\u2192    /// When null the <see cref=\"Attributes\"/> collection must carry meaning.\n    46\u2192    /// </param>\n    47\u2192    /// <param name=\"Attributes\">Catch-all property bag.</param>\n    48\u2192    public sealed record ProductivityEvent(\n    49\u2192        DateTimeOffset Timestamp,\n    50\u2192        string EventType,\n    51\u2192        string ActorId,\n    52\u2192        decimal? NumericValue,\n    53\u2192        IReadOnlyDictionary<string, string>? Attributes);\n    54\u2192\n    55\u2192    /// <summary>\n    56\u2192    /// Output of the aggregator \u2013 one atomic KPI.\n    57\u2192    /// </summary>\n    58\u2192    /// <param name=\"WindowStart\">Left-inclusive boundary.</param>\n    59\u2192    /// <param name=\"WindowEnd\">Right-exclusive boundary.</param>\n    60\u2192    /// <param name=\"MetricName\">Business-level name (e.g. \"FocusTimeRatio\").</param>\n    61\u2192    /// <param name=\"Value\">Aggregated numeric value.</param>\n    62\u2192    /// <param name=\"DimensionKeys\">Partition keys used for slicing/dicing.</param>\n    63\u2192    public sealed record KpiMetric(\n    64\u2192        DateTimeOffset WindowStart,\n    65\u2192        DateTimeOffset WindowEnd,\n    66\u2192        string MetricName,\n    67\u2192        decimal Value,\n    68\u2192        IReadOnlyDictionary<string, string>? DimensionKeys);\n    69\u2192\n    70\u2192    /// <summary>\n    71\u2192    /// Sliding or tumbling time window policy.\n    72\u2192    /// </summary>\n    73\u2192    public enum TimeWindowType\n    74\u2192    {\n    75\u2192        Tumbling,\n    76\u2192        Sliding\n    77\u2192    }\n    78\u2192\n    79\u2192    /// <summary>\n    80\u2192    /// Configuration object for <see cref=\"TimeSeriesWindowAggregator\"/>.\n    81\u2192    /// </summary>\n    82\u2192    public sealed class TimeWindowOptions\n    83\u2192    {\n    84\u2192        /// <summary>\n    85\u2192        /// Total width of the window.  Must be \u2265 <see cref=\"SlideInterval\"/>.\n    86\u2192        /// </summary>\n    87\u2192        public required TimeSpan WindowSize { get; init; }\n    88\u2192\n    89\u2192        /// <summary>\n    90\u2192        /// Distance between consecutive window emit points.\n    91\u2192        /// For tumbling windows this acts as window size as well.\n    92\u2192        /// </summary>\n    93\u2192        public required TimeSpan SlideInterval { get; init; }\n    94\u2192\n    95\u2192        /// <summary>\n    96\u2192        /// Whether watermarking (late event allowance) is active.\n    97\u2192        /// </summary>\n    98\u2192        public TimeSpan AllowedLateness { get; init; } = TimeSpan.Zero;\n    99\u2192\n   100\u2192        public TimeWindowType WindowType { get; init; } = TimeWindowType.Tumbling;\n   101\u2192\n   102\u2192        /// <summary>\n   103\u2192        /// Safety check to avoid mis-configuration at runtime.\n   104\u2192        /// </summary>\n   105\u2192        /// <exception cref=\"ArgumentException\"></exception>\n   106\u2192        public void Validate()\n   107\u2192        {\n   108\u2192            if (WindowSize <= TimeSpan.Zero)\n   109\u2192                throw new ArgumentException($\"{nameof(WindowSize)} must be > 0\", nameof(WindowSize));\n   110\u2192\n   111\u2192            if (SlideInterval <= TimeSpan.Zero)\n   112\u2192                throw new ArgumentException($\"{nameof(SlideInterval)} must be > 0\", nameof(SlideInterval));\n   113\u2192\n   114\u2192            if (SlideInterval > WindowSize && WindowType == TimeWindowType.Sliding)\n   115\u2192                throw new ArgumentException(\n   116\u2192                    $\"{nameof(SlideInterval)} cannot exceed {nameof(WindowSize)} for sliding windows.\", nameof(SlideInterval));\n   117\u2192        }\n   118\u2192    }\n   119\u2192\n   120\u2192    /// <summary>\n   121\u2192    /// Calculates a KPI value from a set of <see cref=\"ProductivityEvent\"/> items.\n   122\u2192    /// </summary>\n   123\u2192    /// <param name=\"windowEvents\">Events belonging to one complete time window.</param>\n   124\u2192    /// <returns>The calculated KPI metric(s).</returns>\n   125\u2192    public delegate IEnumerable<KpiMetric> KpiAggregationDelegate(\n   126\u2192        IReadOnlyCollection<ProductivityEvent> windowEvents,\n   127\u2192        DateTimeOffset windowStart,\n   128\u2192        DateTimeOffset windowEnd);\n   129\u2192\n   130\u2192    /// <summary>\n   131\u2192    /// Reactive, high-performance aggregation engine.\n   132\u2192    /// Implements IObserver for ingestion and IObservable for metric fan-out.\n   133\u2192    /// </summary>\n   134\u2192    public sealed class TimeSeriesWindowAggregator : IObserver<ProductivityEvent>, IObservable<KpiMetric>, IAsyncDisposable\n   135\u2192    {\n   136\u2192        private readonly KpiAggregationDelegate _aggregationLogic;\n   137\u2192        private readonly TimeWindowOptions _options;\n   138\u2192\n   139\u2192        private readonly Subject<KpiMetric> _metricStream = new();\n   140\u2192        private readonly Channel<ProductivityEvent> _inputChannel;\n   141\u2192\n   142\u2192        // Concurrency primitives\n   143\u2192        private readonly CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();\n   144\u2192        private readonly Task _backgroundTask;\n   145\u2192\n   146\u2192        // Internal buffer storing events inside the current active window(s)\n   147\u2192        // We deliberately use a ConcurrentQueue to keep insertion O(1) and avoid\n   148\u2192        // global locks on the hot path.\n   149\u2192        private readonly ConcurrentQueue<ProductivityEvent> _buffer = new();\n   150\u2192\n   151\u2192        // Latest watermark processed (monotonic)\n   152\u2192        private DateTimeOffset _currentWindowCutoff;\n   153\u2192\n   154\u2192        public TimeSeriesWindowAggregator(\n   155\u2192            KpiAggregationDelegate aggregationLogic,\n   156\u2192            TimeWindowOptions options,\n   157\u2192            int boundedCapacity = 10_000) // backpressure\n   158\u2192        {\n   159\u2192            options.Validate();\n   160\u2192\n   161\u2192            _aggregationLogic = aggregationLogic ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(aggregationLogic));\n   162\u2192            _options = options;\n   163\u2192\n   164\u2192            _inputChannel = Channel.CreateBounded<ProductivityEvent>(new BoundedChannelOptions(boundedCapacity)\n   165\u2192            {\n   166\u2192                SingleReader = true,\n   167\u2192                SingleWriter = false,\n   168\u2192                FullMode = BoundedChannelFullMode.Wait\n   169\u2192            });\n   170\u2192\n   171\u2192            _currentWindowCutoff = AlignToWindowStart(DateTimeOffset.UtcNow);\n   172\u2192\n   173\u2192            _backgroundTask = Task.Factory.StartNew(\n   174\u2192                WorkLoopAsync,\n   175\u2192                _cts.Token,\n   176\u2192                TaskCreationOptions.LongRunning,\n   177\u2192                TaskScheduler.Default).Unwrap();\n   178\u2192        }\n   179\u2192\n   180\u2192        #region IObserver\n   181\u2192\n   182\u2192        public void OnNext(ProductivityEvent value)\n   183\u2192        {\n   184\u2192            if (!_inputChannel.Writer.TryWrite(value))\n   185\u2192            {\n   186\u2192                // backpressure fallback \u2013 should never happen due to boundedChannel Wait\n   187\u2192                throw new InvalidOperationException(\"Input channel rejected write unexpectedly.\");\n   188\u2192            }\n   189\u2192        }\n   190\u2192\n   191\u2192        public void OnError(Exception error)\n   192\u2192        {\n   193\u2192            // Bubble up to downstream subscribers \u2013 they'll decide what to do.\n   194\u2192            _metricStream.OnError(error);\n   195\u2192        }\n   196\u2192\n   197\u2192        public void OnCompleted()\n   198\u2192        {\n   199\u2192            _inputChannel.Writer.Complete();\n   200\u2192        }\n   201\u2192\n   202\u2192        #endregion\n   203\u2192\n   204\u2192        #region IObservable\n   205\u2192\n   206\u2192        public IDisposable Subscribe(IObserver<KpiMetric> observer)\n   207\u2192        {\n   208\u2192            return _metricStream.AsObservable().Subscribe(observer);\n   209\u2192        }\n   210\u2192\n   211\u2192        #endregion\n   212\u2192\n   213\u2192        private async Task WorkLoopAsync()\n   214\u2192        {\n   215\u2192            try\n   216\u2192            {\n   217\u2192                var reader = _inputChannel.Reader;\n   218\u2192\n   219\u2192                while (await reader.WaitToReadAsync(_cts.Token).ConfigureAwait(false))\n   220\u2192                {\n   221\u2192                    while (reader.TryRead(out var evt))\n   222\u2192                    {\n   223\u2192                        _buffer.Enqueue(evt);\n   224\u2192                    }\n   225\u2192\n   226\u2192                    FlushExpiredWindows();\n   227\u2192                }\n   228\u2192            }\n   229\u2192            catch (OperationCanceledException)\n   230\u2192            {\n   231\u2192                // Normal shutdown \u2013 ignore.\n   232\u2192            }\n   233\u2192            catch (Exception ex)\n   234\u2192            {\n   235\u2192                // Surface unexpected exceptions so ops team is alerted (PagerDuty).\n   236\u2192                _metricStream.OnError(ex);\n   237\u2192            }\n   238\u2192            finally\n   239\u2192            {\n   240\u2192                _metricStream.OnCompleted();\n   241\u2192            }\n   242\u2192        }\n   243\u2192\n   244\u2192        /// <summary>\n   245\u2192        /// Remove records that no longer belong to any open window and emit\n   246\u2192        /// completed windows downstream.\n   247\u2192        /// </summary>\n   248\u2192        [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]\n   249\u2192        private void FlushExpiredWindows()\n   250\u2192        {\n   251\u2192            var now = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow;\n   252\u2192\n   253\u2192            // Move watermark forward in increments of SlideInterval until the current time is covered.\n   254\u2192            while (_currentWindowCutoff + _options.WindowSize <= now)\n   255\u2192            {\n   256\u2192                var windowStart = _currentWindowCutoff;\n   257\u2192                var windowEnd = windowStart + _options.WindowSize;\n   258\u2192\n   259\u2192                // Gather relevant events.\n   260\u2192                var windowEvents = DrainEvents(windowStart, windowEnd);\n   261\u2192\n   262\u2192                // Apply user-supplied aggregation delegate.\n   263\u2192                try\n   264\u2192                {\n   265\u2192                    foreach (var metric in _aggregationLogic(windowEvents, windowStart, windowEnd))\n   266\u2192                    {\n   267\u2192                        _metricStream.OnNext(metric);\n   268\u2192                    }\n   269\u2192                }\n   270\u2192                catch (Exception ex)\n   271\u2192                {\n   272\u2192                    // Fail-fast on faulty business logic so we don't silently produce wrong numbers.\n   273\u2192                    _metricStream.OnError(new AggregationException(\n   274\u2192                        $\"Aggregation delegate threw for window {windowStart:o}-{windowEnd:o}\", ex));\n   275\u2192                }\n   276\u2192\n   277\u2192                // Advance watermark\n   278\u2192                _currentWindowCutoff = windowStart + _options.SlideInterval;\n   279\u2192            }\n   280\u2192        }\n   281\u2192\n   282\u2192        /// <summary>\n   283\u2192        /// Retrieve and remove events from the buffer that are part of the\n   284\u2192        /// requested window interval.\n   285\u2192        /// </summary>\n   286\u2192        private IReadOnlyCollection<ProductivityEvent> DrainEvents(DateTimeOffset windowStart, DateTimeOffset windowEnd)\n   287\u2192        {\n   288\u2192            var set = new List<ProductivityEvent>(capacity: 1024);\n   289\u2192\n   290\u2192            while (_buffer.TryPeek(out var candidate))\n   291\u2192            {\n   292\u2192                if (candidate.Timestamp < windowStart)\n   293\u2192                {\n   294\u2192                    // Too old: discard\n   295\u2192                    _buffer.TryDequeue(out _);\n   296\u2192                    continue;\n   297\u2192                }\n   298\u2192\n   299\u2192                if (candidate.Timestamp >= windowEnd)\n   300\u2192                {\n   301\u2192                    // Still in future window \u2013 stop draining.\n   302\u2192                    break;\n   303\u2192                }\n   304\u2192\n   305\u2192                // In window range\n   306\u2192                _buffer.TryDequeue(out var inWindow);\n   307\u2192                if (inWindow != null)\n   308\u2192                {\n   309\u2192                    set.Add(inWindow);\n   310\u2192                }\n   311\u2192            }\n   312\u2192\n   313\u2192            return set;\n   314\u2192        }\n   315\u2192\n   316\u2192        /// <summary>\n   317\u2192        /// Aligns the given timestamp to the previous aligned window boundary.\n   318\u2192        /// </summary>\n   319\u2192        private DateTimeOffset AlignToWindowStart(DateTimeOffset timestamp)\n   320\u2192        {\n   321\u2192            var ticks = (long)(_options.SlideInterval.Ticks *\n   322\u2192                               Math.Floor(timestamp.UtcTicks / (double)_options.SlideInterval.Ticks));\n   323\u2192            return new DateTimeOffset(ticks, TimeSpan.Zero);\n   324\u2192        }\n   325\u2192\n   326\u2192        public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()\n   327\u2192        {\n   328\u2192            _cts.Cancel();\n   329\u2192\n   330\u2192            // Wait for graceful termination, but don't block forever.\n   331\u2192            var completedTask = await Task.WhenAny(_backgroundTask, Task.Delay(5000)).ConfigureAwait(false);\n   332\u2192            if (completedTask != _backgroundTask)\n   333\u2192            {\n   334\u2192                // Force task to fault for diagnostic purposes\n   335\u2192                _metricStream.OnError(new TimeoutException(\"Aggregator failed to shut down in timely manner.\"));\n   336\u2192            }\n   337\u2192\n   338\u2192            _cts.Dispose();\n   339\u2192            _metricStream.Dispose();\n   340\u2192        }\n   341\u2192\n   342\u2192        /// <summary>\n   343\u2192        /// Aggregation delegate convenience builder that computes a simple\n   344\u2192        /// sum over NumericValue field.\n   345\u2192        /// </summary>\n   346\u2192        public static KpiAggregationDelegate SumNumeric(string metricName, Func<ProductivityEvent, bool>? predicate = null)\n   347\u2192            => (events, start, end) =>\n   348\u2192            {\n   349\u2192                var query = predicate is null ? events : events.Where(predicate);\n   350\u2192                var total = query.Sum(e => e.NumericValue.GetValueOrDefault());\n   351\u2192                return new[]\n   352\u2192                {\n   353\u2192                    new KpiMetric(start, end, metricName, total, DimensionKeys: null)\n   354\u2192                };\n   355\u2192            };\n   356\u2192    }\n   357\u2192\n   358\u2192    /// <summary>\n   359\u2192    /// Bundles aggregation related failures so they can be handled explicitly\n   360\u2192    /// by an upstream error boundary (e.g. Lambda DLQ).\n   361\u2192    /// </summary>\n   362\u2192    public sealed class AggregationException : Exception\n   363\u2192    {\n   364\u2192        public AggregationException(string message, Exception innerException)\n   365\u2192            : base(message, innerException)\n   366\u2192        {\n   367\u2192        }\n   368\u2192    }\n   369\u2192\n   370\u2192    // Example usage wiring in a Lambda context\n   371\u2192    //\n   372\u2192    // var options = new TimeWindowOptions\n   373\u2192    // {\n   374\u2192    //     WindowSize = TimeSpan.FromMinutes(5),\n   375\u2192    //     SlideInterval = TimeSpan.FromMinutes(1)\n   376\u2192    // };\n   377\u2192    //\n   378\u2192    // var aggregator = new TimeSeriesWindowAggregator(\n   379\u2192    //         TimeSeriesWindowAggregator.SumNumeric(\"LinesOfCodeChanged\"),\n   380\u2192    //         options);\n   381\u2192    //\n   382\u2192    // aggregator.Subscribe(metric =>\n   383\u2192    // {\n   384\u2192    //     // e.g. Push to DynamoDB/ S3 / CloudWatch\n   385\u2192    //     PutMetric(metric);\n   386\u2192    // });\n   387\u2192    //\n   388\u2192    // inputEvents.ForEach(aggregator.OnNext);\n   389\u2192    // aggregator.OnCompleted();\n   390\u2192}\n   391\u2192```\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n    13\u2192\n    14\u2192#nullable enable\n    15\u2192\n    16\u2192using System;\n    17\u2192using System.Collections.Concurrent;\n    18\u2192using System.Collections.Generic;\n    19\u2192using System.Diagnostics;\n    20\u2192using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;\n    21\u2192using System.Text.Json;\n    22\u2192using System.Threading;\n    23\u2192using System.Threading.Tasks;\n    24\u2192using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;\n    25\u2192\n    26\u2192namespace PulseOps.Warehouse.Transformations\n    27\u2192{\n    28\u2192    /// <summary>\n    29\u2192    /// Immutable domain object that represents a raw event emitted by upstream ingestion Lambdas.\n    30\u2192    /// </summary>\n    31\u2192    public sealed record StreamEvent(\n    32\u2192        string   Source,           // e.g. \"calendar\", \"git\", \"cicd\"\n    33\u2192        string   Type,             // e.g. \"meeting.created\", \"commit\", \"deployment.succeeded\"\n    34\u2192        byte[]   Payload,          // JSON-encoded payload\n    35\u2192        DateTime TimestampUtc      // ISO 8601 UTC timestamp\n    36\u2192    );\n    37\u2192\n    38\u2192    /// <summary>\n    39\u2192    /// Immutable domain object that represents an individual KPI sample produced by\n    40\u2192    /// a <see cref=\"ITransformationStrategy\"/>.\n    41\u2192    /// </summary>\n    42\u2192    public sealed record TransformationResult(\n    43\u2192        string                     Metric,       // e.g. \"focus_time_ratio\"\n    44\u2192        IReadOnlyDictionary<string, object?> Data,\n    45\u2192        DateTime                   CalculatedAtUtc\n    46\u2192    );\n    47\u2192\n    48\u2192    /// <summary>\n    49\u2192    /// Common contract for transformation strategies.  Each strategy converts a raw\n    50\u2192    /// <see cref=\"StreamEvent\"/> into zero or more <see cref=\"TransformationResult\"/> objects.\n    51\u2192    /// </summary>\n    52\u2192    public interface ITransformationStrategy\n    53\u2192    {\n    54\u2192        /// <summary>The friendly identifier of the strategy.</summary>\n    55\u2192        string Name { get; }\n    56\u2192\n    57\u2192        /// <summary>\n    58\u2192        /// True when the strategy can handle the given <paramref name=\"streamEvent\"/>.\n    59\u2192        /// </summary>\n    60\u2192        bool CanHandle(in StreamEvent streamEvent);\n    61\u2192\n    62\u2192        /// <summary>\n    63\u2192        /// Transforms the event into domain KPIs.\n    64\u2192        /// </summary>\n    65\u2192        ValueTask<IReadOnlyCollection<TransformationResult>> TransformAsync(\n    66\u2192            StreamEvent      streamEvent,\n    67\u2192            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);\n    68\u2192    }\n    69\u2192\n    70\u2192    /// <summary>\n    71\u2192    /// Strategy that computes the focus-time ratio from calendar events.\n    72\u2192    /// </summary>\n    73\u2192    public sealed class FocusTimeRatioStrategy : ITransformationStrategy\n    74\u2192    {\n    75\u2192        private readonly ILogger<FocusTimeRatioStrategy> _logger;\n    76\u2192\n    77\u2192        public FocusTimeRatioStrategy(ILogger<FocusTimeRatioStrategy> logger) => _logger = logger;\n    78\u2192\n    79\u2192        public string Name => \"focus_time_ratio\";\n    80\u2192\n    81\u2192        public bool CanHandle(in StreamEvent streamEvent) =>\n    82\u2192            streamEvent.Source.Equals(\"calendar\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) &&\n    83\u2192            streamEvent.Type.Equals(\"meeting.batch\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n    84\u2192\n    85\u2192        public ValueTask<IReadOnlyCollection<TransformationResult>> TransformAsync(\n    86\u2192            StreamEvent       streamEvent,\n    87\u2192            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)\n    88\u2192        {\n    89\u2192            try\n    90\u2192            {\n    91\u2192                var document = JsonDocument.Parse(streamEvent.Payload);\n    92\u2192                double totalMeetingMinutes = 0;\n    93\u2192                double totalFocusMinutes   = 0;\n    94\u2192\n    95\u2192                foreach (var meeting in document.RootElement.GetProperty(\"meetings\").EnumerateArray())\n    96\u2192                {\n    97\u2192                    totalMeetingMinutes += meeting.GetProperty(\"durationMinutes\").GetDouble();\n    98\u2192                    if (meeting.GetProperty(\"isFocusTime\").GetBoolean())\n    99\u2192                    {\n   100\u2192                        totalFocusMinutes += meeting.GetProperty(\"durationMinutes\").GetDouble();\n   101\u2192                    }\n   102\u2192                }\n   103\u2192\n   104\u2192                var ratio = totalMeetingMinutes == 0\n   105\u2192                    ? 0\n   106\u2192                    : Math.Round(totalFocusMinutes / totalMeetingMinutes, 3);\n   107\u2192\n   108\u2192                var kpi = new TransformationResult(\n   109\u2192                    Metric: \"focus_time_ratio\",\n   110\u2192                    Data: new Dictionary<string, object?>\n   111\u2192                    {\n   112\u2192                        [\"ratio\"]             = ratio,\n   113\u2192                        [\"total_meeting_min\"] = totalMeetingMinutes,\n   114\u2192                        [\"total_focus_min\"]   = totalFocusMinutes\n   115\u2192                    },\n   116\u2192                    CalculatedAtUtc: DateTime.UtcNow);\n   117\u2192\n   118\u2192                return ValueTask.FromResult<IReadOnlyCollection<TransformationResult>>(new[] { kpi });\n   119\u2192            }\n   120\u2192            catch (Exception ex)\n   121\u2192            {\n   122\u2192                _logger.LogError(ex,\n   123\u2192                    \"[KPI:FocusTimeRatio] Failed to transform calendar event (id: {Source}/{Type}).\",\n   124\u2192                    streamEvent.Source, streamEvent.Type);\n   125\u2192                throw; // propagate to DLQ via Lambda\u2019s failure handling\n   126\u2192            }\n   127\u2192        }\n   128\u2192    }\n   129\u2192\n   130\u2192    /// <summary>\n   131\u2192    /// Strategy that computes deployment lead-time given a commit and corresponding deployment event.\n   132\u2192    /// Uses an in-memory correlation cache; for production, consider DynamoDB with TTL.\n   133\u2192    /// </summary>\n   134\u2192    public sealed class DeploymentLeadTimeStrategy : ITransformationStrategy\n   135\u2192    {\n   136\u2192        private readonly ILogger<DeploymentLeadTimeStrategy> _logger;\n   137\u2192\n   138\u2192        // (commitSha -> timestampUtc)\n   139\u2192        private readonly ConcurrentDictionary<string, DateTime> _commitCache = new();\n   140\u2192\n   141\u2192        public DeploymentLeadTimeStrategy(ILogger<DeploymentLeadTimeStrategy> logger) => _logger = logger;\n   142\u2192\n   143\u2192        public string Name => \"deployment_lead_time\";\n   144\u2192\n   145\u2192        public bool CanHandle(in StreamEvent streamEvent) =>\n   146\u2192            streamEvent.Source is \"git\" or \"cicd\";\n   147\u2192\n   148\u2192        public ValueTask<IReadOnlyCollection<TransformationResult>> TransformAsync(\n   149\u2192            StreamEvent       streamEvent,\n   150\u2192            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)\n   151\u2192        {\n   152\u2192            var payload = JsonDocument.Parse(streamEvent.Payload).RootElement;\n   153\u2192            switch (streamEvent.Source)\n   154\u2192            {\n   155\u2192                case \"git\" when streamEvent.Type == \"commit\":\n   156\u2192                {\n   157\u2192                    var sha = payload.GetProperty(\"sha\").GetString()!;\n   158\u2192                    var committedAt = payload.GetProperty(\"timestampUtc\").GetDateTime();\n   159\u2192                    _commitCache.TryAdd(sha, committedAt);\n   160\u2192                    // no KPI yet, wait for deployment event\n   161\u2192                    return ValueTask.FromResult<IReadOnlyCollection<TransformationResult>>(Array.Empty<TransformationResult>());\n   162\u2192                }\n   163\u2192\n   164\u2192                case \"cicd\" when streamEvent.Type == \"deployment.succeeded\":\n   165\u2192                {\n   166\u2192                    var sha = payload.GetProperty(\"commitSha\").GetString()!;\n   167\u2192                    if (!_commitCache.TryRemove(sha, out var committedAt))\n   168\u2192                    {\n   169\u2192                        // Commit not found; maybe commit happened before in back-fill. Log and bail out.\n   170\u2192                        _logger.LogWarning(\n   171\u2192                            \"[KPI:DeploymentLeadTime] Commit {Sha} missing from cache; ignoring deployment event.\",\n   172\u2192                            sha);\n   173\u2192                        return ValueTask.FromResult<IReadOnlyCollection<TransformationResult>>(Array.Empty<TransformationResult>());\n   174\u2192                    }\n   175\u2192\n   176\u2192                    var deployedAt = payload.GetProperty(\"deployedAtUtc\").GetDateTime();\n   177\u2192                    var leadTime   = (deployedAt - committedAt).TotalMinutes;\n   178\u2192\n   179\u2192                    var kpi = new TransformationResult(\n   180\u2192                        Metric: \"deployment_lead_time\",\n   181\u2192                        Data: new Dictionary<string, object?>\n   182\u2192                        {\n   183\u2192                            [\"commitSha\"]       = sha,\n   184\u2192                            [\"leadTimeMinutes\"] = leadTime\n   185\u2192                        },\n   186\u2192                        CalculatedAtUtc: DateTime.UtcNow);\n   187\u2192\n   188\u2192                    return ValueTask.FromResult<IReadOnlyCollection<TransformationResult>>(new[] { kpi });\n   189\u2192                }\n   190\u2192\n   191\u2192                default:\n   192\u2192                    // Should never reach here if CanHandle() is correct.\n   193\u2192                    throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Unexpected event {streamEvent.Source}/{streamEvent.Type}\");\n   194\u2192            }\n   195\u2192        }\n   196\u2192    }\n   197\u2192\n   198\u2192    /// <summary>\n   199\u2192    /// Registry that lazily instantiates and holds all available <see cref=\"ITransformationStrategy\"/>s.\n   200\u2192    /// Acts as the single source-of-truth for strategy discovery.\n   201\u2192    /// </summary>\n   202\u2192    public sealed class TransformationStrategyRegistry\n   203\u2192    {\n   204\u2192        private readonly IReadOnlyList<ITransformationStrategy> _strategies;\n   205\u2192\n   206\u2192        public TransformationStrategyRegistry(Func<Type, object> serviceFactory)\n   207\u2192        {\n   208\u2192            _strategies = new ITransformationStrategy[]\n   209\u2192            {\n   210\u2192                (ITransformationStrategy)serviceFactory(typeof(FocusTimeRatioStrategy)),\n   211\u2192                (ITransformationStrategy)serviceFactory(typeof(DeploymentLeadTimeStrategy)),\n   212\u2192                // Add new strategies here \u2934\n   213\u2192            };\n   214\u2192        }\n   215\u2192\n   216\u2192        public IEnumerable<ITransformationStrategy> GetCandidates(in StreamEvent streamEvent)\n   217\u2192        {\n   218\u2192            foreach (var strat in _strategies)\n   219\u2192            {\n   220\u2192                if (strat.CanHandle(streamEvent))\n   221\u2192                    yield return strat;\n   222\u2192            }\n   223\u2192        }\n   224\u2192    }\n   225\u2192\n   226\u2192    /// <summary>\n   227\u2192    /// Main orchestration engine.  Accepts a batch of <see cref=\"StreamEvent\"/>s,\n   228\u2192    /// dispatches them to the correct strategy in parallel, and aggregates results.\n   229\u2192    /// \n   230\u2192    /// Thread-safe and stateless \u2014 perfect for Lambda/Serverless invocations.\n   231\u2192    /// </summary>\n   232\u2192    public sealed class TransformationEngine\n   233\u2192    {\n   234\u2192        private readonly TransformationStrategyRegistry _registry;\n   235\u2192        private readonly ILogger<TransformationEngine>  _logger;\n   236\u2192\n   237\u2192        public TransformationEngine(\n   238\u2192            TransformationStrategyRegistry registry,\n   239\u2192            ILogger<TransformationEngine>  logger)\n   240\u2192        {\n   241\u2192            _registry = registry;\n   242\u2192            _logger   = logger;\n   243\u2192        }\n   244\u2192\n   245\u2192        /// <summary>\n   246\u2192        /// Processes a batch of raw events and returns KPI results.\n   247\u2192        /// </summary>\n   248\u2192        public async Task<IReadOnlyCollection<TransformationResult>> TransformAsync(\n   249\u2192            IReadOnlyCollection<StreamEvent> events,\n   250\u2192            CancellationToken                cancellationToken = default)\n   251\u2192        {\n   252\u2192            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(events);\n   253\u2192\n   254\u2192            if (events.Count == 0)\n   255\u2192            {\n   256\u2192                return Array.Empty<TransformationResult>();\n   257\u2192            }\n   258\u2192\n   259\u2192            var sw = Stopwatch.StartNew();\n   260\u2192            var kpiBag = new ConcurrentBag<TransformationResult>();\n   261\u2192\n   262\u2192            // .NET 6+: Parallel.ForEachAsync uses async-await inside\n   263\u2192            await Parallel.ForEachAsync(events, cancellationToken, async (streamEvent, ct) =>\n   264\u2192            {\n   265\u2192                try\n   266\u2192                {\n   267\u2192                    var candidates = _registry.GetCandidates(streamEvent);\n   268\u2192                    foreach (var strategy in candidates)\n   269\u2192                    {\n   270\u2192                        var kpis = await strategy.TransformAsync(streamEvent, ct).ConfigureAwait(false);\n   271\u2192                        foreach (var kpi in kpis)\n   272\u2192                        {\n   273\u2192                            kpiBag.Add(kpi);\n   274\u2192                        }\n   275\u2192                    }\n   276\u2192                }\n   277\u2192                catch (Exception ex) when (HandleError(ex, streamEvent))\n   278\u2192                {\n   279\u2192                    // swallow after logging, as HandleError already dealt with it.\n   280\u2192                }\n   281\u2192            }).ConfigureAwait(false);\n   282\u2192\n   283\u2192            _logger.LogInformation(\n   284\u2192                \"Transformation batch finished: {TotalEvents} events, {TotalKpis} KPIs, {ElapsedMs} ms.\",\n   285\u2192                events.Count, kpiBag.Count, sw.ElapsedMilliseconds);\n   286\u2192\n   287\u2192            return kpiBag.ToArray();\n   288\u2192        }\n   289\u2192\n   290\u2192        /// <summary>\n   291\u2192        /// Centralized error-handling policy. Returns false to rethrow and bubble up to runtime,\n   292\u2192        /// true to suppress the exception (already logged).\n   293\u2192        /// </summary>\n   294\u2192        private bool HandleError(Exception ex, in StreamEvent streamEvent,\n   295\u2192            [CallerMemberName] string? caller = null)\n   296\u2192        {\n   297\u2192            _logger.LogError(ex,\n   298\u2192                \"[TransformEngine] {Caller} failed for event {Source}/{Type} \u2014 routed to DLQ.\",\n   299\u2192                caller, streamEvent.Source, streamEvent.Type);\n   300\u2192\n   301\u2192            // Return true so that Parallel.ForEachAsync continues processing other events.\n   302\u2192            // The failed item will end up in DLQ via Lambda\u2019s batch item failure response.\n   303\u2192            return true;\n   304\u2192        }\n   305\u2192    }\n   306\u2192}\n   307\u2192```\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

{
  "file_path": "/app/project/src/module_19.txt",
  "limit": 300
}
Output
"     1\u2192using System;\n     2\u2192using System.Collections.Generic;\n     3\u2192using System.IO;\n     4\u2192using System.Linq;\n     5\u2192using System.Text.Json;\n     6\u2192using System.Threading;\n     7\u2192using System.Threading.Tasks;\n     8\u2192using Amazon.Kinesis;\n     9\u2192using Amazon.Kinesis.Model;\n    10\u2192using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;\n    11\u2192\n    12\u2192namespace PulseOps.Warehouse.Transformations\n    13\u2192{\n    14\u2192    #region Dispatcher\n    15\u2192\n    16\u2192    /// <summary>\n    17\u2192    /// Orchestrates run-time selection of <see cref=\"ITransformationStrategy\"/> instances and executes\n    18\u2192    /// them in parallel against a batch of <see cref=\"EventEnvelope\"/> messages.\n    19\u2192    /// </summary>\n    20\u2192    public sealed class TransformationDispatcher\n    21\u2192    {\n    22\u2192        private readonly IReadOnlyCollection<ITransformationStrategy> _strategies;\n    23\u2192        private readonly IDeadLetterSink _deadLetterSink;\n    24\u2192        private readonly ILogger<TransformationDispatcher> _logger;\n    25\u2192\n    26\u2192        public TransformationDispatcher(\n    27\u2192            IEnumerable<ITransformationStrategy> strategies,\n    28\u2192            IDeadLetterSink deadLetterSink,\n    29\u2192            ILogger<TransformationDispatcher> logger)\n    30\u2192        {\n    31\u2192            _strategies     = strategies?.ToArray() ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(strategies));\n    32\u2192            if (!_strategies.Any())\n    33\u2192            {\n    34\u2192                throw new ArgumentException(\"At least one transformation strategy must be registered.\", nameof(strategies));\n    35\u2192            }\n    36\u2192\n    37\u2192            _deadLetterSink = deadLetterSink ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(deadLetterSink));\n    38\u2192            _logger         = logger          ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(logger));\n    39\u2192        }\n    40\u2192\n    41\u2192        /// <summary>\n    42\u2192        /// Applies the matching strategy to every event in <paramref name=\"batch\"/>.  \n    43\u2192        /// Events that fail transformation are shunted to the configured DLQ sink.\n    44\u2192        /// </summary>\n    45\u2192        public async Task<IReadOnlyCollection<KpiRecord>> TransformBatchAsync(\n    46\u2192            IReadOnlyCollection<EventEnvelope> batch,\n    47\u2192            CancellationToken                    ct = default)\n    48\u2192        {\n    49\u2192            if (batch is null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(batch));\n    50\u2192\n    51\u2192            var output = new List<KpiRecord>(batch.Count);\n    52\u2192            var gate   = new object();\n    53\u2192\n    54\u2192            await Parallel.ForEachAsync(batch, ct, async (envelope, token) =>\n    55\u2192            {\n    56\u2192                try\n    57\u2192                {\n    58\u2192                    var strategy = _strategies.FirstOrDefault(s => s.CanHandle(envelope))\n    59\u2192                                   ?? throw new UnsupportedEventException(envelope);\n    60\u2192\n    61\u2192                    var kpi = await strategy.TransformAsync(envelope, token).ConfigureAwait(false);\n    62\u2192\n    63\u2192                    if (kpi is not null)\n    64\u2192                    {\n    65\u2192                        lock (gate) { output.Add(kpi); }\n    66\u2192                    }\n    67\u2192                }\n    68\u2192                catch (Exception ex)\n    69\u2192                {\n    70\u2192                    _logger.LogError(ex, \"Failed to transform event {EventId}\", envelope.Id);\n    71\u2192                    await _deadLetterSink.PublishAsync(envelope, ex, token).ConfigureAwait(false);\n    72\u2192                }\n    73\u2192            });\n    74\u2192\n    75\u2192            return output.AsReadOnly();\n    76\u2192        }\n    77\u2192    }\n    78\u2192\n    79\u2192    #endregion\n    80\u2192\n    81\u2192    #region Contracts & Records\n    82\u2192\n    83\u2192    /// <summary>Canonical wrapper for all inbound event messages.</summary>\n    84\u2192    public sealed record EventEnvelope(\n    85\u2192        string        Id,\n    86\u2192        string        EventType,\n    87\u2192        DateTimeOffset Timestamp,\n    88\u2192        JsonElement   Payload);\n    89\u2192\n    90\u2192    /// <summary>A normalized KPI record to be persisted to the warehouse.</summary>\n    91\u2192    public sealed record KpiRecord(\n    92\u2192        string                     Name,\n    93\u2192        double                     Value,\n    94\u2192        string                     Unit,\n    95\u2192        DateTimeOffset             Timestamp,\n    96\u2192        IReadOnlyDictionary<string,string> Dimensions);\n    97\u2192\n    98\u2192    /// <summary>Pluggable transformation contract.</summary>\n    99\u2192    public interface ITransformationStrategy\n   100\u2192    {\n   101\u2192        bool  CanHandle  (EventEnvelope envelope);\n   102\u2192        Task<KpiRecord?> TransformAsync(EventEnvelope envelope, CancellationToken ct);\n   103\u2192    }\n   104\u2192\n   105\u2192    /// <summary>Abstraction for writing failed events to a dead-letter queue.</summary>\n   106\u2192    public interface IDeadLetterSink\n   107\u2192    {\n   108\u2192        Task PublishAsync(EventEnvelope envelope, Exception ex, CancellationToken ct = default);\n   109\u2192    }\n   110\u2192\n   111\u2192    #endregion\n   112\u2192\n   113\u2192    #region DLQ Implementation\n   114\u2192\n   115\u2192    /// <summary>\n   116\u2192    /// Writes failed events to an Amazon Kinesis stream for replay or inspection.\n   117\u2192    /// </summary>\n   118\u2192    public sealed class KinesisDeadLetterSink : IDeadLetterSink\n   119\u2192    {\n   120\u2192        private const int MaxPayloadBytes = 1_000_000; // 1 MB Kinesis hard-limit (rounded down)\n   121\u2192\n   122\u2192        private readonly IAmazonKinesis               _kinesis;\n   123\u2192        private readonly string                       _streamName;\n   124\u2192        private readonly ILogger<KinesisDeadLetterSink> _logger;\n   125\u2192\n   126\u2192        public KinesisDeadLetterSink(\n   127\u2192            IAmazonKinesis               kinesis,\n   128\u2192            string                       streamName,\n   129\u2192            ILogger<KinesisDeadLetterSink> logger)\n   130\u2192        {\n   131\u2192            _kinesis    = kinesis                      ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(kinesis));\n   132\u2192            _streamName = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(streamName)\n   133\u2192                            ? throw new ArgumentException(\"Stream name must be supplied.\", nameof(streamName))\n   134\u2192                            : streamName;\n   135\u2192            _logger     = logger                       ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(logger));\n   136\u2192        }\n   137\u2192\n   138\u2192        public async Task PublishAsync(EventEnvelope envelope, Exception ex, CancellationToken ct = default)\n   139\u2192        {\n   140\u2192            var dlqPayload = new\n   141\u2192            {\n   142\u2192                envelope.Id,\n   143\u2192                envelope.EventType,\n   144\u2192                envelope.Timestamp,\n   145\u2192                envelope.Payload,\n   146\u2192                Error       = ex.ToString(),\n   147\u2192                PublishedAt = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow\n   148\u2192            };\n   149\u2192\n   150\u2192            var bytes = JsonSerializer.SerializeToUtf8Bytes(dlqPayload);\n   151\u2192\n   152\u2192            if (bytes.Length > MaxPayloadBytes)\n   153\u2192            {\n   154\u2192                _logger.LogWarning(\n   155\u2192                    \"DLQ payload exceeds the 1 MB limit and will be discarded. EventId={EventId}\",\n   156\u2192                    envelope.Id);\n   157\u2192                return;\n   158\u2192            }\n   159\u2192\n   160\u2192            var request = new PutRecordRequest\n   161\u2192            {\n   162\u2192                StreamName   = _streamName,\n   163\u2192                PartitionKey = envelope.Id,\n   164\u2192                Data         = new MemoryStream(bytes)\n   165\u2192            };\n   166\u2192\n   167\u2192            await _kinesis.PutRecordAsync(request, ct).ConfigureAwait(false);\n   168\u2192        }\n   169\u2192    }\n   170\u2192\n   171\u2192    #endregion\n   172\u2192\n   173\u2192    #region Strategy Implementations\n   174\u2192\n   175\u2192    /// <summary>\n   176\u2192    /// Computes the ratio of uninterrupted focus-time to total work-time\n   177\u2192    /// from raw calendar events.\n   178\u2192    /// </summary>\n   179\u2192    public sealed class FocusTimeStrategy : ITransformationStrategy\n   180\u2192    {\n   181\u2192        private readonly ILogger<FocusTimeStrategy> _logger;\n   182\u2192\n   183\u2192        public FocusTimeStrategy(ILogger<FocusTimeStrategy> logger) =>\n   184\u2192            _logger = logger ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(logger));\n   185\u2192\n   186\u2192        public bool CanHandle(EventEnvelope envelope) =>\n   187\u2192            string.Equals(envelope.EventType, \"calendar.event\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n   188\u2192\n   189\u2192        public Task<KpiRecord?> TransformAsync(EventEnvelope envelope, CancellationToken ct)\n   190\u2192        {\n   191\u2192            try\n   192\u2192            {\n   193\u2192                var payload = envelope.Payload;\n   194\u2192\n   195\u2192                if (!payload.TryGetProperty(\"meetingLengthMinutes\", out var meetingProp) ||\n   196\u2192                    !payload.TryGetProperty(\"workdayLengthMinutes\", out var workdayProp))\n   197\u2192                {\n   198\u2192                    throw new InvalidEventSchemaException(envelope.Id, \"Missing meeting/workday duration.\");\n   199\u2192                }\n   200\u2192\n   201\u2192                var meetingMinutes = meetingProp.GetInt32();\n   202\u2192                var workdayMinutes = workdayProp.GetInt32();\n   203\u2192\n   204\u2192                var ratio = (double)(workdayMinutes - meetingMinutes) / workdayMinutes;\n   205\u2192\n   206\u2192                return Task.FromResult<KpiRecord?>(new KpiRecord(\n   207\u2192                    Name       : \"focus_time_ratio\",\n   208\u2192                    Value      : Math.Round(ratio, 4),\n   209\u2192                    Unit       : \"ratio\",\n   210\u2192                    Timestamp  : envelope.Timestamp,\n   211\u2192                    Dimensions : new Dictionary<string, string>\n   212\u2192                    {\n   213\u2192                        [\"event_id\"] = envelope.Id\n   214\u2192                    }));\n   215\u2192            }\n   216\u2192            catch (Exception ex) when (ex is not InvalidEventSchemaException)\n   217\u2192            {\n   218\u2192                _logger.LogError(ex, \"FocusTime transformation failed for EventId={EventId}\", envelope.Id);\n   219\u2192                throw;\n   220\u2192            }\n   221\u2192        }\n   222\u2192    }\n   223\u2192\n   224\u2192    /// <summary>\n   225\u2192    /// Calculates the monetary cost of meetings based on duration and attendee count.\n   226\u2192    /// </summary>\n   227\u2192    public sealed class MeetingCostStrategy : ITransformationStrategy\n   228\u2192    {\n   229\u2192        private readonly ILogger<MeetingCostStrategy> _logger;\n   230\u2192\n   231\u2192        // TODO: Inject via configuration / HR API lookup.\n   232\u2192        private const double AverageSalaryPerMinuteUsd = 1.00;\n   233\u2192\n   234\u2192        public MeetingCostStrategy(ILogger<MeetingCostStrategy> logger) =>\n   235\u2192            _logger = logger ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(logger));\n   236\u2192\n   237\u2192        public bool CanHandle(EventEnvelope envelope) =>\n   238\u2192            string.Equals(envelope.EventType, \"meeting.analytics\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n   239\u2192\n   240\u2192        public Task<KpiRecord?> TransformAsync(EventEnvelope envelope, CancellationToken ct)\n   241\u2192        {\n   242\u2192            try\n   243\u2192            {\n   244\u2192                var payload = envelope.Payload;\n   245\u2192\n   246\u2192                if (!payload.TryGetProperty(\"attendeeCount\",   out var attendeeProp) ||\n   247\u2192                    !payload.TryGetProperty(\"durationMinutes\", out var durationProp))\n   248\u2192                {\n   249\u2192                    throw new InvalidEventSchemaException(envelope.Id, \"Missing attendee count/duration.\");\n   250\u2192                }\n   251\u2192\n   252\u2192                var attendees       = attendeeProp.GetInt32();\n   253\u2192                var durationMinutes = durationProp.GetInt32();\n   254\u2192\n   255\u2192                var cost = attendees * durationMinutes * AverageSalaryPerMinuteUsd;\n   256\u2192\n   257\u2192                return Task.FromResult<KpiRecord?>(new KpiRecord(\n   258\u2192                    Name       : \"meeting_cost_usd\",\n   259\u2192                    Value      : cost,\n   260\u2192                    Unit       : \"USD\",\n   261\u2192                    Timestamp  : envelope.Timestamp,\n   262\u2192                    Dimensions : new Dictionary<string, string>\n   263\u2192                    {\n   264\u2192                        [\"attendees\"] = attendees.ToString(),\n   265\u2192                        [\"event_id\"]  = envelope.Id\n   266\u2192                    }));\n   267\u2192            }\n   268\u2192            catch (Exception ex) when (ex is not InvalidEventSchemaException)\n   269\u2192            {\n   270\u2192                _logger.LogError(ex, \"MeetingCost transformation failed for EventId={EventId}\", envelope.Id);\n   271\u2192                throw;\n   272\u2192            }\n   273\u2192        }\n   274\u2192    }\n   275\u2192\n   276\u2192    #endregion\n   277\u2192\n   278\u2192    #region Exceptions\n   279\u2192\n   280\u2192    /// <summary>\n   281\u2192    /// Thrown when no strategy claims responsibility for a given event.\n   282\u2192    /// </summary>\n   283\u2192    public sealed class UnsupportedEventException : Exception\n   284\u2192    {\n   285\u2192        public EventEnvelope Envelope { get; }\n   286\u2192\n   287\u2192        public UnsupportedEventException(EventEnvelope envelope)\n   288\u2192            : base($\"No transformation strategy registered for eventType '{envelope.EventType}'.\")\n   289\u2192        {\n   290\u2192            Envelope = envelope;\n   291\u2192        }\n   292\u2192    }\n   293\u2192\n   294\u2192    /// <summary>\n   295\u2192    /// Raised when an event payload violates its expected contract.\n   296\u2192    /// </summary>\n   297\u2192    public sealed class InvalidEventSchemaException : Exception\n   298\u2192    {\n   299\u2192        public string EventId { get; }\n   300\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
